title: Guest Communications Virtual Assistant (Short-Term Rentals)
description:
Please only apply for this job if you are an experienced STR VA



We are seeking a highly reliable, detail-oriented, and fast-thinking Guest Relations & Operations VA to support our short-term rental portfolio. This role is essential in delivering smooth operations and exceptional guest experiences across multiple booking platforms.



You will act as the central communication hub for guests, cleaners, maintenance teams, and property owners. Because we guarantee fast service, you must be able to respond within 5 minutes during your shift and dedicate 100% focus to this role with no other work commitments.



This position requires someone who thrives in a high-pressure, fast-paced environment and can perform consistently under close supervision.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

- Respond to guest inquiries, booking requests, and issues on Airbnb, BdC, and Hospitable.

- Coordinate with cleaners, maintenance personnel, and homeowners to ensure all tasks are completed promptly.

- Manage, monitor, and update cleaning and maintenance schedules to keep all properties guest-ready.

- Send turnover reminders to cleaners and verify completion.

- Monitor key status via KeyNest to ensure accurate tracking and availability.

- Assist in managing TT Lock digital access for applicable properties.

- Update pricing, availability, and property settings using PriceLabs and similar tools.

- Ensure calendars remain synced across all platforms at all times.

- Check Hospitable minimum night settings to prevent unnecessary blocked dates.

- Manage communication via RingCentral, Bl
, and other channels.

- Prepare accurate homeowner monthly invoices in a timely manner.

- Use Asana for property details, processes, and guidelines.

- Use Trello for daily and weekly task management.

- Investigate issues independently, including reviewing prior communication for unresolved concerns.

- Maintain professionalism, accuracy, and timeliness across all communication and documentation.



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

- Must be 30 years old or above.

- Minimum 2 years of experience in Short-Term Rental operations (strict requirement).

- Strong experience in Airbnb, BdC, Hospitable, PriceLabs, Asana, Trello, KeyNest, TT Lock, RingCentral, and Bl
.

- Excellent written and spoken English.

- Outstanding attention to detail and strong organizational skills.

- Ability to work in a fast-paced, high-pressure environment with strict response times.

- Comfortable working under close supervision and following established processes.

- Must consistently respond within 5 minutes during shift hours.

- Own phone and laptop with reliable high-speed internet.

- Willing to install all required apps on your devices.

- No other jobs or side commitments—full focus is required.

- Backup power or secondary internet is a plus.



WORK SETUP

- Full-time, remote role

- 48 hours per week

- Schedule aligned with Australian time zone 

- No monitoring apps (Time Doctor, Hubstaff, etc.)—we operate on trust and accountability



HOW TO APPLY



To be considered, applicants must submit:

- Shareable link to your updated resume/CV

- Your expected salary range (minimum and maximum)



? Applications missing the CV link or salary range will not be considered.

title: Experienced B2B Telemarketer To Cold Call & Schedule Appointments
description:
* PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING *





IMPORTANT:



- We are ONLY looking for candidates with previous B2B cold calling experience.

- If you have only worked warm leads, inbound calls, or appointment setting from ads, do NOT apply.



COMPANY INFO:



- My name is Jordan. I am the founder of a fast-growing company that helps small businesses never miss a call using an A.I. Receptionist.

- This is a simple, high-demand service that business owners immediately understand. We are looking for 1–2 strong cold callers to help introduce it to small business owners across the U.S.

- We are not a large corporate call center. We are a small team with an owner focussed on helping the team get real results.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



- Source your own B2B leads

- Cold call small business owners

- Book them for a free consultation

- Ensure they show up to the call

- That's it! You do not close deals. Our closing team handles everything, your only job is to get them to show-up.



MUST HAVE (DO NOT APPLY IF THIS DOES NOT DESCRIBE YOU):



- Proven B2B cold calling experience

- Strong English with no heavy accent

- Reliable internet and a quiet workspace

- Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls

- Put the phrase “Dial And Smile” in your subject line so we know you read this



COMPENSATION:



-$2/hour base

-$25 per attended show-up

- $100 per closed deal

- Monthly performance bonuses



HOURS:



- Part-time (20 hours per week) with the option to transition to full time

- Schedule: 2:00 AM – 6:00 AM Philippine Time



HOW TO APPLY:



- Do not send a generic message.

- In your application, include 2 things: Your specific B2B cold calling experience AND why this role fits you

- Do not use chat GPT or similar responses, those will be rejected. We read each application and looking for a genuine person to reach out.

Children’s Advocate Behavioral Health Clinic

Children’s Advocate is seeking a highly reliable, (degree preferred) detail-oriented Quality Assurance Specialist to support our growing behavioral health team. This role ensures that Therapist Mentors deliver high-quality clinical sessions, follow established policies and procedures, and maintain accurate data collection and documentation.

The QA Specialist plays a key role in training, development, observation, and compliance, and must maintain professional boundaries while providing corrective guidance when needed.

Training & Development Oversight

Strong communication, observation, and documentation skills.





Ability to provide corrective feedback professionally and confidently.

title: Brand & Packaging Designer
description:
We need a creative packaging designer to help us develop an engaging and visually appealing box for our new card game.



This is an adult, queer party card game designed for groups of gay men to play together. The game blends icebreakers, questions, pop culture, emotional depth, and dares. There will be 250 cards across 7 categories. Each category will have a different color/design but the cards in the same category can all look the same. Each card will have a different question on it. People will pull a card from the middle and answer the question. Each person will also have one card they can use to pass a question. The rules will be minimal and simple.



This is a real product moving toward manufacturing, not a concept project.



Key Deliverables



Logo / Wordmark

- Clean, confident, and bold

- Should work on packaging, cards, and social media



Card Design System

- Poker-size cards (2.5” × 3.5”)

- A reusable layout that works across multiple decks

- Each deck has a different color theme but the same structure

- Clear category title + readable body text

- Designed for full-bleed color printing



Box Packaging

- Design for a small rigid box. I'll attach an example of the box.

- Front, back, and sides

- Strong shelf presence and clear explanation of what the game is

- Fun, sexy, and playful



Instruction Sheet

- One-page, double-sided folded insert

- Easy to understand, visually engaging

- Matches the card and box aesthetic



Production-Ready Files

- Print-ready PDFs. I'll attach the manufacturers template for the box and cards.

- CMYK color mode

- Bleed and crop marks included

- Box dielines

- Files ready to hand directly to a manufacturer



What I’ll Provide

- Finalized card text for all decks

- Game rules and mechanics

title: Shopify E-Commerce Manager / Email Marketer for Skill Toy brand (WITH BONUSES)
description:
I’m Slinky Josh, a content creator with 4 million total followers on social media. I make entertaining, funny, and wholesome videos where I perfor
smerizing tricks with a plastic slinky, and surprise people with my skill in public.



More importantly, I sell my brand of "slinky" (called HyperSpring), which are designed for doing tricks with, and I sell video courses where I teach people how to do the sort of tricks that I do (which I've dubbed "springbending"). I put "slinky" in quotes because Slinky is technically a specific trademarked brand of toy spring (my competitor), though "slinky" is also used as a generic term for the toy in English. 



I am looking for someone highly intelligent and detail-oriented to become my right-hand assistant. My goal is for you to completely take over the day-to-day running of the business, so that I can focus on creating content to grow the business. ?



You will have the opportunity to grow with my business, and if you prove yourself, make much more money than the starting pay that I have posted this listing at. I am in this for the long haul. I am on a mission to spread the joy of springbending around the globe and turn HyperSpring into the #1 brand of toy spring in the world. I have grown this business from a side hustle into a full career over the past 8 years, and I fully intend to continue on this mission until the day I die. ?



*****

BONUSES



To ensure you are as motivated as I am to grow this business, for at least the next 6 months, you will have the following bonus structure in addition to your base hourly pay of $7/hour:



***At the end of each month, you will receive 8% of monthly e-commerce revenue that exceeds $8,000 USD.***



(For context, the business is currently averaging $6000 to $7000 per month in e-commerce revenue.)



(“E-commerce revenue” here means Shopify, plus any other sales channels we end up adding, such as Amazon. It does not include any content creation income which I receive directly from YouTube,
, and TikTok, since that won’t be your focus.)



So for example, if we make $10,000 in revenue for April, you will receive a bonus of (10,000-8,000)*0.08 = $160. 



If we make $15,653, you will receive (15,653-8,000)*0.08 = $612.24. 



And if you can help me get revenue to $30,000 in a month, you will receive (30,000 - 8,000)*0.08 = $1,760. 



There is no cap on this bonus structure. 

If you can get us to $50,000 in a month, your monthly bonus will be $3,360.



This is very possible, since my digital video courses are very undersold in comparison to the HyperSprings, and I have an
 list with 17,000 subscribers which is going almost completely unused currently. There is a LOT of room for us to grow massively. 



For your first month, the bonus will be pro-rated for the number of days you worked in the month. So for example, if I hired you on the 12th of March, it would be (31-12)/31 = 0.613 times whatever the bonus would have been for that month. 



This bonus structure will continue for the next 6 months. After that, I’ll re-evaluate your pay structure to make sure your pay is proportional to your work, while also making sure you stay highly motivated to grow the business. 



*****



Your duties will include:

•
 marketing (including setting up automation flows - I currently have almost none)

• Answering customer service
s (low volume)

• Updating and improving my website, taking SEO into account

•
ing contractors I work with

• Researching random things & reporting back to me

• Checking up on shipments in my 3PL's website & Shopify

• Crunching a few numbers in Google Sheets

• Setting up & maintaining other sales platforms (e.g. Amazon, TikTok Shop, Instagram/Facebook)

• Potentially running ads on
, Google, etc.

• Any other random online tasks I need help with



Here are my non-negotiables. I am looking for someone who:

• Speaks and writes fluent English

• Types decently fast (I will test you on both of these over video)

• Has some kind of marketing experience, ideally
 marketing

• Is intelligent & can think & act independently 



If you have experience with any of the following, that's a plus:

• Shopify

• Course Creator 360

• SEO

• Customer service

• Google Sheets or Excel

• Amazon

• TikTok Shop

• Meta Business Suite (specifically the shopping feature)

• Google Ads

• ClickFunnels

• Building sales funnels in general

• Video editing

• Bookkeeping (Quickbooks)



?****?

HOURS?



I will expect you to work 40 hours a week. ?I will always allow you to pick your own hours, but you must let me know what hours you will work for the upcoming week beforehand, and stick to the schedule you set, or let me know if you need to make any changes. 



I am in Japan until the end of May, which is only 1 hour ahead of Philippines time, so for this time I would like a lot of our hours to overlap so I can train you. ?After that, I will return to the US for at least 2 months, but you can keep working whatever hours you want. 

I will expect you to keep a log of everything you work on each day, and
 it to me at the end of your work day. ??



****?

About AI:

I am 100% fine with you using AI to research, strategize, and bounce ideas off of. In fact I will expect you to use it this way in the course of this job. I will also be fine with you using AI to correct your spelling and grammar in communications with my customers. 



However, you must not use AI to write your application to me, or any messages to me ever. I am trying to hire a person, not ChatGPT, and I need to communicate directly with the person I am hiring. I need to know YOUR strengths and weaknesses, not ChatGPT’s. If I get even a hint that your application or resume was copied and pasted from ChatGPT or any other LLM, I will throw your application in the proverbial trash can. ??



****

In your application, please answer the following questions:



• What is your marketing experience? Please describe it in detail. Please do not bother applying to this job if you do not have any marketing experience. 

• What other relevant experience do you have? Please describe in detail.

• What tools do you use to stay organized?

• What would your
 marketing strategy look like for me? (Given I already have a list with 17,000
 addresses that is almost completely unused)

• If I hired you on March 17, and we made $7,482 that month in e-commerce revenue, what would your bonus be for that month? 

• Why do you want to work for me?

• At what age did you start learning English? And how did you learn?

• Do you own your own computer?

• Where do you live? 

• How fast is your internet? Please include a screenshot from an internet speed test.

• Where would you be working from? (Home, internet cafe, etc?)

• How frequently do you have power or internet outages there?

• Do you have a backup location you can work from in case of outages?

• Do you have any other job or school currently? And if so, how many hours a week? 

• How soon would you be able to start?

title: Remote Full-Stack Developer – Construction Tech AI Integrations Building AI-Powered Workflow Automation
description:
About the Company

Connacht Group is a Chicago-based general contractor specializing in hospitality construction projects. We manage complex commercial construction workflows involving detailed project management, subcontractor coordination, procurement, and contract management across multiple properties.

We’re modernizing our operational workflows by integrating AI and automation to reduce administrative burden on our project teams and improve project delivery outcomes.



The Role

We’re seeking an experienced full-stack developer to design and build multiple custom integrations that connect Claude AI, Procore (our project management platform), and other business tools we rely on. This is a long-term engagement to build several interconnected systems that will streamline critical workflows across our project teams.

Primary Integration: Claude + Procore Submittal Automation. This is a fully remote position.



What You’ll Build:

A web-based application that uses Claude AI to automate two critical construction workflows:

 1. Submittal Generation System

 ? Ingests project specification PDFs (
pages)

 ? Integrates Microsoft Project schedules

 ? Uses Claude to parse specs and identify all submittal requirements

 ? Generates comprehensive submittal logs in Excel format

 ? Creates Procore submittals via API

 ? Supports interactive refinement (users ask questions, Claude refines analysis)

 2. Submittal Review System

 ? Accepts incoming submittal packages (shop drawings, certifications, test reports, cut sheets)

 ? Retrieves project specifications and drawings from Procore

 ? Uses Claude + OCR to extract technical data from submittals

 ? Cross-checks compliance against specs and drawings

 ? Generates detailed PDF compliance reports with citations to spec sections

 ? Uploads review results back to Procore

 ? Supports iterative clarification loop with users

Key Technical Requirements:

 ? Procore API integration (OAuth authentication, submittal creation/updates, file uploads)

 ? Claude API integration (vision, document analysis, multi-turn conversations)

 ? PDF processing and OCR (handling scanned documents, technical drawings)

 ? Microsoft Project file parsing (.mpp, .xml schedule files)

 ? Web application frontend (React or similar) for upload, review, and approval

 ? Backend service (Python/FastAPI or Node/Express)

 ? Cloud hosting and database design

 ? Comprehensive error handling and validation

Secondary Integrations

You’ll also be building 2-3 additional integrations (to be discussed in detail upon engagement) that likely involve:

 ? Asana ? Procore task synchronization

 ?
/Microsoft Teams notifications and workflows

 ? Custom reporting and data pipeline automation



Technical Skills Required

Core Requirements (Must Have)

 ? 5+ years full-stack development (Python + React/Node, or equivalent modern stack)

 ? API integration experience – comfortable working with REST APIs, authentication (OAuth, API tokens), rate limiting

 ? PDF/document processing – experience with libraries like PDFPlumber, PyPDF, or similar

 ? Database design – SQL, schema design, proper data modeling

 ? Cloud platform experience – AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure (deployment, storage, security)

 ? Authentication & Security – securing API keys, environment management, HTTPS/TLS, data handling

Highly Valuable

 ? Large Language Model (LLM) integration – experience with Claude API, GPT APIs, or similar (prompt engineering, token management, cost optimization)

 ? OCR & Computer Vision – Tesseract, OpenCV, or similar libraries

 ? Construction industry knowledge – familiarity with construction workflows, Procore, or project management tools

 ? Procore API experience – prior integrations with Procore platform

 ? Document understanding – experience parsing technical documents, specifications, or complex PDFs

Nice to Have

 ? Experience with Model Context Protocols (MCPs) for AI integration

 ? GraphQL experience

 ? CI/CD and testing infrastructure (pytest, Jest, GitHub Actions)

 ? Serverless architecture (Lambda, Cloud Functions)

 ? Real-time features (WebSockets, Server-Sent Events)

title: English Virtual Assistant (Repost Messages)
description:
Your job is to send other people links on items that can be bought low, and resold for higher, so they can make a profit from reselling them.



Repost messages from one 
 server to another. Around 10-60 messages per day that is around 1-6 sentences.

You need to be able to understand English well, you can not sound like a robot.

Ex) Don't say "Ako ay 25 taong gulang."

Say "Ako ay dalawampu't limang taong gulang."



You need to be on time and repost within 0-2 mins. 

Last person got fired because of unpunctuality. 

If you are late consistently you will be fired, because your job is to help other people buy items from your links, if you are late, the product will sell out, and they won't be able to buy it and resell it for a profit.



We have more opportunities in the field available which can earn you up to 35k peso, with basically no additional work. 

You will need to be native speaker English level, in writing. 



If you are mass applying without even looking, do not apply for this job, because we will send follow up messages asking you to read and perform tasks, and if you don't do the example, you will not get a text back. Save us both time.



More detail

title: Outbound Sales Closer – Food / FMCG
description:
Read first:



This job is daily cold calling to takeaway shops & grocers in Australia.

If you don’t like cold calling, don’t apply.



What you do

• Call local takeaway shops & grocers

• Offer free samples

• Follow up after sample drops

• Convert the sample drop into a first full-price order

• Hours: Monday–Friday, Australian business hours (approx. 9am–5pm AEST)



Once a shop orders, the account is handed off.

You do not manage reorders or ongoing accounts.



What this is NOT

• No inbound leads

• No account management

• No marketing or strategy work



This is dial>talk >>>convert.



Pay

Commission is paid on adoption, not trials.

• AUD $1,000 monthly base

• AUD $30 one-off commission per converted account

o Commission is paid only when the shop places its first full-price order (2nd order)

o No commission on sample drops or discounted trial orders



Who should apply

• Comfortable making cold calls all day

• Proven experience hitting sales targets

• Can handle rejection

• Clear English

• Reliable and consistent



Sales experience helps. Discipline matters more.



REQUIRED TO APPLY



Applications without an answer will be ignored.



You are given a list of 150 takeaway shops to call in one working day.

How would you structure your calling day to get through the list and book trials?

(5–6 sentences max. Be practical.)

*** Attach your resume with your answer.

Core traits



Clear communicator 
, Teams, video calls)

title: Lead Transactions Coordinator & Executive Assistant
description:
I’m a real estate entrepreneur based in Dallas, Texas, running two connected businesses: a real estate sales team that helps buyers and sellers, and a property management company that operates furnished co-living rentals. We use ClickUp for task and project management and Google Drive as our primary file system. We also use Buildium as our main property management tool.



I’m looking for a full-time Real Estate Lead Transaction Coordinator to manage the flow of transactions from contract to close, making sure deadlines are met and nothing falls through the cracks.



This role combines transaction management with systems coordination. You’ll handle communication between agents, clients, title, and lenders — while also ensuring that files and documents for each transaction are organized and fully documented.



WHAT YOU’LL DO

- Manage all real estate transactions from contract to close

- Communicate with agents, clients, title companies, and lenders to ensure smooth closings

- Schedule showings, enter listings, and draft proposals

- Track deadlines, contingencies, and documentation compliance

- Create and update SOPs and workflow documentation for transaction processes

- Coordinate with automation partners for system improvements



YOU’D BE A GREAT FIT IF

- 2+ years of experience as a Real Estate Transaction Coordinator (or a similar role in real estate operations)

- You follow instructions exactly and don’t cut corners

- You write and speak clearly in English

- You stay calm managing many moving parts

- You take ownership and don’t need hand-holding

- You take initiative: you spot issues early, investigate, and propose next steps/solutions

- You use good judgment and can prioritize without being told every step

- You thrive in a fast-paced environment and can adapt quickly as priorities shift

- You are tech-savvy, detail-oriented, and reliable under deadlines

- Understanding of contract timelines, title/lender coordination, and client communication

- Flexibility to work some hours on weekends is preferred





ROLE DETAILS

- Full-time, remote

- Schedule: Mon–Fri, aligned with CST

- Pay: $5-7 USD/hour, based on experience

- Long-term role with growth and bonuses



HOW TO APPLY (READ CAREFULLY)

We do not review platfor
ssages.

Applications that don’t follow instructions are disqualified.



STEP 1 —

1. Send an
 to 

2. Subject line: Lead Transactions Coordinator – [Full Name]

3.
 body must include only:

- A short greeting

- A Google Drive folder link

- Your answer to the Detail Check (see Step 3)



STEP 2 — GOOGLE DRIVE FOLDER

1. Create a folder named: [Your Full Name] — Lead Transactions Coordinator Application

2. Set sharing to “Anyone with the link can view.”

3. You can organize the folder however you think is best. I will be looking at both what you submit and how you organize it.

4. Include the following:

a. Resume (PDF)

b. Tech and Setup

   - Include a screenshot of your internet speed showing download and upload speeds. 

   - Include a screenshot of your computer specs showing RAM, processor, and OS.

   - Include one photo of your current workspace (desk and computer).

c. Written Answers (one Google Doc)

   - Transactions Coordinator Experience

      - Describe one property management role or company you worked with. Include:

      - Number of properties/units

      - Your day-to-day responsibilities

      - Tools you used 

   - Taking Ownership

      - We already have SOPs and systems, but they’re still improving.

      - What would you focus on in your first 2 weeks to keep operations running smoothly without needing constant supervision?

d. Systems Proof (2–4 screenshots)

   - At least 1 “HQ” or home base view you’ve built (for a founder/team)

      Example: a dashboard, control panel, or main view in ClickUp, Asana, Notion, etc.

   - At least 1 project management board or folder structure you created

      Example: a tool for maintenance tracking, tenant or leasing pipeline, or vendor coordination

   - For each screenshot, add a short caption (this can be in a small Google Doc or directly on the image as text), including:

      - What the system is used for

      - Which tool it’s in (ClickUp, Asana, Google Drive, Notion, etc.)

      - What part you personally designed or organized

   - If you cannot share screenshots from a previous client because of confidentiality, you may recreate a similar structure in a fresh workspace (with fake data) and take screenshots of that instead.

e. Video Introduction (2–4 minutes)

   - Who you are and where you’re based

   - Your Transactions Coordinator experience (+team leading)

   - Example of handling multiple stakeholders at once

   - How you personally stay organized



STEP 3 — DETAIL CHECK

At the very bottom of your
 (under the Drive link), write only the price per square foot for this property:



3384 P Avenue, Plano, TX 75074 – Sold for 255,555 USD.



Just include the final price per square foot number, with no explanation.



WHAT HAPPENS NEXT

-
 application screen

- Interview

- Hire

title: AI Search & Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
Position Overview



We are hiring an AI Search & Digital Marketing Specialist to lead the evolution of our marketing efforts into the next generation of search and digital visibility.



This role goes beyond traditional marketing. We are looking for someone who is excited about leveraging AI-driven search, automation, data insights, and emerging digital tools to give our company a competitive edge. As search continues shifting toward AI-powered results, generative answers, and conversational discovery, this person will help ensure our company is visible, trusted, and positioned ahead of competitors.



You will own and execute strategies that improve our presence across:

-Traditional Google search

-Local search and Google Business Profile

-AI-driven search experiences

-Organic content ecosystems

-Social media and digital trust signals



This is a hands-on, growth-focused role for someone who wants to be on the cutting edge of AI-powered marketing while still mastering the fundamentals of SEO, content, and local visibility that drive real revenue. We are not looking for someone to simply “manage posts.” We are looking for someone who wants to help build a modern, AI-informed marketing engine inside a growing home improvement company.



Responsibilities



-AI Visibility & Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)

-Develop and execute strategies to improve our visibility in AI-driven search platforms and generative answer engines

-Structure website and content to increase the likelihood of being cited in AI-generated results

-Monitor how our brand and services appear in AI search experiences and recommend improvements

-Identify content gaps based on AI-generated responses and customer search behavior

-Implement structured content, schema guidance, and entity clarity to improve machine understanding of our business

-Audit website pages for SEO, readability, user experience, and conversion opportunities



Content & Digital Presence



-Create and optimize service pages, location pages, blogs, FAQs, and project case studies

-Manage a content calendar aligned with homeowner questions and seasonal demand

-Support social media and digital brand visibility initiatives



Reviews & Reputation



-Build and manage a review generation process

-Respond to and monitor online reviews

-Gather testimonials, before/after stories, and customer-facing trust content



Reporting & Growth



-Track performance across search visibility, AI appearances, reviews, and lead activity

-Provide clear monthly reporting and recommendations



This position requires answering short questions about marketing and AI strategy during the application process. Applications without completed responses may not be considered. Please include your answers to the following questions with your application. 



Visit our website: 

List 3 improvements that would help this company appear more often in search results or AI-generated answers.



List 5 website content topics you would create for a roofing/siding/home exterior company to attract homeowners researching projects. For each topic, include:

-Title

-Type of content (blog, FAQ, guide, etc.)

-Why would it attract potential customers?



Many companies have happy customers, but very few online reviews.

What 3 systems or processes would you implement to consistently generate more reviews?

title: YouTube Video Editor for Real Estate Channel (Long Form + Shorts Repurposing)
description:
Job Overview



I’m looking for a skilled YouTube video editor to help edit content for a growing real estate YouTube channel.



The channel produces two long-form videos per week, and I’m looking for someone who can also repurpose those videos into multiple short-form clips for YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, and TikTok.



My goal is to work with someone long-term who can deliver high-quality edits with a reasonably fast turnaround time.



If you are experienced with YouTube content editing and understand pacing, storytelling, and attention retention, this could be a great fit.



?



Content Schedule



Each week you will be editing:



Long Form Content

 • 2 YouTube videos per week

 • Upload schedule:

 • Wednesday

 • Saturday



Short Form Content

 • Repurpose the long-form videos into 5–10 short-form clips per week

 • Shorts will be used for:

 • YouTube Shorts

 • Instagram Reels

 • TikTok



?



Editing Style



The editing style should be:

 • Clean and professional

 • Engaging pacing that holds viewer attention

 • Use of zoom cuts, b-roll, graphics, captions, and transitions when appropriate

 • Optimized for YouTube and social media



Experience editing YouTube talking-head style content is a big plus.



?



What I’m Looking For



I’m looking for someone who:

 • Has strong video editing skills

 • Understands YouTube pacing and retention editing

 • Can create high-quality edits

 • Can maintain consistent turnaround times

 • Is reliable and communicates well

 • Has experience creating short-form clips from long-form content



?



Software



You may use any professional editing software such as:

 • Premiere Pro

 • Final Cut

 • DaVinci Resolve

 • CapCut (Pro-level users welcome)



?



Turnaround Expectations



Once raw footage is provided, I’m looking for someone who can:

 • Deliver long-form edits within a reasonable timeframe

 • Consistently meet deadlines for the weekly upload schedule



Fast turnaround without sacrificing quality is very important.



?



How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:

 1. Your portfolio or examples of videos you’ve edited

 2. Links to YouTube videos or social media content you’ve worked on

 3. Your editing software

 4. Your typical turnaround time

 5. Your weekly availability



Applications without video examples or a portfolio will not be considered.



?



If you’re a great editor who understands YouTube content and short-form repurposing, I’d love to hear from you.

title: Media Buyer / Paid Ads Specialist
description:
MEDIA BUYER / PAID ADS SPECIALIST

Zeta Media | Remote (Philippines-based) | Full-time



---



ABOUT US



Zeta Media is a Singapore-based growth agency that helps SMBs across home services, dental, and creative education verticals generate leads and bookings through WhatsApp automation, CRM systems, and paid advertising.



We are looking for a sharp, data-driven media buyer based in the Philippines to launch, manage, and optimise paid ad campaigns across Google Ads and Meta Ads for up to 5 client accounts across different verticals.



---



THE VERTICALS YOU WILL WORK ACROSS



You will manage up to 5 client accounts across a mix of Singapore-based SMBs. Our current and incoming verticals include:



- Home improvement / renovation — Lead generation for showroom visits and renovation enquiries via Google Search and Meta

- Dental / healthcare — New patient acquisition for specific treatments (implants, Invisalign, veneers) via Google Search and Meta

- Children's enrichment / education — Class enrolments and event registrations targeting parents, primarily via Meta

- Dance / performing arts — Class sign-ups and trial bookings via Meta and Google



New accounts will be added over time as we onboard more clients. All clients are Singapore-based SMBs.



---



WHAT YOU WILL DO



- Plan, build, launch, and optimise Google Ads campaigns (Search, Display, Performance Max) across all client accounts

- Plan, build, launch, and optimise Meta Ads campaigns 
 and Instagram) including CTWA (click-to-WhatsApp) ad formats

- Set up and structure new Google Ads accounts and Meta Business Manager / ad accounts from scratch for new clients as they come onboard

- Work closely with our account managers to communicate campaign performance, recommendations, and updates to clients when needed

- Conduct keyword research, audience research, and competitor ad analysis for each vertical

- Write ad copy and headlines tailored to each client's brand voice and target audience

- Create and manage A/B tests for ad creatives, copy, audiences, and bidding strategies

- Set up and maintain conversion tracking (Meta Pixel, Google Tag Manager, Google Analytics 4)

- Monitor daily ad spend, CPC, CPL, CTR, and ROAS; flag anomalies early

- Deliver weekly performance reports with clear recommendations (not just data dumps)

- Coordinate with our design team for creative assets when needed

- Manage landing page traffic and recommend improvements based on ad performance data

- Stay current on platform updates, algorithm changes, and new ad formats



---



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



- 2+ years of hands-on experience managing Google Ads AND Meta Ads campaigns (not just boosted posts)

- Proven track record running lead generation campaigns, ideally for service-based businesses

- Strong working knowledge of Google Ads (Search, Display, Performance Max), Meta Ads Manager, and audience targeting

- Experience setting up and troubleshooting Meta Pixel, Google Tag Manager, and GA4 conversion events

- Comfortable setting up Google Ads accounts and Meta Business Manager / ad accounts from scratch, including billing, permissions, and domain verification

- Ability to write compelling ad copy that converts (not generic template copy)

- Comfortable managing SGD 3,000–15,000/month in combined ad spend across accounts

- Strong analytical skills: you can read the data, spot what is working, and explain why

- Excellent written English communication (you will be briefing the team and reporting to the founder directly)

- Self-starter who does not need to be chased for updates or results

- Based in the Philippines (this is a requirement)



---



BONUS (NICE TO HAVE)



- Experience with click-to-WhatsApp (CTWA) ad campaigns on Meta

- Familiarity with Singapore market, consumer behaviour, or local competitors

- Experience in any of these verticals: home improvement/renovation, dental/healthcare, or children's education

- Basic graphic design skills (Canva, Figma) for quick creative iterations

- Experience with landing page builders or basic HTML for LP tweaks

- Familiarity with CRM tools (
, GHL, HubSpot, or similar)



---



WORKING ARRANGEMENT



- Remote, Philippines-based, full-time (with a 1-month paid trial period)

- 40 hours per week with overlap during Singapore business hours (SGT, GMT+8)

- Monthly salary (to be discussed based on experience)

- Direct reporting to the founder



---



HOW TO APPLY



Send your application with the following:



1. A brief introduction about yourself and your experience with Google and Meta Ads

2. Links to or screenshots of past campaign dashboards showing results you are proud of (anonymised is fine)

3. Your monthly rate expectation in PHP

4. Your availability (hours per week and preferred working hours)

5. Answer this question in 2–3 sentences: "If you were launching Google Ads for a dental clinic targeting patients who need dental implants in Singapore, what campaign type would you start with and why?"



Applications without the screening question answered will not be reviewed.



We review applications within 3–5 working days. Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a short paid test task before a final interview.

title: VA - Local SEO Engineer
description:
LOCAL SEO ENGINEER

Contractor Kingdom | Remote | Full-Time | $1,000/month + Growth Opportunity 





BEFORE YOU READ FURTHER



This is not a data entry job. You won't be manually hunting directories or copying and pasting NAP info all day.



This is an AI-powered role. We've built Custom GPT systems, automated workflows, and smart tools to handle the heavy lifting. Your job is fine-tuning, quality control, and strategy execution, making sure the outputs are excellent.



If you're hungry to learn how modern local SEO is actually done, AI tools, GBP optimization, citations, rank tracking, this is the role.





WHO WE ARE



Contractor Kingdom is a full-service digital marketing company built exclusively for home service contractors : plumbers, HVAC techs, roofers, electricians, general contractors, and more.



We sell premium websites bundled with a 12-week Local SEO sprint that gets clients ranking on Google Maps before their site even launches. After the sprint, clients move to ongoing monthly retainers. We manage everything: GBP optimization, citation building, content, reviews, and rankings.



We're a small, fast-moving/growing team. When you join, you will own a real piece of the operation, not a task list handed down from five layers of management.





THE ROLE



You'll be the engine behind our Local SEO sprint and ongoing client management reporting to the strategist. You'll run the month-by-month process that takes a brand-new client from their level of GBP/ Entity presence and keep them climbing using our systems. 



You work with AI, not against it.

We've built Custom GPTs that generate GBP descriptions, category maps, post content, and product listings. Your job is to guide the AI, review the outputs, refine what's off, and ship what's excellent. Help us make the systems more efficient for you to operate without sacrificing Quality.



You manage real client accounts, with real results.

15 active GBP clients depend on weekly and monthly recurring work. You'll see rankings move, citation velocity grow, and heat maps shift because of what you did.



You have a path forward.

This role starts as Local SEO Engineer.  If you're ambitious, there's room to grow here.





WHAT YOU'LL DO



Sprint Execution (12-Week Client Onboarding)



- Execute Month 1-2-3 Local SEO sprints using our step-by-step SOP

- Run GBP facelifts: categories, descriptions, media uploads, hours, service areas

- Submit data aggregators via Bright Local and track go-live confirmations

- Conduct baseline citation audits and populate the Citation Tracker accurately

- Build and claim aggregator profiles (Apple Maps, Bing, Yelp, BBB, Chamber, Expertise, etc.)

- Order Citations

- Complete SERP and competitor research 



Ongoing Weekly + Monthly Client Management



- Monitor and respond to all reviews every week

- Escalate negative reviews via 

- Check weekly rankings in 

- GBP posts

- Upload Provided 10-20 photos per client per month

- Run NAP entity audits and fix mismatches, Track, build Important Contractor Profiles (Yelp) 

- Pull  heat maps for client reporting

- Maintain accurate Citation Tracker and NAP Workbook for every client





TOOLS YOU'LL USE DAILY : Any Experience Preferred 



Custom GPTs (built by us) — GBP categories, descriptions, post content, product listings

Bright Local — rank tracking, citation ordering, review management, scan reports ( experience preferred)

Search Atlas — bulk photo uploads, review responses, GBP optimization

Local Falcon — heat maps and geo-grid ranking visualization

GS Location Changer — SERP research with geo-targeted search simulation


 — team communication 

Google Business Organization — direct profile management and optimization





WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR



- Strong English Understanding & Comprehension — you'll be polishing AI content, review responses, and client-facing copy

- Detail-oriented -- NAP consistency matters. One wrong character can suppress a client's rankings.

- Coachable and process-driven — we have SOPs. We need someone who follows them and flags when something's off.

- Good design eye — you'll be selecting photos, choosing the best AI-generated output, and uploading branded images

- Tech-comfortable — you don't need to know every tool on day one. But a fast learner

- Prior citation / GBP / local SEO experience is a bonus, not required if you're sharp and hungry





COMPENSATION + GROWTH



$1,000/month base salary

Annual Bonuses Earnable - Room for growth

Remote — flexible schedule

Full training provided 



Growth Path:

Local SEO Engineer ?  Strategist 



We promote from within. We grow people.



This isn't a job for someone who wants to clock in and clock out.



It's a job for someone who wants to learn how local SEO actually works in 2025+, use the AI stacks that most agencies don't even know exist yet, and build a real career in digital marketing.



If that's you reply with the subject line: "I read the whole thing" & Why you think you'd be a good fit? 



We are scheduling interviews 2 day after launching this Job & ready to hire within the Week! 



Contractor Kingdom | 
 | Remote

title: Full-Time Tiktok / UGC Editor
description:
Editing VA hiring post:



Full-time Capcut / UGC / TikTok Editor with potential for more



Hiring for part-time work for a Capcut / TikTok editor



You will be making TikTok videos using Capcup or the video editing software of your choice.  The editing process is fairly simple and straightforward.  Anyone who is proficient in video editing should have no problem with the basic tasks such as:

Cutting dead space in talking head videos

Adding overlay images on screen in the videos

Minor effects such as dynamic zoom, cropping, etc.

Producing b-roll content from voiceover and footage provided, having the ability to digest what is being said and pair up the audio with corresponding footage



Please review a few examples of my content to ensure you are familiar and comfortable with the editing style:

Basic talking head - here you are mostly editing dead space and piecing clips together, adding minor effects like crop and zoom to make the frames look more dynamic and seamless.





Talking head with overlays - same as before, but adding images provided to you on the screen to support what is being said in the video.







B-roll content - you will be provided a voice over and need to work through the footage to find fitting visuals. A strong understanding of English and social media content is crucial here.





Very basic content - this will take up a majority of your workload and will consist of usually one main video thats about 5-10 minutes long, 1-2 photos that need to be addressed, and maybe a request to add a caption.





You will be working hand in hand with me on an extremely viral social media page and there is room for bonuses if deadlines are met and the content performs well!



Requirements:

Attention to detail

STRONG English

Strong internet connection

Previous experience with Capcut / TikTok / Instagram

Good working with a team

Ability to learn and take constructive feedback

Availability to work 6-8h a day (with potential for more and increased salary)

Able to work 5-6 days per week (can take days off whenever as long as mostly consistent)

Can take payments through Wise, Zelle, Paypal, Cashapp, etc

PH or similar time zone



$500-800/month + bonuses 



To apply, please complete the recreate assignment below so I can see your skills (1h max)



Below is a Google drive with the original files you will need to re-create this reference video:



Reference video: one reference video is in the google drive upper "edited chest" and then here is the link to the other: 



Google drive: 



Please complete the following steps:

Download the files and import into your video editing software

Find the “good” takes of the audio sections and stitch together to complete the voiceover

Find the corresponding footage to match what is being said in the voiceover

Pay close attention to detail in the selection of the clips, the pacing (duration of each scene), cropping, etc.

Message me with a link to the re-created video

title: Content Creator  (Female Remote)
description:
Freed Corp Agency

Remotely



Salary: from $2,000 per month





About the role

We are looking for dynamic content creators for live streaming platforms focused on digital entertainment and engaging an international audience. The work is 100% remote: creating interactive sessions in real time, moderating chats and building loyal communities. Ideal for charismatic people with live video experience who love online communication and multimedia. You will join the team of creators with the support of producers and technical tools.





Your tasks

Conduct daily/weekly live streams (flexible schedule, 4-8 hours/day), creating original and fascinating content.



Interact with viewers in a real-time chat, answering questions and increasing engagement.



Collaborate with the team to plan themes, scenarios, and promotional campaigns for streams.



Optimize content for viewership growth, retention, and audience metrics (with basic analytics).



Provide a simple tech stack (PC/Laptop/Phone, stable internet)





What are we looking for

Experience in streaming, video creation, or content creator roles (minimum 6 months).



Age 18-28, excellent oral communication (native Spanish + spoken English plus).



Online engagement skills: charisma, empathy, ability to retain an audience.



Readiness for a shift schedule (nights/ mornings according to the target audience).





What we offer

100% remote from anywhere



Learning at the beginning: stream production and best practices.



Payments are made weekly/monthly (without hidden fees).



Performance bonuses (views, subscriptions, engagement).



Technical support and community of creators for collaborations.



Growth to senior roles (lead streamer, coach).





Please respond now – We have sent you a resume, links to past streams (if any) and a short video greeting. Quick selection, response in 48 hours. Join the innovation team

title: High-Ticket Appointment Setter | UK Dental Clinics (London)
description:
We are a specialized Dental Automation Agency looking for a Rockstar Cold Caller / SDR to join our team for a high-impact campaign in London, UK.



The Project:

We help high-end dental clinics in London recover lost revenue by implementing an AI-powered Missed Call Text-back System. Our solution ensures they never lose a patient again.



Your Role:



Perform outbound cold calls to a curated list of 100 premium dental clinics.



Reach out to Practice Managers and introduce our $699 Lifetime Offer (Exclusive Launch Deal).



Handle basic objections and book qualified discovery meetings or send our 2-minute demo video.



Requirements:



Perfect Neutral or UK Accent (Must be clear and professional).



Proven experience in B2B Cold Calling (Medical or Dental niche is a huge plus).



Ability to bypass gatekeepers and reach decision-makers.



Quiet workspace and reliable high-speed internet.



Compensation:



Competitive Base Pay per 100 calls + High Commission ($100+) per closed deal.



This is a Part-time / Project-based role with potential for long-term growth as we scale.



How to Apply:



Send a brief summary of your experience.



IMPORTANT: Attach a 30-60 second voice recording introducing yourself as if you were calling a clinic.

title: Social Media & Graphic Design Manager (Supermarket Brand) – Full Marketing Ownership
description:
Social Media & Graphic Design Manager (Supermarket Brand) – Full Marketing Ownership



We are a growing family-owned supermarket company in Montreal, Canada, with multiple locations and a rapidly expanding online business.



We are looking for an experienced Social Media & Graphic Design Manager to take full ownership of our social media presence and marketing content. The candidate needs to speak French and English.



This is not a simple posting job.

We want someone who can plan, design, organize, and execute our social media strategy from A to Z.



You will work directly with the owner and be responsible for building and managing the brand’s online presence across multiple stores.



Responsibilities



You will be responsible for everything related to social media and digital content, including:



Social Media Strategy



• Develop and execute a full social media strategy

• Plan weekly and monthly content calendars

• Identify opportunities for growth and engagement

• Analyze performance and improve results



Content Creation



• Create high-quality posts, stories, and reels

• Film and edit engaging short-form video content

• Design visually appealing content that reflects our brand

• Capture promotions, products, and in-store 
nts



Graphic Design



• Design professional marketing materials including:



Weekly supermarket flyers



Social media graphics



In-store promotional signage



Digital ads

• Redesign and modernize our supermarket flyer

• Ensure brand consistency across all materials



?? Important: We are looking for someone with advanced graphic design skills, not basic Canva work.



Preferred tools:

• Adobe Photoshop

• Adobe Illustrator

• Adobe InDesign

• Advanced video editing tools



Social Media Management



• Manage Instagram,
, and other platforms

• Schedule and publish posts

• Organize all media and content libraries

• Maintain a consistent posting schedule



Bilingual Content



Our business operates in French and English, so you must be able to:



• Write posts in English and French

• Translate or adapt content between both languages

• Ensure messaging works naturally in both languages



What We Are Looking For



We are looking for someone who is:



• Highly organized and proactive

• Comfortable taking ownership and making suggestions

• Experienced with retail or food-related brands

• Able to manage multiple store locations

• Creative but also structured and professional



You should be able to say:



“Here is the marketing plan, here is the content calendar, and here is what we should be posting.”



Not wait for instructions for every post.



Required Experience



Please apply only if you have experience in most of the following:



• Social media strategy and management

• Professional graphic design

• Instagram reels and video editing

• Content planning and scheduling

• Branding and marketing design

• Bilingual English / French writing



Nice to Have



• Experience working with retail or supermarkets

• Experience designing weekly flyers or promotional ads

• Experience managing multiple business locations

• Experience with Shopify or e-commerce marketing



To Apply



Please include:



Links to social media accounts you currently manage



A portfolio of graphic design work



Examples of reels or video content you created



Your monthly salary expectation



Your favorite grocery store brand and why



Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.



Position Details



Location: Remote

Hours: Gig, part-time or full-time

Salary: Based on experience



If you are someone who enjoys building a brand, creating beautiful content, and growing a business, we would love to hear from you.

title: Healthcare Staffing Recruiter
description:
Job Description:



We are looking for a motivated Healthcare Staffing Recruiter to join our medical staffing company. The Recruiter will be responsible for sourcing, screening, and hiring qualified healthcare professionals to meet client needs. This role requires strong communication, relationship-building skills, and the ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment. 



Key Responsibilities:



Source and recruit qualified healthcare professionals through job boards, databases, referrals, and networking.

Conduct interviews, screen candidates, and verify qualifications.

Manage the hiring process from application to placement.

Build and maintain relationships with candidates and clients.

Collaborate with compliance and scheduling teams to ensure smooth onboarding.

Meet staffing goals and maintain a strong pipeline of healthcare talent.

 

Required Skills and Qualifications:



Previous recruiting experience; healthcare staffing experience strongly preferred.

Must be familiar with VMS, ATS softwares

Excellent communication, interpersonal, and negotiation skills.

Proficiency with applicant tracking systems, recruiting platforms, and Microsoft Office Suite.

Ability to work in a target-driven, deadline-oriented environment.

title: Expert AI Video Creator & TikTok Strategist (BookTok/Affiliate Style)
description:
I am a romance author looking for an AI video expert to help me dominate "BookTok" and other social platforms. I need someone who understands viral hook psychology and can create high-impact, faceless videos featuring book characters and atmospheric vibes.







What you’ll do:





* AI Video Production: Use tools like Nano Banana, Freepik, and Capcut to create cinematic, affiliate-style videos that stop the scroll.





* Creative Freedom: You will post across different accounts, analyze the data, and teach me what is trending so we can pivot our strategy based on what works.





* Viral Psychology: You understand how to hook a viewer in the first 3 seconds and keep them watching.





* Data-Driven: We will look at the numbers together and use those insights to create even more viral content.







Requirement: You must be an expert in AI video creation tools and understand the "BookTok" aesthetic.







To show me you have read this entire post, please start your application by answering this question in exactly one word: What is your favorite AI tool?

title: Professional Fiction & Continuity Editor (Spicy Romance)
description:
I am a writer of spicy romance novels, and I am looking for a professional editor to help me polish my drafts. These are fun, fast-paced stories (3-hour reads), and I need someone with a professional background in editing books or papers to ensure they are publishing-ready.







What you’ll do:





* Provide a professional first-pass edit focusing on story flow, plot holes, and continuity.





* Manage feedback from my team of beta readers, d
 which suggestions to incorporate and thanking them for their help.





* You have the creative freedom to suggest additions or tweaks that make the story even more captivating for readers.





* I will personally train you on how to use AI tools to make the editing process faster and more enjoyable.







Requirement: You must love reading romance and have previous experience in professional editing.







To show me you have read this entire post, please start your application by answering this question in exactly one word: What is your favorite romance trope?

title: Video Content Creator & Editor
description:
Viaduct Generations is a purpose-driven AI search optimisation agency based in Shoreditch, London. We help B2B firms get found in Google, ChatGPT, Perplexity, and AI-powered search. We’re a small, fast-moving team that punches well above its weight.



We’re relaunching a podcast (The Wise Build Bridges) and video content programme targeting senior decision-makers in the UK professional services sector. This isn’t a generic content play — it’s a core part of our sales engine. Every episode is designed to open doors with prospective clients, build the founder’s personal brand, and position Viaduct Generations as the authority on AI search visibility.

We need someone who can turn raw Riverside recordings into polished long-form episodes and attention-grabbing short-form clips that perform on LinkedIn, YouTube shorts, Tiktok and Instagram. You’ll be the person who makes our content look and feel like it belongs alongside the best B2B media brands — not like a scrappy agency side project.



What You’ll Do

Podcast Production (Primary)

Edit weekly podcast episodes recorded in Riverside — audio cleanup, video editing, transitions, lower thirds, intro/outro, and colour grading.

Produce the final long-form episode for YouTube and audio platforms (Spotify, Apple Podcasts).

Create 5–10 short-form clips per episode (60–90 seconds each), optimised for LinkedIn, YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, and TikTok.

Design and produce eye-catching thumbnails for YouTube and social platforms.

Manage the full post-production workflow — from raw recording to published assets — with minimal oversight.

Short-Form Content Creation

Create scroll-stopping clips with dynamic captions, motion graphics, and visual hooks that drive engagement — not just cuts of talking heads.

Stay current with platform trends, formats, and editing styles across LinkedIn, YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok.

Test and iterate on content formats based on performance data — what’s getting views, watch time, and engagement.

Growth Path (3–6 Months)

Take on additional content creation responsibilities: LinkedIn carousels, static graphics, and promotional assets.

Support the development and execution of paid social campaigns (Meta Ads, LinkedIn Ads) — creating ad creative and assisting with copy.

Contribute to founder marketing content — helping shape the visual identity of the founder’s personal brand across platforms.

Eventually manage content calendars and coordinate publishing schedules across all channels.

What We’re Looking For



Must-Haves

Proven experience editing podcast or interview-format video content. Riverside experience is a strong advantage.

Strong portfolio of short-form video content (Reels, Shorts, TikToks) that demonstrates creative flair — not just basic cuts.

Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve. Familiarity with After Effects or CapCut for motion graphics.

Excellent audio editing skills — noise removal, levelling, EQ, and mastering for podcast-quality output.

Fast turnaround without sacrificing quality. We’re a small team and speed matters.

Ability to work UK timezone hours (approximately 3pm–12am Manila time).

Strong written and spoken English — you’ll need to understand B2B content nuance and suggest captions or copy.

When sending your application, please include the word “pineapple” so we know your attention to detail is great.

Nice-to-Haves

Experience creating content for B2B or professional services audiences (not just lifestyle or entertainment).

Familiarity with Canva, Figma, or similar design tools for thumbnails and social graphics.

Experience with social media scheduling tools (Buffer, Later, or similar).

Basic understanding of paid social (Meta Ads Manager, LinkedIn Campaign Manager) — or willingness to learn.

Interest in AI, technology, or digital marketing.



How to Apply

Send us the following:

Your portfolio or showreel — specifically showing podcast/interview editing AND short-form content. If you don’t have podcast work, send your best long-form video edit.

Links to 2–3 short-form clips you’re most proud of, with a sentence on why each one works.

A brief note (3–4 sentences) on why this role interests you and what you’d bring to it. 

Your availability to start.

We review applications within 48 hours. If there’s a fit, we’ll move fast.





About Viaduct Generation

Viaduct Generations is a Better Business Network member. We donate a % of our profits to charity and actively amplify businesses led by underrepresented groups. We believe in embedded collaboration, not distant supplier relationships. If you want to do meaningful work with a team that genuinely cares about impact, you’ll fit in here.

title: AI Video Creator (HeyGen) – Create 5 Short Videos Daily Promoting Books
description:
I run an Amazon publishing business and I am looking for a long-term virtual assistant who can create short AI avatar videos using HeyGen to promote my books.



Your job will be to turn simple scripts and book images into short vertical videos using HeyGen. These videos will be used on TikTok, Instagram Reels, and other short-form platforms to promote the books.



This role requires someone who can work efficiently and produce videos in bulk (5 videos per day).



Responsibilities:



Create 5 short videos per day using HeyGen



Turn scripts I provide into 15–30 second avatar videos



Use book images or interior pages when needed



Export videos in vertical format (9:16) for social media



Occasionally test different avatars, hooks, or styles



Organize and upload completed videos to a shared folder



Requirements:



Experience using HeyGen or similar AI video tools



Basic video editing skills



Ability to follow instructions carefully



Reliable internet and communication



Ability to produce videos consistently every day



Nice to Have:



Experience creating TikTok / Instagram Reels



Experience with AI content tools



Understanding of social media hooks or short-form video style



Work Details:



5 videos per day



Scripts and book images will be provided



Long-term work if results are good



To Apply:

Please send:



Examples of HeyGen or AI avatar videos you have created



Your monthly salary expectation



Confirmation that you can create 5 videos per day consistently

title: WFM - Workforce Management Capacity
description:
Looking for an experienced Workforce Management (WFM) Analyst to help create a capacity plan for an operations project. This is a project-based role focused on analyzing workload, productivity metrics, and staffing requirements.



Responsibilities:

Analyze historical workload and productivity data

Create a capacity planning model based on forecasted demand

Translate workload into staffing and headcount requirements

Provide recommendations for optimal staffing and utilization

Deliver the final capacity plan using Excel or Google Sheets



Requirements:

Experience in Workforce Management / Capacity Planning

Strong Excel or Google Sheets skills

Understanding of forecasting, staffing models, TPH, AHT, utilization

Ability to work independently and deliver results



Job Type: Project-Based / Short-Term

Preferred: Candidates with WFM experience in BPO, customer support, or operations teams

title: Fractional CFO / Finance Manager (QuickBooks + Financial Dashboards + Forecasting)
description:
We are looking for an experienced Fractional CFO / Finance Manager / Accountant to help organize and systemize the financial infrastructure of a growing AI and marketing technology company.



The primary goal of this role is to bring complete clarity to our financial operations by cleaning up our books, building financial dashboards, and helping leadership understand our numbers at a deep level.



This role is ideal for someone who has experience working with startups or fast-growing businesses and can operate both strategically and operationally.



Responsibilities include:



• Clean up and organize historical financial data in QuickBooks

• Reconcile accounts and ensure accurate bookkeeping

• Build clear financial dashboards for revenue, expenses, and profit

• Track cash flow, burn rate, and financial health of the company

• Create financial projections and forecasting models

• Prepare monthly financial reports and executive summaries

• Help structure categories and financial systems for tax preparation

• Identify inefficiencies or financial leaks in the business

• Work with leadership to build a scalable financial framework as the company grows



We are looking for someone who is extremely organized, detail-oriented, and capable of translating financial data into clear insights that leadership can act on.



Experience working with startups, agencies, SaaS companies, or fast-growing businesses is strongly preferred.

title: Creative Assistant
description:
About the Role

We are seeking a versatile Creative Assistant to support our Custom Learning and broader creative initiatives.

While PowerPoint design will be a core responsibility, this role extends beyond presentations. You will contribute across multiple formats including learning materials, digital assets, web-related visuals, and branded content.

This is a functional, systems-oriented design role — not a trend-driven marketing position. We prioritize clarity, structure, usability, and brand consistency.

You will work closely with the Manager of Brand + Design as well our Learning & Development team of instructional designers, acting as a reliable extension of the team.



Key Responsibilities

Custom Learning & Presentation Design

• Build advanced PowerPoint templates and slide systems

• Design structured learning materials and course assets

• Translate written content into clear, visually organized layouts

• Ensure materials are scalable and easy for non-designers to edit

• Maintain strict brand consistency



Digital & Creative Production

• Design assets such as: 

 • Prepare files for delivery across digital platforms

 • Resize, version, and adapt creative across formats

 • Maintain organized files and clean layer structures



Creative QA & Review Support

• Review creative output (web, video, motion, learning modules)

• Provide detailed feedback on alignment, spacing, typography, layout, and brand consistency

• Identify small inconsistencies or errors others may overlook



Qualifications

Required Qualifications

• Advanced PowerPoint expertise (template systems, master slides, structured layouts)

• Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign)

• Strong understanding of layout, hierarchy, and typography

• Experience designing within brand guidelines

• Experience working with corporate or L&D teams

• Exceptional attention to detail

• Ability to execute independently with minimal oversight

• A supporting design portfolio



Adaptability

• Comfortable learning and using new tools and platforms as needed

• Quick to adopt new workflows, software, or internal systems

• Open to evolving processes and continuous improvement



Communication

• Fluent, professional English (written and verbal)

• Strong written communication skills

• Ability to understand project context quickly without extensive explanation

• Comfortable working asynchronously



Preferred Qualifications

• Experience working across multiple platforms and quickly adjusting to new client environments

• Experience with instructional design or eLearning environments

• Familiarity with Articulate Storyline, 360Learning, or similar tools

• Figma proficiency

• Basic understanding of UX/UI principles

• Experience working with U.S.-based teams



What We Value

• Structured thinker

• Process-oriented

• Reliable and responsive

• Low ego, high ownership. Takes feedback well. Collaborative.

• Design maturity over trend-driven aesthetics

• Comfortable with both creative work and production-heavy tasks

title: Shopify/Gempages Long Form Sales Page/Product Page Builder
description:
Company: Project #1 Nutrition

Website: 

Primary Product (Phase 1): P1-TEST (Testosterone Support Supplement) - 



Overview



We’re a sports nutrition brand looking for a skilled Shopify/GemPages builder to create a high-converting, long-form sales landing page for our product P1-TEST. This page will be used for cold traffic from Instagram/Facebook ads and must feel like a premium gym/sports nutrition brand (not clinical).



If this project goes well, we have additional products and pages we’ll want you to build.



What you will build (Phase 1)



A long-form sales landing page in GemPages (Shopify) that includes:

 • Strong above-the-fold hero with offer + CTAs

 • Pain-point/problem section aligned to ad creatives (e.g., low energy, brain fog, low motivation, performance)

 • Clear benefit sections (compliant supplement language)

 • Patented ingredient section (KSM-66®, PrimaVie®, Cellflo6®, BioPerine®)

 • Supplement Facts / label section (image + layout)

 • “How to take” section

 • Reviews/testimonials section (we will provide assets)

 • FAQ section (including “Skip/Cancel Anytime” subscription language)

 • Repeated CTAs + sticky mobile CTA bar

 • Purchase module wired to Shopify product + subscription option



Offer details

 • One-time price: $99.95

 • Subscription price: $59.97

 • Subscription terms: Skip/Cancel anytime (no formal guarantee)



Required skills

 • Proven Shopify landing page experience

 • Strong GemPages (v7 preferred) build skills

 • Experience wiring product pages to Shopify checkout (ATC/Buy Now)

 • Comfortable implementing subscription purchase options (Shopify Subscriptions or 3rd-party; we will confirm which)

 • Basic CRO understanding: above-the-fold, CTA placement, mobile-first layout, page speed

 • Ability to follow brand vibe: gym/sports nutrition, premium, modern

 • Good English copy formatting (we’ll provide copy direction; you polish + implement cleanly)



Compliance (must follow)



This is a dietary supplement. You must avoid medical claims, diagnosis language, or “treat/cure” wording. You must include the standard FDA disclaimer on the page. If you have experience building compliant supplement pages, mention it. Please put the words yellow elephant in the subject line of your message or your application will not be considered. 



Deliverables

 1. A complete GemPages landing page draft in our Shopify store

 2. Mobile + desktop optimized layouts

 3. All sections built with reusable blocks/styles (so we can duplicate for other products)

 4. Basic on-page tracking readiness (UTM-friendly; optional: Meta Pixel/GA events if you have experience)

 5. A short handoff document or Loom video explaining:

 • what you built

 • where to edit text/images

 • how to duplicate the page for another product



What we provide

 • Product images (new label), supplement facts, brand assets

 • Examples of competitor page structures we like (for layout inspiration only)



Time & pay

 • Initial project: 1 landing page

 • Ongoing work available if the first page performs well



To apply (IMPORTANT)



Reply with:

 1. 2–5 examples of Shopify/GemPages landing pages you built (links + what you did)

 2. Your fixed price for 1 long-form landing page (and what’s included)

 3. What subscription tools you’ve worked with (Recharge, Skio, Appstle, Shopify Subscriptions, etc.)

 4. Confirm you can build mobile-first and keep it fast

 5. A brief note on how you approach supplement claim compliance



Bonus: If you can also create/optimize ad-to-page message match and build A/B variations, mention it.

title: Guest Support for Short Term Rental Company
description:
ROLE OVERVIEW

We are seeking a Guest Support & Operations Analyst to manage overnight guest communications and support key backend operations. This role combines guest relations, reservation management, and administrative tasks to ensure seamless service and operational accuracy.



IMPORTANT NOTE ABOUT THIS ROLE

- This is NOT a generic support role.

- You’ll be juggling guests, cleaners, and maintenance teams in real time — often with imperfect information and real consequences if poor decisions are made. Because of that, our hiring process is intentionally more challenging than a typical “message responder” position.

- The assessment you’re about to take is designed to understand how you think — how you prioritize, communicate, and make judgment calls when there isn’t one obvious right answer.

- If you enjoy solving realistic scenarios, thinking critically, and taking ownership, you will likely enjoy both this assessment and the job itself. If you are looking for a simple, scripted support role, this probably won’t be the right fit — and that’s okay.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Guest Communications & Support

- Respond promptly and professionally to booking inquiries, guest messages, and support requests across multiple platforms.

- Provide phone support to address urgent guest needs and ensure timely issue resolution.

- Collaborate with the operations team to facilitate smooth check-ins, check-outs, and overall guest satisfaction.



Operational & Administrative Support

- Perform booking cleanup, ensuring reservations are accurate and conflicts are resolved.

- Conduct guest cleanup by maintaining accurate records and organizing guest profiles.

- Manage listing accuracy and resolve platform-related issues across Airbnb, 
, Expedia, etc.

- Support accounting functions, including expense tracking, invoice updates, and discrepancy reporting.

- Assist in lead management, including organizing, qualifying, and supporting follow-up efforts for potential property acquisition opportunities.



Qualifications

- Experience with short-term rental platforms (Airbnb, 
, Vrbo, etc.).

- Strong communication skills and professional phone etiquette.

- Detail-oriented with strong organizational abilities.

-Tech-savvy and able to work independently during overnight shifts.

- PREFERRED: Experience with PriceLabs, Beds24, accounting tasks, or lead management.



HOW TO APPLY

Upload your resume here >>> 
/s/5sal0p7n

title: Medical Virtual Assistant
description:

If you are a Pharmacist, RN, Med Tech, or Billing Specialist looking to transition your expertise into a dynamic virtual environment, we want to hear from you.



The Role

This isn’t your average administrative job. You will be the backbone of our clinical operations, ensuring our team has exactly what they need to provide top-tier patient care. Your responsibilities will bridge the gap between clinical knowledge and operational excellence.





Who You Are

We are looking for a specific caliber of professional. You don't just "do the job"—you master it.



Qualified: You hold experience as a Pharmacist, Registered Nurse (RN), Medical Technician, or Certified Billing Specialist.



A High Achiever: You have a track record of excellence and take pride in the quality of your work.



Independently Driven: You love the freedom of a virtual role and have the discipline to stay productive without a manager looking over your shoulder.



Detail-Obsessed: You follow complex protocols to the letter. In a clinical setting, "close enough" isn't an option.



Tech-Savvy: You are comfortable navigating EHRs, secure messaging platforms, google drive. 



Why Join Us?

100% Remote: Work from your ideal home office setup.

Collaborative Culture: You’ll be working with a team that values your expertise and relies on your input.



How to Apply
