title: Creator Outreach Specialist
description:
Recovery Labs is a fast-growing DTC brand producing premium magnesium recovery soaks designed for athletes, active adults, and anyone dealing with muscle soreness, pain, or inflammation. Our products are trusted by professional teams including the Orlando Magic and Chicago White Sox, along with major universities like Baylor. Our mission is to help people feel their best, fast — whether it's someone getting older and experiencing pain or an athlete trying to perform at the highest level. With nearly 87% of our customers discovering us through social media, creator-driven content is at the heart of how we grow.



Job Description:



We are seeking a driven, detail-oriented TikTok Shop & Creator Outreach Specialist to join our team in a full-time remote role. This individual will be responsible for launching and managing our TikTok Shop affiliate program from the ground up while simultaneously running daily creator outreach across TikTok and Instagram. The ideal candidate has hands-on experience with TikTok Shop's affiliate ecosystem, knows how to write outreach messages that actually get responses, and understands the fitness & wellness creator landscape. You will be the engine behind building our creator network — finding the right people, getting our product in their hands, and turning organic posts into long-term affiliate partnerships.



Qualifications:



- At least 1–3 years of experience in influencer/creator outreach, affiliate management, or social media marketing for a DTC or ecommerce brand.

- Working knowledge of TikTok (trends, culture, how content performs) and Instagram.

- Experience writing cold outreach messages (DMs or
s) at volume with personalization — not copy-paste templates.

- Strong written English that reads naturally and conversationally (not just grammatically correct).

- Spreadsheet proficiency (Google Sheets or Excel) for pipeline tracking and reporting.

- Experience with TikTok Shop Seller Center or TikTok Shop's affiliate marketplace is highly advantageous.

- Familiarity with influencer/affiliate CRM tools (Superfiliate, SARAL, Grin, or similar) is a plus.

- Experience with a health, wellness, fitness, or supplement brand is a plus.

- Fluency in English is required.



Key Competencies:



- Strong outreach and relationship-building skills, with the ability to start conversations with creators and convert them into long-term partners.

- Exceptional attention to detail in pipeline management — tracking every creator at every stage from first contact to content posted to affiliate onboarded.

- Experience managing a high-volume daily workflow independently, without constant oversight or direction.

- Ability to adjust messaging and approach for different creator audiences (a gym creator needs a different DM than a chronic pain content creator).

- Problem-solving mindset — if response rates drop, you diagnose why and fix it rather than waiting to be told.

- A genuine understanding of and interest in TikTok and Instagram content trends, especially in fitness, wellness, and recovery niches.

- Comfort with tools and systems — you can learn new platforms quickly and aren't intimidated by TikTok Seller Center, Shopify, or affiliate management dashboards.

- A desire to grow with the brand. This role has a clear path to becoming a Creator Partnerships Manager as the program scales.



Overview:



As Recovery Labs' TikTok Shop & Creator Outreach Specialist, you are the person who builds our entire creator engine. Your work directly impacts how many creators are talking about our products, how much content is being generated, and how much revenue flows through our TikTok Shop and affiliate programs. You will own the full pipeline — from identifying creators, to reaching out, to getting product in their hands, to following up, to onboarding them as affiliates, to nurturing top performers into deeper partnerships. Given the remote nature of this role, we value independence, consistent communication, and the ability to manage your own day without hand-holding.



Roles and Responsibilities:



- Daily Creator Outreach: Identify, vet, and reach out to creators on TikTok and Instagram who align with our brand. Target niches include fitness/gym creators, CrossFit athletes, runners and endurance athletes, chronic pain and sciatica communities, physical therapists creating content, recovery and mobility creators, and self-care/bath routine creators. At full ramp, you will be sending 50–80 personalized Instagram DMs, 20–40 TikTok touches, and 50–100
s per day.

- Free Sample Seeding: Manage the full pipeline from outreach to sample request — collect shipping information, coordinate with our fulfillment team, follow up post-delivery (Day 2, Day 7, Day 14), and convert creators who post organically into long-term affiliates. You are responsible for minimizing ghosting through smart follow-up sequences.

- Affiliate Recruitment & Management: Onboard creators into our TikTok Shop affiliate program and our Refunnel Affiliate Program. Track affiliate performance, manage commission tiers, and identify top performers who should receive higher commissions or deeper partnership opportunities.

- Pipeline Tracking & Reporting: Maintain a detailed tracking spreadsheet or CRM capturing every creator at each stage (identified ? contacted ? responded ? sample sent ? content posted ? affiliate onboarded ? revenue generated). Provide weekly reports on all core KPIs including outreach volume, response rates, samples shipped, content posted, and affiliate GMV.

- **Content Flagging:** Monitor creator content and flag high-performing posts to our paid ads team for amplification via TikTok Spark Ads or Meta Partnership Ads. Share product talking points and key messaging guidelines with creators without being overly prescriptive — we want authentic content, not scripted ads.

- Collaboration: Communicate regularly with the marketing lead via Slack and weekly video calls. Proactively surface insights about what's working, what creators are saying about the product, and what angles are resonating in the market.

- AI Uptake: Utilizing and working with AI to automate and expedite results, outreach and communication with creators. Ingenuity will be rewarded with a generous bonus structure.



Working Hours:



- This position offers flexible working hours to accommodate the difference in time zones between Eastern Standard Time (New York, USA) and your time zone. We expect at least 2–3 hours of overlap with U.S. Eastern business hours (9 AM – 6 PM ET) for communication and collaborative sessions, but will work together to establish a schedule that works for both sides. Many of the core outreach tasks (DMs,
s, creator research) can be done async.



Expectations:



- Maintain open and consistent communication with your direct report via Slack.

- Hit daily outreach volume targets once fully ramped (by end of Month 2).

- Deliver weekly KPI reports every Monday covering the prior week's activity and results.

- Be proactive in addressing challenges — if response rates drop or creators go dark, you flag it and propose solutions rather than waiting to be asked.

- Follow our product messaging guidelines accurately. We position our products as "part of the solution" for recovery — we never make medical claims or over-promise results.



Tools and Software:



- TikTok Seller Center (you'll be trained if needed)

- Refunnel (our creator partnership platform — already in use)

- Shopify (basic navigation for order/product reference)

- Google Sheets or Airtable for pipeline tracking

- Slack for communication

- Loom for async updates and walkthroughs

- Familiarity with Kalodata or FastMoss (TikTok Shop analytics) is a plus

- Familiarity with SARAL or Instantly 
 outreach tools) is a plus



Compensation:



The Creator Outreach Specialist role is a high-impact position with the opportunity to build an entirely new revenue channel for Recovery Labs. Recognizing the importance of this role, we offer competitive compensation for a full-time remote position:



- Base Compensation: Compensation will be based on your location and competitive salary for this role in your location.

- Performance Bonuses: Monthly bonuses of $150–$800/month based on creators onboarded, content pieces generated, and affiliate GMV produced.



Expectations and Growth:



This role is a full-time position with the expectation that we will provide you with the resources, product knowledge, and support to succeed. During your first 30 days, you will complete a structured onboarding focused on learning our brand, products, customer avatars, and starting outreach. By Month 2, you'll be at full outreach volume. By Month 3, you should be managing a pipeline of 100+ creators and producing consistent weekly content output from your network.



The growth path is clear: as the creator program scales and generates meaningful revenue, this role evolves into a Creator Partnerships Manager position with increased compensation, potential team oversight (hiring and managing additional outreach VAs), and deeper strategic involvement in Recovery Labs' content and growth strategy.



We believe this structure will motivate our Outreach Specialist to continuously build and nurture a creator network that not only generates content but significantly contributes to Recovery Labs' growth with creator partnerships.



To Apply:



To apply for this role, you will need to fill out 
 that includes questions about your experience, social media knowledge, and outreach ability. You will be asked to put together 10 example creators that you would reach out to, creating a basic spreadsheet on how you would be tracking the outreach. Top candidates will then receive a short paid task where you'll walk us through your exact process for launching creator outreach for Recovery Labs in your first 2 weeks. Once we review your work, we will set up an interview with the top 2–3 qualified candidates and then if you meet our standards we would make a job offer.

title: Transportation Tracker
description:
AJG Transport is expanding its route operations division and seeking a reliable, detail-oriented professional to help support and streamline our daily duties. We are looking for a Transportation Tracker to support real time fleet movement, manage load data accuracy, and ensure smooth coordination between drivers, customers, and internal teams. This role is ideal for someone highly organized, proactive, and comfortable operating in a fast paced logistics environment where precision matters



Role Overview

As an Transportation Tracker, you will serve as a real time control point within route operations. Your responsibility is to ensure loads are properly assigned, tracked, updated, and documented while maintaining consistent communication across drivers, brokers, and customers. You will operate within structured SOPs while making fast, sound operational decisions when challenges arise.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Assign and dispatch loads based on driver availability, Hours of Service, and customer requirements

• Monitor live fleet movement using GPS and TMS

• Track and update ETAs, check calls, timestamps, and delivery milestones in real time

• Enter, audit, and maintain accurate load data in Google Sheets and TMS

• Communicate continuously with drivers, brokers, and customers regarding status updates

• Identify delays, route conflicts, detention risks, or service issues and take proactive action

• Escalate operational risks to leadership when necessary

• Generate shift based operational reports summarizing load activity and exceptions

• Follow dispatch, communication, and escalation SOPs consistently

• Maintain clean shift handoffs and organized documentation



What Success Looks Like

• TMS, Google Sheets, and tracking platforms reflect complete and error free data at all times

• Scheduled updates are sent on time

• Critical loads are monitored closely and handled with urgency from start to finish

• Communication is clear, concise, and actionable, both in written updates and verbal escalations

• Operational risks and issues are flagged early with solutions, not just problems

• Shift handoffs are smooth, complete, and well documented

• You become someone the team can depend on during high pressure situations



Who We’re Looking For

• Has experience in logistics, freight brokerage, dispatch, or transportation tracking

• Understanding of fleet coordination, load planning, and HOS awareness

• Familiar with US geography and US logistics trucking operations (a plus)

• Ability to monitor multiple loads and drivers simultaneously

• Understands urgency and prioritization in a live dispatch environment

• Communicates clearly and professionally via zoom, chat, and

• Minimum 45 WPM typing speed

• Can monitor multiple loads at once without losing accuracy

• Pays strong attention to detail and uses sound judgment when issues arise

• Comfortable operating in high volume communication environments

• Follows instructions consistently and values clean execution

• Works well with a team and is open to feedback and coaching. Collaborates without resistance or ego



Why Join AJG Transport?

• Permanent remote opportunity

• Structured systems and clear expectations

• Hands on leadership and direct feedback

• Defined KPIs and measurable growth

• Opportunity to grow within a scaling freight brokerage

• Performance recognition and advancement potential



Schedule & Work Setup

• Full Time Remote Role| Direct Hire to US Company

• Tuesday - Saturday 7 AM - 5 PM CST (San Antonio time)

• Wednesday - Sunday 8 PM - 5 AM CST (San Antonio time)

• Zoom presence (with camera open and unmuted audio) required

• Time tracking software used for accountability and performance support

• Shifts may adjust based on operational demand



If you thrive in fast moving transportation operations, understand the importance of real time coordination, and can execute with precision under pressure, we want to hear from you.

title: Graduate School Admissions & Relocation Help - Baguio-Based
description:
**Looking for Baguio-Based Assistant — Graduate School Admissions & Relocation Help**



I'm an American planning to relocate to Baguio City and enroll in a graduate humanities program at one of the universities there. I'm looking for someone — ideally based in Baguio or with direct familiarity with its universities — to help me navigate the admissions process and related paperwork over the next several months.



**What I need help with:**

- Researching graduate admissions requirements for international students across Baguio's universities (humanities/philosophy programs)

- Building a clear checklist of required documents and deadlines

- Advising on the Philippine student visa (9F) documentation process

- Guidance on US document authentication requirements (notarization, apostille)

- Occasional follow-up with university offices on my behalf if needed

- General practical advice on relocating to Baguio as a foreigner



**Ideal candidate:**

- Based in Baguio or has direct experience with its universities

- Familiar with Philippine university admissions bureaucracy

- Proactive communicator — I'd rather hear too much than too little

- Some academic background is a plus but not required

- Honest about what they know and don't know



**What this is not:**

I'm not looking for a general virtual assistant pulling information from Google. I need someone with on-the-ground knowledge of how things actually work at Baguio's universities and in the city generally.



Timeline is approximately 9 months out. Initial engagement would be research and checklist building, with ongoing support as the process develops. Please include a brief note on your familiarity with Baguio and its universities specifically when applying.

title: Virtual Assistant (VA) – Administrative & Marketing Support
description:

Key Responsibilities:



• Manage
s and correspondence efficiently.

title: Video Editor
description:
IMPORTANT This is a premium post for experienced editors with intermediate/expert knowledge of AI generation for advertisements. AI is evolving everyday so we need someone who’s CONSTANTLY learning. Please read the post in its entirety, only top tier applicants will be considered.



Senior Video Editor – AI-Powered Ad Creative

Remote | Long-Term Contract | $10–$20/video (2–5 min)

Read this fully before applying. We only move forward with people who are genuinely exceptional at what they do.



About Us

We're a fast-growing direct response e-commerce holding company generating $1M+/month across multiple in-house supplement brands — all built from scratch. We're not dropshippers. These are long-term subscription brands we intend to scale indefinitely, which means consistent, ongoing work for the right person.



The Role

We're looking for a Senior Video Editor who specializes in AI-generated video content for performance advertising. This isn't traditional editing — you'll be generating realistic AI B-roll footage and cutting it into fast-paced direct response ads that actually convert.

We primarily work with tools like Sora 2, Veo 3, Kling, and Higgsfield, and we'll provide access to whatever you need. That said, we want someone who already knows these tools deeply and stays ahead of what's emerging.

You can view examples of the style and format we use here: ? View Creative Examples - 



What We're Looking For



Fluency in AI video generation — you should be able to produce high-quality, realistic B-roll from a prompt without hand-holding

Fast, punchy editing that matches the pacing of top-performing direct response ads

Someone who actively studies competitor creatives and top-performing ads in health/wellness

A "sharpen the sword" mentality — constantly improving, not coasting

High output capability when needed — this is volume-based work, not a 9-to-5 pace





What You'll Get



Competitive per-video pay: $10–$20/video with bonus potential based on performance

Long-term, stable workload — we're growing, not winding down

Access to $15,000+ in training resources including eComTalent, Advertorial Mastery, VSL Masterclass, and more

A real growth path — top performers will have the opportunity to move into a senior creative operations role





How to Apply



Share videos you've edited that feature AI-generated content

Share examples of AI B-roll or clips you've generated yourself

Let us know your availability (hours/days) and whether you're currently working other jobs



Strong applicants will be invited to complete a paid sample edit — compensation for the sample is included in your first paycheck.

title: Video Compliance Reviewer (Remote)
description:
Video Compliance Reviewer (Remote)



About Contracted AI

Contracted AI is a platform that sources specialized talent and deploys them for AI data projects. Our contributors record real-world videos that help train advanced AI systems used in robotics, video generation, and other technologies.



Job Overview

We are looking for someone to help double-check video submissions from our contributors. Our system already performs automatic checks, but we need a human reviewer to spot possible guideline violations that the system may miss.



Responsibilities:

- Review approved video submissions from contributors

- Check if videos follow project guidelines

- Identify suspicious submissions (e.g., videos taken from the internet or from other people)

- Flag videos that appear to violate project rules

- Report issues to the team



Requirements:

- Strong attention to detail

- Ability to recognize suspicious or non-original content

- Reliable internet connection

- Ability to review videos consistently



Work Setup:

Remote / Online





If you’re interested, please send a short introduction and any relevant experience.

title: Bookkeeper / Accounting Assistant
description:

• Record daily financial transactions, including income, expenses, and payments

• Reconcile bank and credit card statements

• Required: Strong proficiency in QuickBooks

How to Apply

title: Ninja Marketing Assistance For  Fast Growing Business
description:
About the Role



We're looking for a sharp, proactive Marketing Assistant to support the growth of Digital Brand Builders and our wider portfolio. You'll work directly alongside the founding team, helping execute across paid advertising, funnels, content, and marketing operations. This is a hands-on role — perfect for someone who wants to be in the engine room of a fast-moving digital business, not just scheduling posts.

We're at the cutting edge of AI adoption in how we run and grow our brands. We use AI tools daily across content, research, copywriting, and operations — and we expect this person to be the same way. If you're already experimenting with AI to work faster and smarter, you'll fit right in.



Key Responsibilities



Meta Ads & Paid Traffic



- Assist in setting up, monitoring, and reporting on Meta 
/Instagram) ad campaigns

- Pull performance data from Ads Manager and flag opportunities or issues

- Organise ad creative assets — copy, images, video — for testing cycles

- Help manage audiences, pixel events, and campaign structures



Funnel & Conversion Support



- Assist in building and updating landing pages and funnels (Kartra or similar)

- Monitor key funnel metrics: opt-in rates, cost per lead, conversion rates

- Coordinate funnel assets including forms, thank-you pages, and
 sequences

- Support A/B testing by documenting variants and collating results



Content & Marketing Operations



- Help schedule and publish content across social channels

- Assist in producing marketing materials: ad copy,
 drafts, lead magnets

- Maintain the marketing calendar and ensure deadlines are met

- Keep asset folders, trackers, and dashboards organised and up to date



AI-Assisted Workflows



- Use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, and others) to accelerate content creation, research, and reporting

- Help identify and implement AI-driven efficiencies across marketing tasks

- Stay curious about new AI tools and bring ideas for how we can apply them in the business



Reporting & Analysis



- Compile weekly performance reports across ads, funnels, and

- Maintain marketing dashboards (Google Sheets or similar)

- Flag what's working and what needs attention based on the data





What We're Looking For



Basic working knowledge of Meta Ads Manager (campaign setup, reading metrics)

Familiarity with funnel tools — Kartra, ClickFunnels, or equivalent

Comfortable using AI tools in day-to-day work (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) — we expect AI to be part of your workflow, not an afterthought

Strong attention to detail and ability to manage multiple tasks

A learner's mindset — eager to understand why things work, not just execute tasks

Good written communication skills

Experience with Google Sheets / basic spreadsheet skills





Nice to Have



Experience with
 marketing platforms (ActiveCampaign, Klaviyo, etc.)

Basic understanding of direct response copywriting

Exposure to e-commerce or high-ticket coaching businesses

Experience using AI for content creation, research, or workflow automation

Curiosity about emerging AI tools and how they can be applied to marketing — we're actively building AI into our systems and want someone who gets excited by that, not intimidated





What You'll Get



Direct mentorship from experienced digital entrepreneurs

Exposure to the full lifecycle of a digital marketing business

Fast-paced environment where your work has real, measurable impact

A front-row seat to how a modern, AI-first marketing operation is built

Opportunity to grow into a more senior marketing or operations role

title: Claude Code and AI Automation Expert
description:
About the Role

We're not looking for someone who's read about AI automation. We're looking for someone who's already building with it.

Digital Brand Builders is a fast-moving digital business operating across e-commerce, high-ticket coaching, and marketing. We've gone all-in on AI as an operational layer — and we're looking for an expert to help us build, automate, and scale using Claude Code and the broader AI tooling ecosystem.

This is a ground-floor opportunity to shape how an entrepreneurial organisation uses AI — not maintain legacy systems, but architect new ones.



What You'll Be Building

Claude Code & Agentic Workflows



Design and build agentic workflows using Claude Code for real business tasks — research, content, ops, outreach, and more

Connect Claude to our existing tools and data sources via MCP servers and APIs

Build multi-step AI pipelines that reduce manual work across the business



Automation & Integration



Automate repetitive marketing, sales, and operations tasks using AI-native tooling

Integrate AI workflows with our CRM (Close),
 platforms, funnel tools (Kartra), and Google Workspace

Build internal tools, dashboards, and scripts that make the team faster



AI Systems & Infrastructure



Maintain and improve our growing library of prompts, agents, and automations

Identify high-leverage opportunities where AI can replace or augment manual processes

Document systems so the wider team can use and build on them



Staying Ahead of the Curve



Monitor the latest developments in AI tooling — models, APIs, frameworks — and bring relevant innovations to the business

Test and evaluate new tools before they become mainstream

Be the person in the room who's already used the thing everyone else just heard about





What We're Looking For



Hands-on experience with Claude Code and the Anthropic API

Strong understanding of agentic AI systems, prompt engineering, and multi-step pipelines

Comfortable working with APIs, webhooks, and integration tools (Zapier, Make, or custom)

Ability to write clean, functional code — Python and/or JavaScript preferred

Experience with MCP servers or building custom Claude tool integrations is a strong plus

Self-directed — you don't need hand-holding, you need a problem and a deadline

Entrepreneurial mindset — you think in systems, not tasks





Nice to Have



Experience with other frontier AI tools — OpenAI, Gemini, Perplexity, Cursor, etc.

Background in marketing, e-commerce, or sales operations

Familiarity with CRMs, funnel builders, or
 automation platforms

Experience building internal tools or lightweight SaaS products

Active presence in AI communities — you're learning in public, sharing what you find





What You'll Get



Work directly with founders who are actively building at the frontier of AI adoption

Real creative and technical autonomy — we won't slow you down with committees

A business with genuine use cases across marketing, sales, ops, and e-commerce — plenty to build

Competitive compensation with room to grow as the role grows

The satisfaction of building things that actually get used





If your idea of a good day is shipping an AI workflow that saves the team hours every week — we want to hear from you.

title: AI Video Content Creator (TikTok Shop)
description:
AI Video Content Creator (TikTok Shop) – Remote



**Overview**



We are hiring a Virtual Assistant to produce AI-generated TikTok Shop product videos. The role focuses on creating short-form bottom-of-the-funnel (BOFU) content designed to drive product purchases through TikTok Shop.



The objective of this project is to test and scale high-converting product videos using AI tools while maintaining strict quality and platform compliance standards.



This position begins with a 30-day evaluation period. Strong performers may transition into a long-term or full-time role as production scales.



**Work Schedule**



Workdays: Monday – Friday

No work on weekends.



Daily production requirements will gradually increase over time. The required number of videos for each weekday will be listed in the Content Tracker. You are responsible for completing the assigned video count for each day.



**Payment Structure**



$0.75 per approved video

Payments are issued weekly (every Friday).



Only approved videos are paid.



A video may require revision if:



* Product label text is distorted or unreadable

* Video is under 15 seconds

* Spelling errors are present

* Product is not clearly visible

* Instructions were not followed

* Poor AI generation quality



If revisions are required, they must be corrected before approval.



**Required Tools**



The following tools will be used for production:



Veo 3 – AI video generation (account provided)

CapCut – Video editing and final export (account provided)

ElevenLabs – AI voice generation (used in later stages)



No additional video generation tools should be used unless approved.



**Video Requirements**



Each video must:



* Be 15–20 seconds minimum

* Clearly show the product

* Include readable product label text

* Include movement such as hand interaction, zoom, or camera shifts

* Look natural and not robotic

* Be exported in vertical 9:16 format for TikTok



Videos must focus on product visibility, benefit framing without exaggerated claims, and clear call-to-action.



Examples of acceptable call-to-action styles include:



Check the orange cart below

Limited stock available

Grab yours before it’s gone



The following must be avoided:



Medical claims

Unrealistic promises

Before-and-after transformations

Fake testimonials



**Creative Variation Requirements**



To prevent content suppression or account restrictions, videos must include variation. This may include changes in:



Opening hook

Camera angle

Background setting

Hand movement

Text overlay style



Videos must not be repetitive or identical.



**Production Workflow**



Daily workflow includes:



Review the Content Tracker

Follow the assigned product and format instructions

Generate the video in Veo 3

Edit the video in CapCut

Add subtitles if required

Export the final version

Upload the video to the designated Google Drive folder

Mark the task as Completed in the tracker



Files must be organized properly by date or number.



**Daily Feedback Process**



To maintain quality and improve performance, we will conduct daily feedback sessions.



Each workday we will either:



Have a short call (10–30 minutes)

or provide feedback through WhatsApp



During these sessions we may review:



Video quality

Product visibility

Hook effectiveness

Call-to-action clarity

Creative variation

Editing improvements



Feedback must be applied to future videos.



**Reference Style**



The videos you create should follow a style similar to the following TikTok accounts:



[
](
)

[
](
)

[
](
)



These accounts represent the visual style we aim to produce. Videos should use these as inspiration but must not copy them directly.



Key characteristics include:



Short product demonstrations

Hands interacting with the product

Clear product visibility

Simple backgrounds

Quick cuts and camera movement

Short text overlays

Clear call-to-action



**Production Scaling**



The long-term production goal is up to 28 videos per weekday.



Production volume will increase gradually as performance, workflow efficiency, and reliability improve.



The early phase focuses on:



Learning the workflow

Maintaining high quality standards

Testing creative variations

Building consistency



**Compliance and Account Safety**



All content must follow TikTok Shop policies and creator compliance rules.



Before starting work, applicants must read the TikTok Shop Creator Compliance guidelines:



[
](
)



If content created by the VA causes a platform violation, warning, or account restriction, the following process will apply:



The VA will be notified immediately.

Content production will be temporarily suspended while the issue is reviewed.

During the suspension period, the VA will not produce new videos until a solution or new account is prepared.



The suspension period may last at least one week.



Repeated violations, negligence, or failure to follow compliance guidelines may result in:



Extended suspension

Reduction in assigned work

Termination of the working relationship



These policies exist to protect the accounts and ensure long-term sustainability of the project.



**Evaluation Period**



This project begins with a 30-day evaluation period.



During this time we evaluate:



Content quality

Consistency

Reliability

Speed of execution

Overall performance



Strong performers may transition into a long-term role with increased production opportunities.



Future incentives may include:



Higher pay per video (up to $2 per video)

Commission from product sales generated by your videos

Performance bonuses for videos reaching high view counts ($100–$500)



**Device Requirement**



Applicants must use Apple devices.



Only applicants using MacBook, iPhone, or iPad devices will be considered.

Applicants using Windows computers, Android devices, or other non-Apple systems will be automatically disqualified.



**How to Apply**



Send the following information:



Full Name

City and Country

Device Used

Internet Speed

Daily Availability (hours)

Why you want this job

Experience (if any)

Languages spoken

Confirmation: "I can communicate daily via WhatsApp."

title: Airbnb Pricing Strategist | £5–£7/hour | UK Hours
description:
Hello. I am looking for a performance-driven Airbnb Pricing Strategist who actively improves revenue.



This role focuses on daily revenue execution: reviewing occupancy, ADR, and booking pace, identifying underperforming properties, and implementing structured pricing adjustments that move numbers. 



Details:

– £5–£7/hour (based on proven STR pricing performance)

– Full-time

– UK business hours

– Remote



What You’ll Do:

– Review occupancy, ADR, and booking pace daily/weekly; flag and fix underperforming properties

– Extract and compare data from PriceLabs and competitor listings; diagnose booking gaps

– Adjust pricing rules, overrides, minimum stays, LOS strategy, gap-filling logic, and seasonality pricing

– Analyse listing ranking and conversion; recommend improvements in titles, positioning, and structure

– Support structured reporting, KPI tracking, and performance dashboards (revenue work is a priority)



Good Fit If You:

– Think analytically and can clearly explain decisions using numbers

– Have strong Excel or Google Sheets skills

– Have experience working with marketplace or pricing data

– Understand short-term rental performance metrics (UK market knowledge preferred)

– Can show proven results improving occupancy, ADR, or revenue

– Work independently, identify issues proactively, and present findings clearly



Nice to Have: hands-on PriceLabs experience, experience managing UK-based STR portfolios, structured reporting background



To Apply:

Send a short message and include ORANGE in your title, along with the NUMBER OF YEARS you’ve worked in the short-term rental industry

title: Architectural Drafter
description:
PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DO NOT HAVE COMMERCIAL, MULTI FAMILY, AND CONCRETE BUILDING CONSTRUCTION EXPERIENCE IN THE UNITED STATES.  MUST HAVE REVIT EXPERIENCE.



Architectural Production

Revit / CAD | Commercial, Multi Family & Hospitality Projects

Boca Raton, Florida





Our client is an established architectural firm in Boca Raton, Florida.



The Opportunity- Architectural Production

We are seeking a detail-oriented Architectural Production tea
mber. In this role, you will play a critical part in translating design intent into accurate, coordinated, and code-compliant technical drawings for a variety of commercial, hospitality, and mixed-use projects. Working closely with architects and consultants, you will support projects from Design Development through Construction Documents, contributing to both 2D documentation and 3D BIM modeling.

This position is ideal for someone who thrives in a production-focused environment, takes pride in precision, and understands how strong documentation supports great architecture.



Key Responsibilities

• Analyze building specifications, zoning requirements, codes, and site conditions

• Produce accurate technical drawings from architects’ sketches, redlines, and digital models

• Utilize Revit and AutoCAD to create coordinated drawing sets incorporating:

-Dimensions, calculations, and construction details

-Applicable building codes and standards

• Assist with BIM model development, including 3D models and limited renderings

• Coordinate architectural drawings with structural, mechanical, electrical, and plumbing consultants

• Prepare drawing sets for internal review, permitting, and construction

• Participate in quality control and coordination reviews

• Stay current with evolving architectural technologies, standards, and best practices



Typical Deliverables

You will support the team with:

• Design Development (DD) Progress Sets

• Construction Document (CD) Sets

• Consultant coordination drawings

• Internal QA/QC reviews

• Permit and revision sets as required



Qualifications & Requirements

• Prior experience in architectural production or drafting (commercial experience preferred)

• Advanced proficiency in Revit and AutoCAD (Revit required)

• Strong understanding of building systems, construction methods, and codes

• Ability to apply fundamental company drawing standards to all drawing sets

• Excellent attention to detail and accuracy

• Strong organizational, time-management, and communication skills

title: Software Testing & QA Specialist
description:
Software Quality Assurance is a critical part of every software development process. As a QA Specialist, you will play a key role in ensuring our software products meet customer expectations, functional requirements, and quality standards.



We are looking for a detail-oriented QA professional who carefully tests features multiple times before marking them as complete.



Your main responsibility is to test our applications, identify bugs and issues, and help ensure the software is reliable, secure, and performs as expected.



Responsibilities



• Conduct manual quality assurance testing

• Perform rigorous test scenarios to ensure comprehensive validation

• Identify, document, and track bugs with clear and detailed reports

• Collaborate with developers to reproduce and resolve defects

• Provide regular updates on testing progress, risks, and QA challenges

• Ensure quality issues are resolved before product release



Requirements



• 2–4 years of experience in Quality Assurance or Software Testing

• Strong manual QA testing skills

• Excellent written and verbal English communication

• High attention to detail, accuracy, and consistency

• Ability to work independently and as part of a collaborative team



Preferred Skills & Technical Exposure



Experience or familiarity with the following technologies is a plus:



Technologies

• Front-end: ReactJS, HTML, CSS, JavaScript

• Back-end: NodeJS, Express

• Databases: MongoDB, MySQL

description:
We are seeking an experienced Influencer Outreach Coordinator to manage and execute creator outreach across multiple e-commerce brands. This person will be responsible for identifying, contacting, and coordinating with influencers and content creators through platforms such as Upfluence, EUKA, and Influencer Hero.

The ideal candidate has hands-on experience managing large-scale creator programs, tracking deliverables, coordinating sample shipments, ensuring content delivery, and supporting paid collaborations and whitelisting. They will follow established SOPs closely while maintaining clear communication with creators and internal teams.

This role requires strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and an understanding of the influencer marketing ecosystem.



Key Responsibilities

• Source and curate lists of creators and influencers who align with brand aesthetics and audience targets.

• Use tools such as Upfluence, EUKA, and Influencer Hero to identify and manage creator outreach campaigns.

• Execute outreach campaigns using automated tools and personalized follow-ups.

• Coordinate the sending of product samples and ensure timely delivery.

• Track all communication, deliveries, and content deadlines within internal systems.

• Manage the receipt and organization of influencer content, ensuring it meets brief requirements.

• Follow up with creators to confirm deliverables are received and posted.

• Facilitate whitelisting and branded content access with creators and agencies.

• Maintain accurate campaign reporting, status updates, and creator performance data.

• Collaborate with the influencer program manager for approvals, support, and strategic alignment.

• Follow detailed SOPs to ensure a consistent and efficient outreach process across brands.



IF YOU ARE SERIOUS ABOUT THIS ROLE
 
 with a video introducing yourself and talking about your experience. 



Qualifications

2–3+ years of experience in influencer or creator outreach within e-commerce or digital marketing.





Proficient with outreach and CRM platforms such as Upfluence, EUKA, or Influencer Hero.





Demonstrated ability to manage a high volume of influencer relationships simultaneously.





Strong understanding of creator collaborations, gifting programs, and paid partnerships.





Experience coordinating product seeding and tracking content deliveries.





Familiarity with whitelisting, branded content, and collab post workflows.





Highly attentive to detail, organized, and process-driven.





Strong written communication skills for creator correspondence and follow-ups.





Comfortable working across multiple brands and managing simultaneous outreach pipelines.







Ideal Candidate

You have managed influencer programs with 100+ creators at once or across multiple campaigns.





You are proactive, detail-oriented, and capable of keeping multiple projects organized without oversight.





You thrive in a structured environment where precision and process are key to success.





You are comfortable working with automated outreach systems and tracking tools.





You understand the influencer ecosystem, from gifted collaborations to whitelisted paid ads.

title: Virtual Assistant for New Personal Brand + Business Coaching Company
description:
I’m building a fast-growing media and education company focused on helping ambitious women regulate their nervous systems, rebuild their health, reclaim their identity, and create purpose-driven businesses.



Right now, it’s just me, the founder. But I’m ready to grow quickly and intentionally with the right support.

This is not a basic admin position. It’s a growth-focused operations role for someone who wants to help build something meaningful from the ground up. Someone who sees the bigger picture and wants to be part of creating real impact.



My work sits at the intersection of health, wealth, mindset, and business. I create podcast content, social media, digital courses, coaching programs, and live experiences designed to help women rise into stronger, clearer, more aligned versions of themselves.



Everything I build is rooted in clarity, calm confidence, and strategic execution. If you love organization, clean systems, strong communication, and helping a visionary move faster, keep reading.



Core Responsibilities

Media Editing and Content Production

• Edit full podcast episodes with clean audio, smooth transitions, and professional polish

• Create high-quality short-form clips from long-form podcast content

• Add captions, hooks, titles, and visual enhancements to short-form videos

• Prepare final video and audio files for approval

• Upload and schedule podcast episodes across platforms

• Write compelling titles, descriptions, and show notes

• Draft social captions optimized for growth and engagement

• Schedule all social media posts after approval

• Organize all media assets and maintain a clean content library



You should be highly skilled in video editing and understand pacing, hooks, and what performs well on social platforms.



Social Media Growth and Engagement

• Repurpose long-form content into multiple short-form pieces

• Schedule and manage content across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and other platforms

• Monitor engagement and respond to comments in alignment with brand voice

• Proactively engage with target accounts and communities to drive growth

• Track performance metrics and suggest improvements

• Stay current on trends and platform updates



You should understand what drives organic growth and how to position content for visibility.



Research, Outreach, and PR

• Research aligned podcast guests, partners, sponsors, and collaborators

• Build organized outreach lists

• Draft and send partnership and sponsorship outreach
s

• Follow up consistently and track responses

• Pitch the founder to podcasts and speaking opportunities

• Identify PR opportunities and media placements

• Build relationships with aligned brands and communities



You should be confident in writing outreach
s, comfortable initiating contact, and strategic about relationship building.



Marketing and Growth Support

• Assist with launch coordination

• Support funnel setup and
 campaigns

• Help identify growth opportunities and audience gaps

• Track weekly growth metrics across platforms

• Maintain clean systems and organized workflows



Who This Is For

You are detail-oriented and calm under pressure. You take initiative instead of waiting to be told what to do. You are organized but flexible. You communicate clearly and professionally. You care about quality. You can follow direction but also think independently.



Bonus if you have experience with:

• Kajabi

• YouTube Studio

• Canva

• Google Drive

• Xtile

• Podcast platforms

• Riverside for podcast editing



Hours and Growth

This will begin as a part-time role. There is strong potential to grow into a larger operations role as the company scales. I am building something long-term and I’m looking for someone who wants to grow with me.



How to Apply

title: Social Media Content Designer (Canva + Simple Reels)
description:
High-Volume 8-Week Project for Two Luxury Wellness Brands



Overview

We are hiring one reliable content designer to create social media visuals for two luxury wellness brands.



All captions and content topics are already completed for the year. Your role is to create only visual assets, including Canva graphics and simple reels using Canva or CapCut.



This is a structured 8-week production project with clear output goals and biweekly pay based on completed deliverables.



Total scope: approximately 560 assets

Project length: 8 weeks

Payment: biweekly after deliverables are uploaded and reviewed

No upfront payment



Brands



Magnolia Skin Therapy (MST)

Luxury skincare and advanced esthetics



Spa Haven Suites (SHS)

Luxury wellness suites featuring salt therapy and infrared sauna



Both brands require a visual style that is clean, elevated, calm, polished, and consistent. This is not a trendy or overly busy design style.



What You Will Do



Phase 1: Template Creation



During the first week, you will create 6 to 10 reusable Canva templates per brand. These templates should work for educational posts, quotes, promotions, service or amenity highlights, and announcements. Templates must be submitted for approval before full production begins.



Phase 2: Asset Production



After templates are approved, you will use them to create the full content library.



You will create static Canva graphics using the provided captions and headlines. You will swap and crop images as needed, maintain consistent spacing, typography, and layout, and create simple Type 1 reels using Canva or CapCut. These reels will include text overlays, 3 to 6 clips, auto captions, and basic music. You will also export and upload all files into our shared Google Drive.



Delivery Requirements



All deliverables must be uploaded into our shared Google Drive.



Deliverables must include exported static graphics, exported reel files, editable Canva files, organized folders by brand and time period, and clear file naming.



No Canva links. Files must be uploaded into shared Google Drive.



Output Schedule



To stay on pace, this project has clear production targets.



Week 1: 50 completed assets



Weeks 2 through 8: 70 completed assets per week, or 140 completed assets every 2 weeks



Payment is issued biweekly after the required deliverables are completed, uploaded, and reviewed.



If quota is not met, payment will be adjusted proportionally.



Pay



$4 to $6 per hour



This is a structured production role for someone who works efficiently, communicates clearly, and can meet deadlines consistently.



Requirements



Please apply only if you have strong Canva skills, experience creating short-form reels in Canva or CapCut, a clean and professional design style, good organization and file management, reliable communication, and the ability to work quickly without sacrificing consistency.



To Apply



Please include the following in your application:

Resume and Portfolio

Five Canva posts from one brand you have designed

One example of a simple edited reel, not just a cover

Confirmation that you can meet the timeline and output expectations

Your weekly availability

Your MBTI type, if known



To confirm that you read the full listing, please begin your application with the word Magnolia.



Important



This role is focused on execution, consistency, and follow-through. Captions and strategy are already done. We are looking for someone who can take approved direction and produce high-quality visual assets efficiently.



If the first batch goes well, the project continues through full completion.

title: URGENT!!! Sales Associate - Landscaping Experience
description:
Job Title: Landscape Sales Associate (Remote / Part-Time)

Company: Archie’s Garden Beds

Rate: $6.00 – $7.00 per hour + Commission per closed lead (Negotiable)

Hours: Part-time



About the Role

Archie’s Garden Beds is looking for a "hunter" who understands the landscaping industry. We don't just need a data scraper; we need someone who knows how to identify high-value residential and commercial projects. You will be responsible for the full "top-of-funnel" process: finding the right prospects, verifying their needs, and making the initial cold call to spark interest.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Targeted Prospecting: Use data scraping, Google Maps, and local permit databases to find properties or businesses in need of premium garden bed installations.

Strategic Cold Calling: High-energy outbound calling with a professional "working accent." You must be able to talk comfortably about landscaping needs and garden bed benefits.

Qualifying Leads: Sorting "price-shoppers" from "quality clients." You’ll ensure the leads you pass on are ready for a formal proposal.

Method Freedom: You bring the tools and the "how-to." Whether it’s LinkedIn, scraping, or local directories—whatever gets us high-quality leads works for us.



Requirements:



Landscaping/Hardscaping Knowledge: You should know the basics of the trade (e.g., materials, seasonal timing, or project scales) to sound like an expert on the phone.

Sales Background: Proven experience in outbound sales, specifically in home services or construction.

Fluent English: Strong verbal communication skills with a clear, professional accent for the US/Western market.

Tech Savvy: Ability to scrape data and manage a simple CRM or lead sheet.



Why Join Archie’s?



Incentivized Growth: We offer a base hourly rate plus a commission structure that rewards you for the quality of the lead, not just the quantity.

Independent Environment: We trust your process. If you have a method that works, we stay out of your way.

Flexible Schedule: Ideal for a seasoned sales pro looking for part-time, high-impact work.

title: Graphic Designer Needed for Product Carousel Images
description:
We’re looking for a graphic designer to create high-quality product carousel images for e-commerce listings.



We’ll provide links to bad examples and good examples (desired quality) so you understand the style and quality we’re aiming for.



The main goal is to create images that visually show how the product works, rather than relying heavily on text.



Example Links:

• Bad: 

• Good: 



Some key things we’re looking for:

• Show how the product works visually (ex: powder dissolving, solution flowing, product in action)

• Keep slides simple with one key message per image

• Use less text and stronger visuals

• Make the product larger and more central

• Create clear before/after comparisons

• Visualize key claims (ex: showing “1200 flushes” with icons or a timeline)

• Include a “how it works” sequence when relevant

• Occasionally show the product in a real environment (ex: bathroom setting)

• Use backgrounds with more depth or realistic textures

• Add motion/action visuals where possible (water flow, foam, cleaning effect)



Hours & Budget

• Part-time: ~20 hours/week (up to $400/month)

• Full-time: ~40 hours/week (up to $750/month)



To Apply

• Please send portfolio samples of work similar to the example images (Amazon product images, carousel images, or product infographics).

• Also include whether you are interested in the part-time or full-time position.



Looking for someone who can consistently produce clear, high-converting product visuals.

title: Print Designer Needed for Postcards and Flyers
description:
I own a small marketing business in the United States and am looking for a graphic designer who has experience with creating postcard, flyer and door hanger designs.  Most of our work is related to digital marketing but we are starting to do more with print marketing and I need a reliable designer that I can use on an as-needed basis.  Our designs are mainly for home service companies such as landscapers, plumbers and roofers.



This is part time work as needed.  I'm open to the work expanding to other types of designs but for now just need someone skilled in print design.



I am flexible on the rate (can be a fixed price, hourly rate, etc).



Please provide the following:



1. Your portfolio.



2. What would you charge for a 5 x 7 inch postcard design (just one side)?  You can either provide an hourly rate (but then tell me how many yours you would estimate) or just give me a fixed price for what you would charge.  I'm flexible, but I do want to estimate my total cost.



3. If I gave you a post card design, how long do you think it would take you to turn around in general?  I'm just looking for a rough idea based on your typical schedule (for the most part I'm pretty flexible).



3. Are you currently employed?  Or are you just doing freelancing work?



Please do not use AI to respond to this application. If your application is AI generated or relies on answers that are AI generated it will be ignored.   Please only respond through OnlineJobs.ph, not through other channels.



Thanks!

Start your message with the word Jamal



Submit a short video answering the questions below



If you do NOT submit a video, your application will not be reviewed

What Success Looks Like

title: Final Cut Pro Video Editor
description:
Final Cut Pro • Long-Term Work



We’re a growing marketing and production agency specializing in contractor and real estate businesses. Video is at the core of what we do — it’s how our clients generate leads, build trust, and grow their businesses. We already have a strong lead editor in place, and now we’re looking for a talented Senior Video Editor to join the team, hit the ground running, and grow alongside us.



This is a fully remote, long-term position for someone who is already highly skilled and looking for stable real work with measurable impact.





What You’ll Be Editing

Raw on-site footage from roofing, remodeling, landscaping, and construction projects — turned into cinematic, engaging content.Job Site & Contractor Footage: 

One of the most powerful formats in our niche. You’ll know how to build tension, reveal, and land the payoff.Before & After Transformations: 

Contractor and client testimonials that need to feel authentic, clean, and compelling — not stiff or corporate.Talking Head & Interview Footage: 

Fast-paced, hook-driven edits optimized for Instagram, TikTok,
, and YouTube Shorts.Social Media Reels & Shorts: 

Property walkthroughs and listings that need to feel premium — smooth pacing, clean color, and strong visual flow.Real Estate Videos: 





Your Responsibilities

Edit a consistent volume of contractor, real estate, and social content to a high standard — on deadline, every time.

Execute precise speed ramps, motion effects, and transitions that match the energy of the content.

Apply clean, consistent color grades that make job site footage look polished and professional.

Design and implement text overlays, lower thirds, and CTA graphics that drive real engagement.

Deliver professional sound design — music sync, audio cleanup, whooshes, and atmospheric sound.

Collaborate with our lead editor and take feedback without ego — we’re all here to make the work better.

Manage your own workflow and communicate proactively about turnaround times.





What We Offer

Flexible remote working arrangement.

Long-term stability — we’re not looking for a freelancer, we’re looking for a tea
mber.

Hands-on mentorship from a strong lead editor already producing high-performing content — we’ll actively help you grow, not just hand you work.

Paid course sponsorship — we’ll cover the cost of relevant editing courses, tutorials, or certifications for the right candidate. If you’re committed to leveling up your craft, we’ll invest in making that happen.

A niche where great editing directly drives leads and business growth — your work has real stakes.





Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

3+ years of professional video editing experience — this is a senior role, not a stepping stone.

A portfolio that includes contractor, construction, real estate, or similar content. We need to see you know this world.

Expert-level proficiency in Final Cut Pro — this is our required software. Applications using other tools will not be considered.

Strong understanding of speed ramps, motion effects, pacing, color grading, and sound design — not as tricks, but as storytelling tools.

Deep familiarity with editing gimbal footage, various frame rates, and focal lengths.

Reliability — you hit deadlines, communicate clearly, and don’t disappear.





What We’ll Look For in Your Reel

Before we read a single word of your application, we’re going to watch your work. Here’s what we’re looking for:



Do you use them naturally, or do they feel forced? This tells us if you understand energy and 
ntum.Speed Ramps — 

Does your grade hold up across different lighting conditions? This tells us if your work is ready for real clients.Color Consistency — 

Are your overlays clean and purposeful? This tells us if you have the designer’s eye our content requires.Text & Graphics — 





Who You Are

You’re a self-starter — you don’t need someone checking in on you to produce great work.

You take pride in every frame, not just the final export.

You’re coachable — you can receive direction from a lead editor and use it to make the work better.

You’re looking for a long-term home, not a short gig.

You understand that in this niche, great editing = more leads = real business impact.





Examples of the Work We’re Looking For

Before you apply, watch these. This is the style, energy, and quality level we produce. If your work matches or exceeds this, we want to hear from you.



Example 1:

How to Apply

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Cinematic & Instagram)
description:
JOB TITLE: Short-Form Video Editor (Cinematic & Instagram) — Luxury Brand

SALARY: $1,100 USD/month

TYPE: Full-time (40 hours/week)

LOCATION: Remote (Philippines)

SCHEDULE: Async, with Vancouver overlap (PST) for feedback



---



THE MISSION



Prismiera is a luxury jewelry brand built on ancient mythology, goddess archetypes, and Dark Academia aesthetics.



We need someone to own how the brand looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok.



You'll produce short-form content that makes a woman feel powerful in under 30 seconds. Cinematic pacing, dark femininity, sometimes music-driven editing — designed for how Instagram and TikTok audiences actually consume. You'll also work with our AI-generated personas, integrating them into edits and cinematic storytelling as the visual anchor of the brand.



We're hiring for Taste first. Your edits/videos make people feel something before they understand what they're looking at.



---



THE STYLE



YES: Aspirational. Cinematic Storytelling. Lethal elegance. Fashion-edit energy. Dark femininity. Music-driven impact. High-production value.



NO: CapCut presets. Generic motivational quote reels. Low-effort vlog-style acting. Anything that cheapens a demi-luxury product.



You instinctively know the difference between "luxury" and "cheap." Between aspirational and try-hard. Between powerful and loud. That instinct is what we're hiring for.



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Edit & Create: Produce original Instagram Reels and TikToks — cinematic, atmospheric visuals, mythology, history, modern. Some pieces you'll build from scratch. Others you'll adapt from assets in our YouTube production pipeline. Either way, you're crafting content shaped for how each platform rewards engagement.



Music-Sync Editing: Sometimes, your cuts, transitions, and visual reveals are married to the beat. Swells, drops, silence, impact — all intentional. Music is a storytelling weapon, not background noise.



AI Persona Integration: Composite and stylize our AI-generated goddess characters into edits/videos. She's the visual anchor — the face the eye locks onto while mythology and editing layers move around her. You'll make her feel like she belongs in the scene, not pasted on top of it.



AI Content Generation: You won't just receive AI assets — you'll learn to create them. We provide paid accounts for frontier AI tools (Seedance 2.0, Seedream5, and whatever launches next). You'll generate AI influencer visuals, atmospheric environments, and character footage that feed directly into your edits/videos. Prior AI experience is a plus, not a requirement — we'll train the right editor.



Platform Instinct: You understand what gets saved on Instagram. What gets looped on TikTok. You design for those behaviors, not just for visual quality.



Volume at Speed: Once your templates and aesthetic are locked, we expect high output. You'll ramp up from 3-5 pieces per week to 10-15 at steady state.



---



CORE REQUIREMENTS



The Aesthetic Eye. This is non-negotiable. Your portfolio should make us stop scrolling. If your work already lives in the neighborhood of cinematic, aspirational — we want to talk.



Creative Instinct. You don't wait to be told what to make. Given a goddess/character, a mood, and a piece of music, you see the edit before you open the timeline. You pitch ideas, not just execute briefs. Storytelling comes naturally — you think in narrative beats, not just cuts.



Music & Rhythm. You've made edits where the music drives the visuals — AMVs, fashion reels, phonk edits, fan edits, whatever the genre. You understand pacing as a weapon.



After Effects. Compositing, layering, motion graphics, light/shadow matching. This is how you'll integrate AI-generated visuals into polished edits. If you're strong in AE, you'll stand out immediately.



Premiere Pro. For project handoffs and consistency with the rest of the team.



Loop Thinking. You design edits/videos that reward rewatching. The cut that lands on beat, the detail you only catch the second time, the seamless loop point. You think in circles, not lines.



Strong English. Daily async communication — clear, direct, professional.



Reliable & Coachable. You hit deadlines or warn early. You take direct feedback and iterate fast. You flag problems with options, not excuses.



---



BONUS SKILLS (Not Required, But We'll Notice)



- AI generation experience — Kling3.0, Veo3.1, Comfyui, Seedance2.0, Seedream5.0 or similar

- Color grading — pushing mixed footage into a consistent luxury palette

- Typography sense — text overlays that feel intentional and premium

- Sound design — SFX layering beyond just music (risers, hits, atmospheric texture)

- Understanding of Instagram analytics — saves, shares, completion rates

- Experience building visual identities for brands or personas on social media



---



HOW THIS ROLE FITS



Other editors handle cinematic YouTube production — you own social media (sometimes youtube as well). Same mythology, same brand, different platform behavior. Each editor has a distinct lane, and yours is how Prismiera looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok.



---



SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS



RAM: 16GB minimum (32GB preferred) + SSD

Reliable high-speed internet (upload speed matters)

Must run After Effects, Premiere Pro, and browser-based AI tools simultaneously



---



PAID TRIAL (Shortlisted Candidates)



Before any full-time commitment, we run a paid trial. We provide real assets, style references, and the AI persona visuals. You deliver content. Trial is compensated at $150 USD at the end of each week. For select candidates, we may run a shorter 2-day trial at $100 USD for a single deliverable. If it's a mutual fit after 30 days, we transition to regular bi-weekly payments of $550 (before work).

This protects both sides — you see whether the work fits your strengths, we see whether the output fits our brand.



---



WHAT WE OFFER



- Paid accounts for all frontier AI tools — we provide the tools, you bring the talent

- Creative ownership — you're defining how a luxury brand looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok from day one

- AI training — you'll learn to generate content with cutting-edge tools as part of your workflow

- Clear briefs — asset libraries, mood references, and specific direction for every batch

- Direct feedback — specific, constructive notes on every edit

- A brand worth building — you're not joining a finished machine, you're helping build one. We're looking for long-term commitment.



---



COMPENSATION



$1,100 USD/month. Bi-weekly payments of $550 (before work).



---



OWNERSHIP & CONFIDENTIALITY



All outputs (edits, project files, prompts, generated assets, persona visuals) are Prismiera property and must remain confidential.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Do not send a generic cover letter.

Use 7 apply points or more when applying.



Subject line: PRISMIERA EDITOR — [Your Name]



Send the following (in this order):



1. Your Best Work. Link to ONE video that showcases your creativity, editing execution, and aesthetic taste. This should be the piece you're most proud of — the one that makes people stop scrolling.



2. The Rhythm Test. Link to ONE edit where the music drives the visuals. Show us your beat-sync instinct. (Can overlap with #1 if one video demonstrates both.)



3. The Luxury Test. In 3-5 bullets, how do you make an edit feel "expensive" instead of "cheap"?



4. The Creative Instinct Test (3-5 sentences). You're given a 45-second cinematic video about a queen who poisoned her entire court, a folder of our AI Goddess visuals, and a dark atmospheric beat. Pitch a 15-second Instagram Reel designed to get saved — tell us your audio choice, pacing, and what the first 2 seconds look like.



5. Hardware. Your PC specs: CPU / GPU / RAM. Plus your internet upload speed.



6. Turnaround Estimate. Given existing footage, a music track, and an established editing template — how long would a 15-20 second piece take you? How long would a 45 second Cinematic AI video take you?



7. The Rewrite. Rewrite this sentence to sound dark, powerful, and aspirational: "She is really cool and strong and she wins."



Looking forward to meeting and working with you!

title: Audio Engineer / Video Editor (Podcast & Memoir Production)
description:
You will support the AudioLife team by editing podcast episodes, interview recordings, and memoir storytelling content.

Some projects will involve cleaning and polishing long-form interviews, while others will include editing podcast episodes, social clips, and short biographical videos. This role requires someone who is detail-oriented, technically skilled, and sensitive to storytelling and pacing.



Responsibilities:

Remove filler words and long pauses where appropriate

Insert intro/outro music and transitions

Deliver broadcast-ready final audio files

Memoir Interview Editing

Clean and organize long-form recorded interviews

Prepare audio for private podcast series

Export organized files for archiving and transcription



Video Editing -

Edit biographical videos and interview excerpts

Create short clips for social media promotion

Sync audio and video from recorded interviews

Add simple titles, graphics, and captions when needed



File Organization -

Manage project folders and media assets

Maintain consistent file naming and versioning

Export files in the correct formats for podcast distribution and video platforms



Tools & Software -

Candidates should be comfortable with one or more of the following:



Audio -

Adobe Audition

Pro Tools

Reaper



Video -

Adobe Premiere Pro

DaVinci Resolve

Final Cut Pro



Bonus -

Riverside.fm experience

Podcast hosting platforms



Requirements:

Must Have -

Experience editing podcasts or interview-based content

Strong audio cleanup and mixing skills

Video editing experience for interviews or podcasts

Good attention to detail

Reliable internet connection

Strong English comprehension



Nice to Have -

Experience editing documentary or storytelling content

Familiarity with podcast publishing workflows

Experience creating short-form social media clips

Motion graphics or captioning skills



Ideal Candidate:

You are someone who -

Enjoys storytelling and long-form conversations

Understands the rhythm of podcasts and interviews

Is technically strong in audio cleanup and mixing

Can edit efficiently without losing the emotional tone of the story

Is organized and dependable



Example Projects:

You may work on projects such as -

Editing AudioLife public podcast episodes

Cleaning interview recordings for private memoir podcasts

Creating short video clips from interviews

Producing short biographical video edits

Preparing archival interview recordings



How to Apply:

Your hourly rate

Your available weekly hours

The software you use for audio and video editing



Applications without work samples will not be considered.

title: PR Manager
description:
Position Summary

We are seeking an experienced and proactive Public Relations (PR) Manager to lead our firm's media and public relations efforts. This role plays a key part in enhancing brand reputation, increasing public visibility, and supporting our attorneys and leadership team with speaking, press, and media opportunities. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in PR strategy, event coordination, and media outreach—ideally within a legal or professional services environment.



Key Responsibilities

Media & Thought Leadership

Prepare briefing documents, talking points, and bios for firm representatives

Maintain and grow relationships with podcast hosts, media contacts, and event organizers

Conference & Event Participation

Identify relevant industry conferences and speaking opportunities

Coordinate logistics for firm participation, including registration, booth materials, and scheduling

Collaborate with graphic designers to develop and print handouts, pamphlets, and branded materials

Press & Publicity

Write, coordinate, and distribute press releases for firm milestones, events, and campaigns

Testimonial Collection & Promotion

Collaborate with the content team to ensure testimonials are edited and published appropriately

Ensure all testimonials adhere to legal marketing guidelines and ethical standards



Qualifications

Bachelor's degree in Public Relations, Communications, Marketing, or a related field

3–5 years of public relations experience, preferably in a law firm or professional services environment

Strong writing and editing skills for press materials, pitches, and media correspondence

Excellent organizational and project management abilities

Confidence in communicating with attorneys, leadership, and media professionals

Experience with PR software, press release distribution tools, and basic analytics/reporting platforms

Familiarity with ethical marketing standards, especially in the legal industry, is a plus



What We Offer

Opportunities for professional development and career growth

title: Outbound Call Setter – Real Estate Wholesaling & Flipping
description:
We’re a fast-paced real estate investment company focused on wholesaling and house flipping in various U.S. markets. We’re seeking a highly motivated, experienced outbound call setter to join our team and help us identify and qualify motivated sellers.



You’ll be the first point of contact with homeowners, building rapport, gathering critical property details, and setting appointments for our acquisitions team. Your role is essential to keeping our pipeline full and closing profitable deals.



Responsibilities:

Make 150–200 outbound cold calls per day using our dialer and scripts

Qualify leads based on motivation, property condition, and timeline

Set appointments for acquisition reps to close the deal

Use CRM (e.g., GoHighLevel) to manage leads and update call notes

Follow up consistently with warm leads via call, SMS, and

Handle objections professionally and build trust with sellers

Attend daily or weekly huddles with the team



Requirements:

Proven experience as an outbound call setter or cold caller in U.S. real estate, especially wholesaling or flipping

Strong understanding of distressed property seller psychology

Comfortable with cold calling, overcoming objections, and closing for the appointment

Fluent, neutral English accent with excellent grammar and listening skills

Familiarity with tools like Mojo Dialer, CallTools, REIReply, or similar

Tech-savvy and comfortable using CRMs and basic automations

Quiet home office setup with fast, reliable internet

Self-starter with excellent work ethic and time management skills



Bonus Points If You Have:

Preferred but not required - You live in Cebu or surrounding areas - Please identify in application if from Visayas region. 

Experience in the Washington, Texas, Florida, Georgia, or Arizona real estate markets

Previous success in setting 3–5+ qualified appointments per day

Experience working with VAs or virtual teams

Familiarity with real estate scripts (e.g., “4 Pillars” framework)



To Apply:

Please respond with the following:

Summary of your relevant real estate cold calling experience (especially wholesaling/house flipping)

A short description of why your sales skills make you qualified for this role

Your availability and expected hourly or per-appointment rate

A short mock call script you would use to speak with a distressed homeowner

(Optional) A voice recording introduction or link to your portfolio/resume



Final Step – Mock Call Interview:

Qualified candidates will be required to submit a short mock call script, and participate in a live mock call during the interview process. This helps us understand your tone, confidence, objection handling, and ability to build rapport—just like the real thing.



We’re not just looking for someone who can dial—we’re looking for someone who can connect.



If you’re hungry, coachable, and ready to grow with a winning real estate team, we want to hear from you!

title: -->>Web Developer – Build. Optimize. Innovate. – 20+ Benefits!<<--
description:
Job Overview:



We are looking for a skilled web developer with experience in modern JavaScript technologies (such as Node. js and React. js) to join our growing development team. This role will involve building high-performance web applications from the back end (server-side logic) to the front end (UI experience). The ideal candidate will have a solid understanding of both front-end and back-end technologies, a passion for clean code, and a drive to provide innovative web experiences.



Interested applicants may send their resume to
