Collaboration:

-Work closely with the development team to turn project requirements into high-quality web applications.

-Contribute to brainstorming and architectural discussions to ensure scalable, maintainable, and performant code.

-Participate in code reviews to ensure quality and share best practices with the team.



Web Application Development:

-Design, develop, and maintain responsive and high-performance web applications using React.js and Node.js.

-Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code across the full stack, following best practices and ensuring cross-browser -compatibility.

-Develop and integrate RESTful APIs, WebSockets, and third-party services to enhance application functionality.



Front-End Development:

-Build and maintain dynamic user interfaces using, with a focus on reusable components, state management (Redux, Context API), and efficient rendering.

-Implement responsive design and ensure the application performs well across devices and browsers.



Back-End Development:

-Build and maintain server-side logic, databases, and APIs.

-Work with relational and NoSQL databases (e.g., MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL).

-Integrate front-end applications with back-end systems and databases, ensuring smooth data flow and performance.



Optimization & Maintenance:

-Optimize application performance, identifying and fixing performance bottlenecks.

-Maintain high standards for application security and data integrity.

-Continuously monitor and improve existing applications.



Testing & Documentation:

-Write unit and integration tests to ensure the reliability and robustness of code.

-Document technical specifications, code, and APIs for internal teams and future development.



Required Skills & Qualifications:

-Proven experience in web development with expertise in Javascript frameworks and libraries such as React.js and Node.js.

-Strong understanding of JavaScript (ES6+) and modern JavaScript features.

-Experience with HTML5, CSS3, and responsive design principles.

-Proficiency with RESTful API design and integration.

-Experience using front-end state management libraries like Redux or Context API.

-Experience working with server-side technologies like Express.js (Node.js framework).

-Solid understanding of databases (relational and/or NoSQL databases such as MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL).

-Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to debug complex issues.

-Excellent communication skills and the ability to collaborate effectively with both technical and non-technical teams.



Why Join Us?

-Competitive salary and benefits package.

-Flexible working hours and remote work options.

-Opportunities for professional growth and learning.

-A collaborative and innovative work environment.

-Access to cutting-edge technologies and projects.

-A supportive team focused on work-life balance and personal development.



Work Schedule: 12:00mn to 8:30am PH Time

title: Integrations Associate – Automation & Systems
description:
DAP Brands is seeking a detail-oriented, technically savvy, and solution-driven Integrations Associate to support our mission of building seamless, scalable automations across the organization. This role goes beyond task execution. You’ll work closely with our Technology Integration Manager to design, maintain, and optimize workflows that improve efficiency across Sales, Marketing, and Operations.



If you enjoy connecting systems, solving process gaps, and leveraging automation tools to create reliable, intelligent workflows, this role is for you.



Key Responsibilities:

- Integration Setup & Maintenance: Assist in setting up, testing, launching, and maintaining integrations using platforms such as Zapier, Make, and GoHighLevel. Monitor automations for accuracy and performance, troubleshoot issues, and implement long-term fixes.

- Automation & Workflow Optimization: Identify inefficiencies in existing processes and propose smart automation solutions. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand needs and build tailored workflows.

- Technical Support: Work with APIs, webhooks, and basic scripting (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL) to resolve data sync issues, system errors, and performance bottlenecks.

- Documentation & Training: Document workflows, integrations, and processes to ensure scalability. Assist in training internal users on newly built systems and automation tools.



Tools You’ll Work With:

- Automation & Integrations: Zapier, Make, Webhooks

- CRMs & Operations Tools: GoHighLevel, ClickFunnels, Stripe, ClickUp

- Collaboration Tools: Google Sheets, Zoom, Google Workspace

- Scripting & APIs: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL



Application Instructions:

Please submit your application through the online form provided: 



- To be considered, you MUST type “MAVERICK” in front of your full name if you are applying via our website: 

- If you are an Integrations Associate who takes ownership, thinks in systems, and thrives in a fast-moving, automation-driven environment, we invite you to apply.

title: High-Performance Executive Operator (Data & Operations)
description:
This is not a traditional Executive Assistant role.



We are looking for a high-performance operator who can combine data intelligence with operational execution and work directly alongside a fast-moving, visionary leader.



This role is for someone who can bring structure to data, clarity to decisions, and execution to leadership initiatives.



If you thrive in fast environments, think analytically, and operate with ownership, keep reading.



Who We Are:



DAP Brands is a community of high performers building businesses that create real impact.



Our leadership team moves quickly, thinks strategically, and expects people to take responsibility rather than wait for instructions.



We value:

• Speed

• Accountability

• Emotional maturity

• Precision

• Ownership

• Loyalty to the mission (not ego)



What This Role Really Is:



This role combines Data Analysis + Executive Operations.



Your first responsibility is to bring order to data across the organization: Cleaning, structuring, and translating it into clear insights.



Once the data foundation is organized, you will operate as a high-level executive, helping leadership execute faster and smarter.



You will help:



• Clean, organize, and analyze business data

• Turn raw data into meaningful reports and insights

• Support leadership with decision-ready information

• Protect your leader’s time and priorities

• Enforce accountability across leadership initiatives

• Translate strategy into structured execution

• Identify problems before they become fires

• Move initiatives forward without constant direction

• Bring clarity to complex situations



You will sit close to leadership.

You will see how decisions are made.

You must handle that with professionalism, discretion, and maturity.



What This Role Is NOT



This role is not for someone who:



• Needs constant praise or reassurance

• Struggles with direct feedback

• Prefers slow corporate environments

• Gets overwhelmed by changing priorities

• Waits for instructions instead of solving problems

• Is uncomfortable working with data and systems

• Frequently job hops every year



We operate in a high-accountability environment.



If you need tone cushioning or excessive structure, this will likely feel uncomfortable.



What Success Looks Like (First 90 Days):



Within your first 90 days, you:



• Organize and clean key business data sets

• Create structured reporting for leadership decisions

• Build dashboards or reports that bring visibility to operations

• Run leadership meetings with clear structure and follow-through

• Anticipate your leader’s needs before they are spoken

• Track priorities and ensure accountability across teams

• Bring solutions instead of just raising issues

• Operate calmly and clearly under pressure



The Profile That Thrives Here



You likely:



• Have experience in data analysis, reporting, or business analytics

• Are comfortable working with spreadsheets, dashboards, and structured data

• Have supported a founder or senior executive before

• Have stayed 3+ years in at least one meaningful role

• Enjoy solving complex operational problems

• Can build systems and workflows from scratch

• Communicate clearly and directly

• Are emotionally regulated and professional under pressure

• Think in outcomes and insights, not just tasks



You are someone who:



• Notices patterns others miss

• Brings clarity where others see chaos

• Moves things forward without being asked twice



Compensation & Growth:



This role offers:



• Competitive compensation aligned with performance

• Direct exposure to executive decision-making

• The opportunity to shape internal systems and operations

• Long-term growth as the company scales



At DAP Brands, we reward impact and ownership, not just tenure.



Final Note



This role is for someone who wants to build, solve, and operate at a high level.



If you enjoy working with data, solving operational problems, and supporting leadership execution, this could be an excellent fit.



If you're looking for a comfortable, slow-paced corporate role, this probably isn't it.



But if you want to operate at a high level and help build something meaningful, apply on our website 
/careers and write MAVERICK before your name.

title: Elite Level Media Buyer (NewsBreak)
description:
We are hiring a killer media buyer to help us scale on NewsBreak.



Direct NewsBreak experience is a plus, but it is not required. We understand that experienced NewsBreak buyers are rare. We are open to hiring someone with strong Meta or other paid traffic experience who can quickly learn a new platform and figure out what works.



We are looking for someone who already knows how to buy media at a high level and does not need constant direction.



What We’re Looking For:



The right person must have real media buying experience and be able to make decisions independently. This is not an entry-level role, and it is not a fit for someone who needs to be told exactly what to do every day.



You should know all the major metrics and you should know how to use those numbers to evaluate performance, spot problems, and make profitable decisions.



Requirements: 



- Strong media buying experience on Meta or another major paid traffic platform

- Experience managing thousands of dollars per day in ad spend

- Strong understanding of campaign metrics and how they impact profitability

- Ability to test efficiently and interpret results correctly

- Ability to know when to cut, when to hold, and when to scale

- Self-sufficient and confident in building strategy without being micromanaged

- Comfortable adapting to a new platform and learning quickly



Do Not Apply If:



- You need to be told exactly what to do every day

- You have very little media buying experience

- You have never managed meaningful daily spend

- You do not know how to read campaign data and make decisions from it

- You are a button-pusher instead of a real strategist

- You wait around for someone else to hand you the answer



Ideal Candidate:



The ideal candidate is someone who has already spent serious money on paid traffic, understands how to manage campaigns profitably, and can bring that same skill set to NewsBreak. We are looking for someone who can think independently, test intelligently, and find winning strategies on their own.



To apply, D
 the info below:



1. Platforms you’ve bought on

2. Highest daily spend managed

3. Verticals/offers you’ve run

4. One campaign you scaled successfully

5. What you look at first when performance drops

title: Full-Time Operations Coordinator (Remote | Long-Term | Growth Opportunity)
description:
Full-Time Operations Coordinator (Remote | Long-Term | Growth Opportunity)



At **Site Masters**, we don’t just hire for roles — we hire for **impact**.

We’re a Tampa Bay–based junk removal and property cleanup company scaling fast, and we’re looking for an **Operations Coordinator** who thrives in structure, solves problems fast, and leads with calm under pressure.



This role is the heartbeat of our business. You’ll coordinate people, trucks, schedules, and clients — turning chaos into clarity every day. If you’re resourceful, emotionally intelligent, and love creating order in a fast-moving environment, this is your opportunity to grow with a company that’s building something lasting.



*Role Overview**



As our Operations Coordinator, you’ll oversee daily field operations, logistics, and client coordination — ensuring every project runs on time, on budget, and up to our standards.

You’ll work directly with leadership to streamline systems, improve efficiency, and manage a growing remote and on-site team.



This is a long-term role with room for advancement. The right person will grow into a leadership position as the company expands regionally.



**Key Responsibilities**



**Project & Logistics Management (40%)**



* Assign and manage daily technician routes and ensure crews are prepared for each job.

* Oversee dispatch, equipment checklists, and field communications.

* Solve day-to-day issues fast — rerouting, rescheduling, and supporting the field team.

* Maintain Jobber CRM and Google Workspace records.



**Client & Financial Oversight (25%)**



* Create and send estimates and invoices.

* Follow up on open quotes (24-hr, 48-hr, 1-week intervals).

* Request deposits, track payments, and reconcile accounts.

* Coordinate material orders and deliveries.



**Admin, Marketing & Lead Support (25%)**



* Organize project photos, Google Drive folders, and reporting dashboards.

* Assist with light marketing/SEO tasks (GBP updates, online listings, citations).

* Research and document new leads weekly (mobile home parks, property managers).

* Support recurring reporting and internal communication.



**Growth & Process Development (10%)**



* Identify inefficiencies and propose new systems or tools.

* Maintain and update SOPs in Notion.

* Support hiring and training as the team grows.



---



**Requirements**



Onboarding & Training

We’re still building many of our systems — you’ll be learning by doing.

The first few weeks focus on shadowing calls, hopping in right away, understanding our client workflow, and getting comfortable in our online software and Jobber. Expect an active learning curve and close collaboration with our leadership team.

Comfortable using Hubstaff time tracking (with screenshots) — we use it for transparency and workflow review.



* **Education:** Bachelor’s degree (Business, Operations, or related field) *preferred*

* **Experience:** 3–5 years in operations, scheduling, client success, customer support or logistics (construction, junk removal, or service industry a plus).

*** Expert Level English

* **Skills:**



* Strong project management and process-building abilities.

* Proficient in CRMs, Google Workspace, and cloud systems (Jobber or similar).

* Excellent written and spoken English.

* High attention to detail, self-discipline, and proactive communication.

* Fast computer proficiency (55+ WPM typing, reliable setup).



**Our Core Values**



**1. Unshakable Integrity**



*Do what’s right — especially when no one’s watching.*

We tell the truth, follow through, and communicate with empathy. You own your mistakes, treat clients with respect, and protect the company’s reputation like it’s your own.



**3. Relentlessly Driven**



*Earn it every day.*

You push yourself to learn, improve, and perform at a high level — not because someone’s watching, but because it’s who you are.



These aren’t buzzwords. They’re how we hire, promote, and build trust.



---



### **Compensation & Benefits**



* **Salary:** $1,200 – $2,000 USD/month (based on experience and performance).

Compensation grows with mastery and ownership. Strong performers can advance quickly in both pay and responsibility.



**Schedule**: 8 AM – 6 PM EST, Monday–Saturday (~50 hrs/week).

This is a fast-moving environment — ideal for someone who thrives on structure, consistency, and responsibility.

* **Location:** Remote (Philippines-based preferred).

* **Start Date:** Immediate, with 1-month paid trial.

* **Perks:**



* Long-term stability and growth path within the company.

* Paid holidays after probation.

* Mentorship and leadership development.

* Work with a disciplined, mission-driven team where your ideas are valued.



---



### **How to Apply**



To be considered, you must:



1. Write a short introduction (2–3 sentences) about who you are and your experience in operations, customer support, or client success.

2. Answer this question in your cover letter:



* *What does “Extreme Ownership” mean to you, and how have you lived it out professionally?*

3. Include the keyword **“Precision”** in your subject line so we know you read the full description.

4. Attach or link to your résumé and (if applicable) work samples or systems you’ve built.

5. Attach a video recording of yourself describing your interest in the role and how specifically the core values apply to you.





**We’re not looking for someone to “just do tasks.”**

We’re looking for someone who wants to lead, improve systems, and grow with us for years to come.



If that sounds like you — apply now. Let’s build something excellent!

title: Operations & Dispatch Coordinator (Virtual Dispatcher – PH, Full Time, Work From Home)

Technical Setup:

Schedule & Compensation

Performance bonuses based on reliability, accuracy, and call handling

Stable, long?term role with growth potential

When you apply through OnlineJobs.ph, include the following at the top of your message:



Your expected monthly salary in USD

A 2–4 sentence summary of your US phone experience (inbound & outbound)

Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a second step with a short call scenario and tech check.

title: Inbound Appointment Setter & Admin for US Junk Removal Company (Near?Native English Only)
description:
About the Role

We run a growing junk removal & light demolition company in Florida (USA). Most of our leads are high intent inbound calls from Google. Your #1 job is to answer/return those calls fast, understand what the customer really needs, and book them into our schedule. When phones are quiet, you’ll handle light admin tasks.



Salary: 

$900–$1,300 per month (full time) + performance bonuses based on booked & completed jobs. 

Salary once fully ramped with incentives can reach $1,500.



Responsibilities



Answer inbound calls from US customers and call back missed calls quickly.

Understand what the caller actually wants (example: difference between “where can I drop my brush?” vs “can you haul this brush away for me?”) and respond appropriately.

Ask a few simple questions, collect photos when needed, and book jobs into our calendar in the correct time windows.

Run our 7?day follow-up playbook on unbooked leads: calls, texts, and confirmations using our CRM (GoHighLevel).

Confirm next day jobs, reschedule when needed, and keep the schedule tight for our crews.

Do light admin work between calls (updating notes, simple spreadsheets, basic
 tasks).

Requirements



Excellent spoken and written English with near native / neutral American accent.

Strong listening and comprehension skills. You must catch subtle differences in what people say and ask clarifying questions.

Prior experience on the phone with US/UK/AU customers (appointment setting, customer service, or call center). Ideally 3 years on the phone with us/uk/eu customers.

Comfortable working US hours (roughly 9am–5pm US Eastern,  Monday to Saturday).

Reliable internet, backup connection, and a quiet place to take calls.

Coachable, reliable, and willing to follow scripts AND use judgment when real life doesn’t match the script.

Nice to Have



Experience with home services (plumbing, HVAC, cleaning, junk removal, etc.).

Experience using CRMs like GoHighLevel, HubSpot, or similar.

Compensation



Full time, 50 hours/week.

Competitive salary based on experience, paid weekly (we will discuss your desired rate).

Long term role for the right person; we invest in training and want you with us for years, not months.

How to Apply (follow these steps exactly)



Subject line: Appointment Setter – [Your Name]

Include:

Your resume.

Your expected monthly salary in USD for full time work.

Voice sample (required):

Record 45–60 seconds (Vocaroo, Loom, etc.) introducing yourself and reading this scenario in your own words:

“A caller says: ‘Can I drop my brush off somewhere?’

Please respond as if you work for our junk removal company. Clarify what they mean and explain what we can or cannot do for them.”

Please include your current tech setup. Which laptop/desktop you are using, how many monitors, etc.

Please include an image of a typing test result on 
. Medium text - 1 minute in duration.

Send the link in your application.

Screenshot of your internet speed test.

Applications that do not follow all steps will not be considered.

title: VA Interior Design Assistant
description:
About Us

We are a dynamic and growing interior design firm looking for a highly organized and proactive Virtual Assistant (VA) to support our design team remotely. This role is perfect for someone with experience in interior design and a passion for supporting creative teams. You’ll work closely with designers to bring their vision to life through 3D modeling, project coordination, and procurement logistics. If you’re a detail-oriented professional who thrives in a fast-paced environment, we want to hear from you!



Key Responsibilities

- 3D Modeling & Rendering: Collaborate with designers to create high-quality 3D models and photorealistic renderings using design tools such as SketchUp, Revit, or similar software.

- Construction & Planning Documentation: Assist in preparing floor plans, elevations, sections, and other technical drawings for design development and construction.

- Materials & Product Research: Research materials, finishes, and furnishings that meet the project’s needs; compile detailed product specifications and comparisons.

- Vendor Communication & Procurement Support: Coordinate with vendors and suppliers to request samples, pricing, and lead times. Help prepare procurement schedules and manage order tracking.

- Project Coordination: Keep digital files organized, maintain project documentation, and ensure designers are updated on outstanding tasks and product delivery timelines.

- Administrative Support: Provide general administrative assistance, including scheduling meetings, updating client presentations, and entering data for project tracking.

Qualifications

- Proven experience in interior design support or a related Virtual Assistant role.

- Proficiency in design software: Revit (Priority), Enscape for SketchUp, Enscape for Rhino, or other rendering software. Familiarity with Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, InDesign) is a plus.

- Strong research, organizational, and multitasking skills.

- Excellent written and verbal communication abilities.

- Self-motivated, dependable, and able to manage tasks independently in a remote setting.

- Must be available to work during PST business hours.

Why Join Us?

- Work with a creative and collaborative design team that values innovation and attention to detail.

- Flexible, remote work environment that promotes work-life balance.

- Opportunity to grow and gain hands-on experience in a fast-paced interior design setting.

Ready to be part of an innovative design team?

If you’re passionate about interior design, tech-savvy, and thrive in a remote role, we’d love to have you onboard. Apply today!

title: Mortgage Loan Processor
description:
Job Title: Mortgage Loan Processor



Employment Type: Full-Time



Company: NEXA Mortgage, LLC



Position Overview

We are seeking a reliable and detail-oriented Mortgage Loan Processor to support our growing pipeline. This position will work directly with the Loan Originator to ensure files move smoothly from application to closing. The ideal candidate is organized, proactive, and comfortable communicating directly with borrowers to collect documentation and keep loans moving efficiently.



This role will primarily involve processing Conventional, FHA, and DSCR loans.



Key Responsibilities



Review new loan files for completeness and accuracy.



Submit files to underwriting and manage the loan through the underwriting process.



Review conditional approvals and prepare a clear list of required conditions.



Communicate directly with borrowers to request and collect required documentation.



Explain underwriting conditions to borrowers in a clear and professional manner.



Follow up with borrowers, third parties, and vendors to obtain outstanding items.



Upload and organize documents in the loan file and ensure compliance requirements are met.



Work with the Loan Originator to resolve underwriting conditions quickly.



Monitor loan progress and keep files moving toward clear to close.



Coordinate with title, appraisal, insurance, and other third-party providers as needed.



Loan Types Processed



Conventional Loans



FHA Loans



DSCR / Investor Loans



Qualifications



Prior experience as a Mortgage Loan Processor or Loan Coordinator preferred.



Familiarity with mortgage documentation and underwriting conditions.



Experience working with Conventional, FHA, and/or DSCR loans is a strong plus.



Strong communication skills and ability to work directly with borrowers.



Highly organized with strong attention to detail.



Ability to manage multiple loan files simultaneously.



Comfortable using mortgage software/LOS systems and document management platforms.



Key Traits for Success



Strong follow-up and file management skills



Clear communication with borrowers and third parties



Ability to keep loans moving efficiently through underwriting



Detail-oriented and deadline-driven



Compensation



Compensation will be based on experience and qualifications.



How to Apply



Please submit your resume and a brief summary of your mortgage processing experience.

title: Content Creator
description:
Attention Media is a marketing company that specializes in video marketing but we also do some graphic design. We are looking for the right person to join our team . We want someone to grow our business with. Someone who is honest and dependable. We are looking for someone who wants to work with 1 organization and not freelance. We are looking for an honest Video/Content Editor to assemble recorded footage into a finished project that matches our vision and is suitable for our clients. Ultimately, as a Content and Video Editor, you should be able to bring sight and sound together in order to tell a cohesive story with video and print/images. You will also be creating and posting the content for our clients. 



Responsibilities:



Manage workload and content input forms from clients

Communication call project status

Creation of flyers and other digital assets

Trim footage segments and create polished content

Input music, dialogues, graphics and effects

Create rough and final cuts

Continuously discover and implement new editing technologies and industry’s best practices to maximize efficiency.



Requirements and skills:

Proven work experience as a Video Editor

Graphic design skills

Solid experience with digital technology and editing software packages (e.g. Premiere, After Effects, Final Cut, Photoshop, Illustrator, Indesign)

Demonstrable video editing ability with a strong portfolio

Creative mind and storytelling skills



We are looking for a full-time worker(30 - 40 hours a week) on US Time to start

We are looking to make our decision soon 



To apply please send create and send a video message using YouTube to:





In video please state the following:

Name

if you can work Monday - Friday 9am - 5pm (Arizona, USA) 

Your experience

how dependable you are

how dependable you set up is(computer, electricity, etc)

Macbook or PC and why

What makes you the best person for the job



Feel free to add more and even do a little editing if you like but videos will not be considered without the info above addressed.

title: Finance Virtual Assistant (Loans & Lending Support)
description:
We’re looking for a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant with experience supporting a loan, lending, or finance-related business to join our growing debt advisory and capital markets team.



This is not a general admin role. The ideal candidate has experience working with financial documents, loan files, and structured processes, and can communicate professionally with clients while keeping information organized.



Important: This role requires prior experience in lending, loans, mortgage, finance, or similar financial services industries. If you do not have experience in these areas, this role will not be the right fit.



Key Responsibilities



Client Onboarding & Document Management

• Set up and manage secure client data rooms (Google Drive, Dropbox, SharePoint)

• Create and maintain standardized folder structures

• Distribute document request lists and track received vs. missing items

• Follow up with clients on outstanding documents

• Maintain version control and confidentiality



Financial Document Organization

• Collect and organize: financial statements (P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow), bank statements, tax returns, AR/AP aging, and debt schedules

• Ensure consistent file naming and date formats

• Flag missing documents or periods (minimal interpretation required)



CRM Administration (HubSpot)

• Create and update contacts, companies, and deals

• Maintain clean and consistent CRM records

• Update deal stages, notes, and activity logs

• Generate basic pipeline reports



PowerPoint & Presentation Support

• Prepare draft pitch decks using provided templates

• Populate slides with provided financial and company data

• Proofread and format lender-ready materials

• Create lender-specific versions when needed



Scheduling & Admin Support

• Coordinate meetings and manage calendars

• Send invites, agendas, and follow-ups

• Maintain internal trackers and process checklists

• Assist with document editing and light research



Qualifications

• At least 2 years of experience supporting a loan, lending, mortgage, or finance-related business

• Experience handling financial documents and loan-related information

• Experience with CRM systems (HubSpot preferred)

• Excellent written English and professional communication skills

• Strong organization and attention to detail

• Proficient in Microsoft Office and Google Workspace

• Reliable internet connection and professional home office setup

• Availability during Mountain Standard Time (MST) business hours

• Comfortable using a time-tracking system

• Must have a valid NBI Clearance



How to Apply

Please send a link to your resume along with a cover letter describing your experience supporting a loan, lending, mortgage, or finance-related business, including your experience with CRM systems (preferably HubSpot) and organizing financial or client information.



Applications without relevant finance or lending experience will not be considered.

title: Cold Caller & Appointment Setter (Real Estate – Go High Level CRM)
description:

Remote | Full Time | US Company (EST Hours)



We are a US-based real estate wholesale company looking for an experienced Cold Caller & Appointment Setter who is confident speaking with property owners and managing leads inside Go High Level (GHL).



This role requires someone who is organized, consistent with follow-ups, and comfortable making high volumes of outbound calls daily. Experience with Go High Level CRM is strongly preferred.



You will be responsible for calling leads, qualifying motivated sellers, booking appointments, and managing opportunities inside the CRM pipeline.



Responsibilities

Manage and update opportunities and pipelines inside Go High Level (GHL)



Send follow-up texts,
s, and calls using the CRM

Required Experience

Familiar with managing pipelines and opportunities



Comfortable using calling, texting, and
 tools within a CRM



Strong conversation skills and objection handling



Ability to follow scripts while maintaining natural conversations



Communication Requirements

Must read, write, and speak English fluently



Clear speaking voice with professional communication skills



Comfortable speaking with US-based property owners



Remote Work Requirements

Reliable high-speed internet connection

Good headset and microphone



Ability to work during US Eastern Standard Time (EST) hours



Strong self-management and reliability



Application Requirements (Important)

Real estate wholesaling

Compensation

Compensation is based on experience and performance, and may include:



Hourly pay



Performance bonuses



Appointment or deal-based incentives

title: Right-Hand for Business Coach
description:
I’m looking for a highly capable, proactive, detail-oriented right-hand assistant to support me inside my coaching business. Someone who is resourceful, creative, organized, and tech-savvy, someone who can wear multiple hats, contribute ideas, and execute with excellence.



You will be working closely with me as a key support person in my business. I need someone who can help bring ideas to life, keep projects moving, and make sure the many moving pieces behind content, launches, marketing, and backend setup are handled well.



I own an agency, but this role is focused on supporting me directly in my coaching business and brand. Because of that, I’m especially interested in someone who understands the fast-paced nature of working closely with a founder, coach, or solopreneur and who is comfortable being a true right hand.



What you’ll help with



This role will include a mix of marketing support, creative execution, launch assistance, backend setup, and day-to-day implementation.



Examples of what you may be responsible for include:



- Creating simple, polished graphics for social media



- Scheduling and posting content on social media



- Using AI tools to help draft
s and support
 marketing execution



- Assisting with launches and promotions



- Helping organize moving parts during campaigns and launches



- Collaborating with me on ideas, strategy, and creative direction



- Taking ideas and executing them without needing constant hand-holding



- Building and formatting sales pages in Showit



- Setting up checkout pages and product details in ThriveCart



- Setting up tags, segments, forms, and
 sequences in ConvertKit



- Making sure all backend details are connected and working properly



- Following through on small but important details so nothing gets missed



Who I’m looking for



You are someone who enjoys being the go-to support person in a business. You are not just waiting for instructions, you are paying attention, thinking ahead, spotting gaps, and helping things move forward.



You are likely a great fit if you are:



- Proactive and self-starting



- Creative, resourceful, and solution-oriented



- Organized and detail-oriented



- Comfortable juggling a variety of tasks and projects



- Able to think strategically, while also executing the details



- Strong with communication and follow-through



- Comfortable using tech platforms and figuring things out



- Someone who takes ownership and pride in doing things well



Experience that would be a strong plus



- Experience supporting a coach, founder, personal brand, or solopreneur



- Experience working in a fast-moving online business



- Familiarity with Showit, ThriveCart, and ConvertKit



- Experience supporting launches, promotions, or offer rollouts



- Experience creating social media graphics and posting content



- Comfort using AI tools to improve speed and workflow



- Ability to connect strategy with execution



Important note about this role



I’m looking for someone versatile. Someone who has a jack-of-all-trades skill set and personality. You do not need to be the world’s best copywriter or designer, but you do need to be capable, adaptable, and confident across different areas of the business.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys being deeply involved, loves supporting a visionary founder, and can help turn ideas into action.



To apply



Please include the following in your application:



A short intro about you and your background



Examples of businesses, founders, coaches, or solopreneurs you’ve supported



Which of these tools you’ve used: Showit, ThriveCart, ConvertKit



A brief description of the kinds of launches or backend setups you’ve helped with



Why you think you’d be a strong fit for this role



Your CV, portfolio, website if you have one.



The word Right Hand at the top of your application so I know you read this post fully

title: Sales-Driven Lead Follow-Up Specialist Voice Note Required
description:
We are seeking a highly reliable, persistent, and organized communicator to proactively manage and follow up with hundreds of warm business leads daily. Leads have already engaged with marketing texts/emails, inquired about funding, or started an application. Your mission is to contact, guide, and move every lead forward until their submission is complete and funding is finalized. This role is ideal for someone who thrives on persistence, loves talking to people, and is excited to grow with our company.



Important application instruction: We will only review candidates who include a brief voice note as part of their application and who begin their summary with the exact phrase “GFS.” This helps us quickly identify highly proactive, confident communicators.



What You’ll Do

Lead Follow-Up & Outreach





Reach out to warm leads early each day via text, phone calls, and



Respond quickly to inbound messages and inquiries



Re-engage leads who stopped responding after inquiring



Thoroughly follow up with approximately 100 inactive leads daily to re-activate interest



Use a structured, repeatable approach to stay organized and consistent



Application Completion & Missing Information





Contact applicants who started or submitted an application



Identify and collect any missing information or documents



Assist clients in completing incomplete applications



Accurately fill in missing details provided by clients



Collect required stipulations and supporting documents



Offer Follow-Up & Deal Completion





Notify clients when offers are available and explain next steps



Answer basic questions and address objections



Persistently follow up with non-responsive clients



Chase outstanding items needed to finalize funding



Keep each deal moving forward until completion



Pipeline & Communication Management





Track conversations and follow-ups across multiple leads



Maintain organized records of client status



Ensure no lead or submission falls through the cracks



What This Role Requires





Consistent, persistent follow-up throughout the entire client lifecycle—from initial outreach to completed funding



Strong preference for someone who excels at phone-based communication, objection handling, and high-volume outreach



A personality that is sales-oriented, motivated, and excited to engage with leads



A willingness to grow with the company and embrace ongoing learning



Requirements





Excellent English communication skills (written & verbal)



Comfortable calling, texting, and
ing clients all day



Highly organized and detail-oriented



Persistent and proactive with follow-ups



Reliable internet and a quiet, distraction-free work environment



Sales or customer service experience is preferred



Proficiency with CRM or lead-tracking tools is beneficial



Ideal Candidate





Persistent, responsive, and detail-oriented



Comfortable managing a high volume of client communication



Confident in handling objections and turning rebuttals into progress



Ready to grow with us and contribute to a fast-moving, results-driven team



Compensation & Work Arrangements





Competitive hourly rate + performance incentives



Flexible, remote work from the Philippines



Consistent daily workflow with clear targets and accountability



Training and ongoing coaching to improve phone technique and objection handling



How to Apply (immediate steps)





Create a short voice note introducing yourself (1–2 minutes max) addressing:



Why you’re excited about this role



Your experience with sales, outreach, or customer service



Your comfort level with high-volume phone calls and handling objections







Start your application with the exact word GFS (case-insensitive) in your summary or first line.



In your application summary, mention how you would approach:



Re-engaging a non-responsive lead



Handling a common objection about funding timelines



Keeping a submission moving toward finalization







Note for applicants: We will only review candidates who include the voice note and start with “GFS.” This ensures we’re engaging with proactive, ready-to-perform professionals.



Interview Process





Short introduction call to confirm language fluency and comfort with phone-based outreach



Short practical assessment: role-play a 5-minute outbound call, including objection handling



Final fit and availability discussion



Equal Opportunity

We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds, with a preference for strong communicators

title: Au Intermediate/ Senior Tax Accountant
description:
Flexible 10–40 hours per week | Subcontracting Role | Long-Term Position



We are a growing Australian public accounting firm seeking an experienced Intermediate or Senior Accountant with solid Australian public practice experience.



This is a long-term subcontracting role suited to a technically strong accountant who can work independently, meet deadlines, and produce high-quality compliance work with minimal supervision.



Please do not apply if you do not have recent Australian public practice experience.



Minimum requirement: At least 3 years’ experience in an Australian public accounting practice.

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

• Bookkeeping and preparation of BAS and IAS

• Preparation of financial statements and income tax returns for:

       o Companies

       o Trusts

• General accounting and compliance work as directed by the Principal

• Working to Australian tax deadlines with accuracy and efficiency



SMSF experience is highly regarded but not essential.

________________________________________

Mandatory Requirements



• Minimum 3 years’ experience in Australian public practice

• Proven experience preparing Company & Trust tax returns independently

• Strong knowledge of Australian tax legislation and compliance deadlines

• Ability to interpret financial data and identify tax risks

• Proficient in Xero, MYOB, QuickBooks

• Advanced Excel skills (formulas, reconciliations, data checking)

• Excellent written and spoken English

• Able to follow structured systems and meet strict deadlines



HandiSoft experience is highly regarded.



This Role Is NOT Suitable For:



• Candidates without Australian tax return preparation experience

• Bookkeepers without tax preparation of tax return and financial statement experience

• Candidates needing constant supervision

• Short-term project seekers

________________________________________

Why Join Us

• Weekly payment — reliable and always on time

• Supportive, fair, and approachable Principal

• Long-term, stable engagement (not project-based)

• Flexible working hours (10–40 hours per week)

• Exposure to complex Australian tax and compliance work

• Structured systems and clear expectations

• Professional, respectful, and non-toxic work environment



To Apply



Please provide the following information:

1.	Summary of your Australian public practice experience, particularly your experience in preparing financial statements and income tax returns for companies and trusts.

2.	Accounting and tax software you have experience using (for example: Xero, MYOB, QuickBooks, HandiTax, etc.

3.	Your availability – how many hours per week you are able to work.

4.	Your expected hourly rate.

5.	Are you currently working for an Australian accounting practice? As an employee or a subcontractor?

If yes, please briefly describe your role and responsibilities.

6.	Reason for seeking a new opportunity / changing your current work environment.

7.	Internet and work setup – please confirm you have a reliable internet connection and a quiet work environment suitable for remote accounting work.



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: Video Editor: MUST be a pro with After Affects & Premier
description:
About Us

Sherpa is a performance-driven digital marketing agency specializing in roofing contractors across the US. We run high-volume Meta and Google ad campaigns — and the engine behind our results is great video. We're growing fast and need a talented editor to grow with us. 



The Role

We're looking for a sharp, fast, and creative Video/Content Editor who specializes in short-form social media ads. You'll be editing 15–60 second video ads designed to stop the scroll, communicate fast, and drive leads for our clients. This is a high-output, high-upside role for someone who takes their craft seriously.



What You'll Be Doing



Edit 15–60 second video ads for Meta 
/Instagram), YouTube, and TikTok

Cut raw footage into fast-paced, high-energy ads with strong hooks and clear calls to action

Add motion graphics, text animations, and branded overlays using After Effects

Color grade and audio mix footage to a professional standard

Adapt and resize video assets for multiple aspect ratios (9:16, 1:1, 16:9)

Deliver files on time, organized, and ready to upload — no hand-holding needed

Iterate quickly based on performance data and client feedback





Requirements



2+ years of professional video editing experience, specifically for social media ads

Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro — fast, clean, organized workflows

Expert-level proficiency in Adobe After Effects — motion graphics, text animation, compositing

A portfolio or reel of 15–60 second social media ad edits (required to be considered)

Strong sense of pacing, timing, and what makes an ad stop the scroll

Reliable internet, capable computer, and ability to meet deadlines consistently

Strong communicator — proactive about updates, feedback, and revisions





Nice to Have



Experience editing ads in home services, construction, or roofing

Green screen / chroma key compositing experience

Familiarity with direct response / performance advertising (not just brand content)





Compensation & Growth

This role starts as pay-per-project — you get paid for every video you deliver. For high performers, this grows into something much bigger:



???? Consistent project-based pay

???? Full-time salaried position offered to top performers

???? Performance bonuses include new computers, monitors, and upgraded editing setups

???? Bonus pay for ads that hit KPI targets

???? Real career growth as we scale

title: Full-Time AI Operations Virtual Assistant — Agentic AI, Automation & Digital Operations
description:
We are a Rhode Island-based AI company running multiple brands across healthcare, real estate, and AI SaaS. Our stack includes Claude (Anthropic), Kimi K2, n8n automation pipelines, Airtable, Vercel, and ClickUp — and we are deploying new AI tools constantly.



This is not a traditional VA role. This is an AI-augmented operations role for someone who understands that AI is not just a writing tool — it is an active, agentic system that can browse, execute, delegate, and build. If you know the difference between prompting an LLM and running an AI agent, you are already ahead of 95% of applicants.



WE PROVIDE OUR TOOLS. You will have access to our Claude subscription, Claude Chrome Extension, Claude Co-Work environment, and all relevant platform accounts. You bring the skill to operate them.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:



Agentic AI Operations:



Operate Claude Co-Work — Anthropic's desktop AI collaboration environment — to manage shared tasks, coordinate outputs, and work alongside AI agents in real time



Use the Claude Chrome Extension actively during your workday — summarizing pages, drafting responses, extracting data, researching competitors, and executing browser-based tasks on behalf of the team



Understand and work within agentic AI workflows — you are not just prompting for a blog post, you are helping orchestrate multi-step AI tasks that actually get things done



Automation and Content Operations:



Monitor and lightly manage n8n automation workflows — you do not need to build them, but you need to know when one breaks and what it is supposed to do



Publish and schedule AI-generated content using Nano Banana and similar tools across multiple brand accounts



Manage Airtable bases — content calendars, CRM-style records, blog engines, keyword trackers



Project and Team Coordination:



Manage task delegation in ClickUp — assigning work, updating statuses, pulling progress reports for leadership



Coordinate video production asset delivery for Virtual Twins AI — scripts, images, voiceover files, timelines



Draft AI-assisted content using Claude, format it, and push it live across platforms



Research and Intelligence:



Use the Claude Chrome Extension to conduct competitive research, summarize articles, extract pricing data, and brief the team



Identify and flag new AI tools relevant to our stack — we move fast and want someone paying attention to what is coming



YOU'RE THE RIGHT PERSON IF YOU:



Have real hands-on experience with Claude, ChatGPT, or similar LLMs — not casual use, actual daily work use



Understand the difference between a chatbot and an AI agent, and have explored agentic tools



Are confident navigating Airtable — linked records, views, formulas, automations



Have used any workflow automation platform — n8n, 
, or Zapier — even at a basic level



Are available Monday through Friday, 9AM to 5PM Eastern Time — this is a firm requirement, not a preference



Communicate clearly and concisely in written English



Get genuinely excited about new AI capabilities and stay current on what is being released



Can manage multiple brands simultaneously without mixing them up



PREFERRED BUT NOT REQUIRED:



Experience with the Claude Chrome Extension or Claude Co-Work — mention this explicitly, it matters



Background in healthcare, regulated content, or SaaS environments



Any exposure to Vercel, GitHub, or AI development pipelines



Basic HIPAA awareness — we publish for medical brands and discretion is important



TO APPLY, PLEASE INCLUDE ALL OF THE FOLLOWING — applications missing any item will not be reviewed:

title: Real Estate Virtual Operations & Marketing Partner
description:
Job Requisition: Real Estate Virtual Operations & Marketing Partner

Position: Real Estate Virtual Operations & Marketing Partner (US Market)

Location: Remote (Philippines)



Work Schedule: 40 hours per week, Monday – Friday. Must be available to work within 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM US Pacific Standard Time (PST), which is 12:00 AM (Midnight) – 10:00 AM Philippine Time (PHT).



Compensation: 40,000 – 55,000 PHP / month (Depending on experience)



We are a premier Virtual Assistant and AI agency dedicated to pairing world-class talent with top-performing businesses. We believe in empowering our tea
mbers, leveraging cutting-edge technology, and delivering unmatched operational excellence to our clients.



Role Overview

We are seeking an elite Virtual Operations Partner to own the operational movement of our clients' real estate businesses. Your core objective is to create predictable, scalable operations by managing transaction coordination, listing management, marketing execution, and CRM integrity. You will ensure that no contingency expires unnoticed, no deadline is missed, and the agent’s time is concentrated on revenue-generating activities.



Key Responsibilities:

Transaction & Listing Control

Contract-to-Close Management: Track timelines, monitor contingencies, coordinate inspections/appraisals, and communicate with escrow to ensure seamless closings.

Listing Management: Execute pre-listing checklists, schedule photographers, coordinate staging, ensure MLS data accuracy, and set up showing instructions. Listings must be launched organized and correctly positioned.

Buyer Workflow: Coordinate offer preparation, organize disclosure packets, set up timeline calendars, and track closing checklists.



Marketing & Database Management

Marketing Execution: Support digital presence via Canva graphic design, social media scheduling, SEO/SEM strategies,
 campaign deployment, and open house material preparation. Brand presentation must remain consistent and error-free.

CRM Integrity: Maintain contact entry accuracy, segment databases, log transactions, create follow-up tasks, and generate pipeline reports.



Communication: Ensure all written communication is clear, structured, and timely. Proactively update clients and vendors on current status, required actions, and timeline impacts.

Daily Operational Rhythm



Start of Day: Review all active transactions, confirm deadlines within 7 days, and identify risk points.

Midday: Follow up on inspections, escrow, and lenders; update the CRM; and confirm vendor timelines.

End of Day: Document transaction progress, prepare next-day priorities, and flag any compliance or risk items.



Qualifications & Requirements

Experience: Minimum of 3+ years experience as a Real Estate Virtual Assistant, Transaction Coordinator, or Operations Manager, with a mandatory focus on the US Real Estate industry.

Language: Exceptional, highly proficient English skills. Ability to write persuasive, error-free copy and professional transaction updates for an American audience.



Technical Skills: Proven expertise in real estate CRMs, MLS platforms, and transaction management software. Strong proficiency in Canva and foundational SEO/SEM.

Systemization: Ability to build and maintain listing checklist templates, buyer workflows, vendor contact lists, and compliance tracking forms.



Work-From-Home Infrastructure Requirements

Audio Equipment: A high-quality, professional-grade noise-canceling headset is mandatory.

Internet: Access to fast, reliable fiber-optic internet (minimum 50 Mbps) AND a reliable backup internet source.

Power: Uninterruptible Power Supply (UPS) or backup generator to ensure zero downtime.

Environment: A dedicated, quiet workspace free from household distractions.

title: Online Course Builder & Marketer — Remote, Full-Time ($7.50/hr, 40hrs/week)
description:
About Us

We’re ECS Agency, a UK-based done-for-you online course creation company. We build complete course businesses for coaches and consultants — from market research to curriculum design to platform builds to launch marketing. We currently have 20+ active clients and are growing fast. We need a second full-time course builder to work alongside our existing builder.



The Role

You’ll own the full build process for clients — taking them from onboarding through to a finished, launched course business. You won’t be doing video production or editing (we have a separate team for that). Your focus is everything else.



What you’ll be doing daily:

 ? Market research and competitor analysis for client niches

 ? Course curriculum design and content structuring (using our AI-assisted tools and frameworks)

 ? Writing and refining course scripts and lesson outlines

 ? Building websites, funnels, and landing pages in GoHighLevel and Framer

 ? Building course platforms and uploading content

 ? Creating 7-day challenge content (scripts,
s, social posts, registration pages)

 ? Building launch marketing assets (28-day launch sequences,
 campaigns, social content)

 ? Setting up automations and workflows in GoHighLevel

 ? Coordinating with our video editing team (sending briefs, receiving finished videos, uploading to platforms)

 ? Managing your own task list in ClickUp and hitting deadlines without being chased



Pay & Hours

 ? $7.50/hr, 40 hours/week ($1,300/month)

 ? Working hours: 8:00 AM — 4:00 PM UK time (GMT/BST)

 ? Paid weekly or biweekly

 ? Long-term, ongoing position — this is not freelance or project work



What We’re Looking For

Must-haves:

 ? GoHighLevel experience — funnels, websites, automations, workflows. This is non-negotiable. You need to know GHL inside out.

 ? A good eye for web design. The funnels, websites, and landing pages you build need to look professional and polished, not templated

 ? Strong written English — you’ll be writing course content,
s, and marketing copy

 ? Experience using project management tools (ClickUp preferred) — you’ll manage your own tasks, hit deadlines, and update statuses without being micromanaged

 ? Self-driven and proactive — we don’t want someone who waits to be told what to do. You see a problem, you flag it. You find a better way, you suggest it. You finish a task, you move to the next one

 ? Reliable and deadline-driven — when a task has a due date, you hit it. If something’s going to be late, you communicate early

 ? Comfortable working independently with minimal supervision

 ? Available to start within 1 week

Strong advantages:

 ? Framer experience (website and landing page builds)

 ? Experience building online courses on any platform

 ? Experience writing marketing copy or
 sequences

 ? Familiarity with AI tools (ChatGPT, HeyGen, or similar)

 ? Background in digital marketing or funnel building

 ? Experience working with coaches or consultants



How We Work

All tasks are SOPed with Loom recordings and templates — you won’t be guessing how to do anything. But we don’t want someone who just follows instructions robotically. We expect you to improve on the SOPs as you go. If you find a faster way, a better layout, a cleaner process — we want to hear it. Your job is to make the work better over time, not just maintain it.



What You’ll Get

 ? Stable, full-time work with a growing agency

 ? Clear SOPs and frameworks for every task — proper onboarding, not guesswork

 ? AI tools that handle the heavy lifting — you’re refining and building, not starting from scratch

 ? Direct support from our existing builder who knows every system inside out

 ? Room to grow — this role can evolve into a team lead position as we scale



How to Apply

Send a short message with:

 1. Your experience with GoHighLevel — what have you built? Be specific (screenshots welcome)

 2. A link to or screenshot of a website/funnel you’ve designed that you’re proud of

 3. Any experience with online course creation, Framer, or funnel building

 4. A brief example of marketing copy or an
 you’ve written (even a screenshot is fine)

 5. Your availability — when can you start?

 6. Confirm you can work 8:00 AM — 4:00 PM UK time



We’ll send a paid test task ($15) to shortlisted applicants — a GHL funnel build + a short piece of course content — so we can see your actual work before committing.

title: Full-Time Video Editor & Graphic Designer (AI Tools + Marketing Experience)
description:
JOB TITLE:

Full-Time Video Editor & Graphic Designer (AI Tools + Marketing Experience)



ABOUT THE ROLE:

We're a digital marketing agency that works with service-based businesses (medspas, home services, fitness, legal, etc.), primarily in the US market. We're looking for a full-time Video Editor & Graphic Designer who can create scroll-stopping content across multiple formats.



You'll be our go-to creative person — editing short-form videos for social media, producing ad creatives for Meta and Google campaigns, and designing graphics for our clients' brands. You'll also work with AI tools like HeyGen and ElevenLabs to produce AI-generated video and voiceover content.



This isn't a "just cut clips together" role. You'll be creating content that directly drives leads and sales for real businesses, so you need to understand what makes people stop scrolling, click, and take action.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

-Edit short-form video content (Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts) — fast-paced, hook-driven, optimized for engagement

-Create video ads for Meta and Google campaigns (direct response style)

-Produce client deliverables such as testimonial videos, promo videos, and brand content

-Use AI video/voice tools (HeyGen, ElevenLabs) to create and enhance content

-Design static graphics — social media posts, ad creatives, thumbnails, banners

-Collaborate with our team on content strategy and creative direction

-Maintain consistent quality and meet turnaround deadlines



REQUIREMENTS:

-At least 2 years of experience in video editing (Premiere Pro, CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, or similar)

-Strong graphic design skills (Canva Pro at minimum; Photoshop/Illustrator is a plus)

-Experience editing short-form, direct-response, or social media content (not just vlogs or cinematic edits)

-Familiarity with AI content tools — HeyGen, ElevenLabs, or similar platforms

-Good eye for typography, color, and layout

-Understands hooks, pacing, and what performs well on social platforms

-Reliable internet connection and able to work during reasonable overlap hours

-Can manage multiple projects and hit deadlines without constant follow-up



NICE TO HAVE (Not Required, But a Big Plus):

-Experience designing or building landing pages (using tools like GoHighLevel, WordPress, Unbounce, or similar)

-Background working in or with a digital marketing agency

-Basic understanding of paid ads and what makes a creative convert

-Motion graphics or animation skills



COMPENSATION:

-Full-time position

-Salary is open and negotiable based on your experience and skill level

-Long-term role with room to grow as the agency scales



HOW TO APPLY:



Important: To make sure you actually read this post, please start your application with the word "Creative" — applications that don't include this will be skipped.



In your application, include:



-A brief intro about yourself and your relevant experience

-Links to your portfolio or samples of your work (video edits, graphics, landing pages if applicable)

-Which AI tools you've used and how you've used them

-Your expected monthly salary (in USD)

-Your availability to start



We review every application that follows these instructions. Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: AI Video Assistant
description:

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills are important - editing experience isn't required but is a PLUS.



Pay: TBD - this will depend on your level of skill and other people that apply for the job. Currently $75 to $100 per week (USD) for 25 hours per week.



You will be:

- Creating AI videos using VideoExpress;

- Editing using CapCut AI editing tool;

- Uploading completed videos to YouTube and Google Drive;

NOTE: This is a process-following job, not an editing job. All steps are provided for you. Minimal actual editing is needed. You will not write scripts, create prompts or make creative decisions. Your job is to follow the workflow exactly as provided.

Screen snapshots every 10 minutes will be needed.



Perks:

* You can work whenever you want. You will not have to wake up or work at any given time.

* Flexible Vacation: If you need time off, just let me know.

* Opportunity to learn new skills & get bonuses: If you do a good job, I will give you a raise and bonuses.

* Strong opportunity to become head editor, upon expansion.

* Opportunity for more hours and pay.

* Once a week Google Meets check-in.



About Me:

I am a growing documentary-style YouTube studio producing faith-based, historical and narrative long-form content. We are currently hiring a fast, reliable Video VA who can follow a clear, step-by-step system to produce consistent long-form videos using AI-generated scenes and CapCut.





To Apply for the job:

1. Change the subject line to “I Want to Work for You, Host of [Insert the name of my YouTube Channel]”

2.. At the top of your message, write 2-3 sentences on why you would like this position, and why you are a good fit. Do not write more than that or else your application will be deleted.

3. Under that, include a sample piece of video you have edited.



Minimum requirements for your system:

title: Do you love making people feel cared for? Support our CEOs as an Executive Personal Assistant!
description:
Title: Executive Personal Assistant



Important: Make sure to read the full listing for application instructions.



Do you love making people feel cared for? Are you the one who remembers everyone’s birthdays, plans amazing gatherings, makes fun plans, and brings warmth into the lives of those around you?



This is NOT your typical assistant job. It’s deeply personal. You’ll work with a kind but intense U.S.-based pair of brothers (proven entrepreneurs working as Co-CEOs of the same business) to support their lives, not the company they are building. From keeping friendships alive and planning meaningful experiences to sending thoughtful gifts and helping them stay on track with personal goals, you’ll be part organizer, part cheerleader, part coach. If you’ve ever been called the “mom” of your group and you’re looking for a decades-long position, this might be your dream job.



Your Role

* Build trust by executing on tasks and communicating clearly, which will lead to taking on more responsibility, which will then lead to increases in pay.

* Keep relationships thriving by managing a personal CRM and helping stay in touch with friends and family.

* Use technology to help automate certain tasks that are repetitive.

* Track habits, support routines, and act as an accountability partner for personal goals.

* Pick out thoughtful, creative gifts for birthdays and other special 
nts.

* Research products, tools, and ideas to make life easier, better, or more fun.

* Plan and book unforgettable travel, great hotels, and the perfect dinner spots.

* Jump in on special personal projects wherever a helping hand is needed.



What’s In It for You

* A Long-Term Role: This is meant to last. The entrepreneurs who you'd be an assistant to are looking for a lifetime assistant.

* Great Place to Work: These entrepreneurs are known to have a super high retention rate of employees and create a great work environment.

* Creative Work: From planning memorable trips to picking out the perfect gift, this role lets you flex your creative muscles and thoughtful side every day.

* Variety: No two days will feel the same. You’ll get to research, plan, coach, organize, and more.

* Paid Leave: You'll get at least 10 days of paid leave plus major holidays.

* Remote Flexibility: Work from the comfort of your home and gain flexibility with hours once trust is built.



Desired Attributes

* Extremely caring, social people-person who will excel in personal tasks

* High attention to detail and organizational skills

* Very strong written and oral English skills

* Minimum 50 Mbps Internet Speed

title: Python Programmer
description:
We are a specialized insurance agency looking for an experienced Python developer to build a backend automation script that processes our monthly commission statements.

Our carriers send us statements in wildly different formats (PDFs, CSVs, and ZIP folders). We need a script that takes a batch upload of these files, uses the Google Gemini API to intelligently extract the data, and standardizes it into a strict CSV format required by our CRM.

The Good News: You won't have to start from scratch. We have already written the core API interface code and the complex prompt engineering required to parse the unpredictable PDFs. We will provide you with a comprehensive Project Brief containing this code, the exact data formatting rules, and a ZIP file of dummy statements for you to test against.

Your Responsibilities:

File Handling: Write the logic to accept a batch of files (or extract a .zip) and feed them to the API loop one by one.

User Interface: Wrap the script in a simple, lightweight GUI (like Streamlit or Tkinter) so our team can drag-and-drop files to process them without using a command line.

API Integration: Implement our provided Gemini API starter code, forcing the model to return structured JSON. Handle API rate limits gracefully (e.g., using time.sleep()).

Data Formatting: Write the Python logic to enforce strict formatting rules (e.g., ensuring all extracted dates are formatted strictly as MM/DD/YY, calculating a "Total" row, and flagging missing data).

Dynamic Export: Configure the script to output separate, dynamically named CSV files for each statement processed (e.g., [Company Name] [Month] [Year].csv).

Security: Ensure the script automatically deletes processed files from Google's servers immediately after generation to protect client data.

Requirements:

Strong proficiency in Python.

Experience working with the Google Generative AI SDK (google-generativeai).

High attention to detail (our CRM requires exact column headers and date formats).

Project Scope:

This is a well-documented, straightforward project. We estimate it will take a competent developer 4 to 8 hours to complete and thoroughly test against our dummy data suite.

This will act as a paid test project. If the code is resilient and the instructions are followed perfectly, we have ongoing freelance development work available.

title: Lead Generation & Admin VA — Remote, Part-Time ($6/hr, 4hrs/day)
description:
About Us

We’re ECS Agency, a UK-based done-for-you online course creation company. We build complete course businesses for coaches and consultants. We acquire clients through cold
 at scale and need a dedicated lead generation VA to keep our sales pipeline full and support the team with admin tasks.



The Role

You’re the person who keeps the machine running. You’ll generate and qualify leads that feed our sales team, produce sample course content for prospects, and handle admin tasks that keep the business moving. Every task in this role is SOPed — you’ll follow clear, repeatable processes and be expected to execute them consistently and accurately.



What you’ll be doing daily:

 ? Sourcing and scraping leads from LinkedIn Sales Navigator and Instagram (coaches, consultants, course creators)

 ? Cleaning and qualifying lead data — filtering by follower count, niche, engagement, and relevance

 ? Uploading and managing leads in our database and CRM systems

 ? Producing sample course content to send to prospects as part of our sales process (following SOPs and templates)

 ? Running data through our AI-powered filtering and personalisation tools

 ? Maintaining cold
 infrastructure — monitoring deliverability, managing domain health, flagging issues

 ? General admin support — managing files, updating spreadsheets, organising assets, and other tasks as needed to support the team



Pay & Hours

 ? $6/hr, 4 hours/day, 5 days/week ($520/month)

 ? Working hours: 8:00 AM — 12:00 PM UK time (GMT/BST)

 ? Paid weekly or biweekly

 ? Long-term, ongoing position



What We’re Looking For

Must-haves:

 ? LinkedIn Sales Navigator experience — you need to know how to search, filter, and extract leads efficiently. This is non-negotiable.

 ? Experience with lead generation, data scraping, or list building

 ? Strong attention to detail — bad data wastes everyone’s time and costs us money

 ? Reliable and consistent — this role requires daily output, not bursts of effort followed by silence

 ? Comfortable following SOPs precisely — every task is documented, you follow the process

 ? Good written English

 ? Fast learner — we use specific tools and workflows that we’ll train you on

 ? Available to start within 1 week

Strong advantages:

 ? Experience with Instagram scraping tools (Phantombuster, Apify, or similar)

 ? Experience with cold
 systems (Instantly, Smartlead, or similar)

 ? Familiarity with GoHighLevel, PostgreSQL, or n8n

 ? Experience with AI tools (ChatGPT or similar)

 ? Background in B2B lead generation or sales support

 ? Experience working with coaches, consultants, or course creators

 ? Admin or virtual assistant experience



What You’ll Get

 ? Stable, ongoing work with a growing agency

 ? Clear SOPs for every single task — you’ll never be guessing what to do

 ? Training on all our tools and systems

 ? Opportunity to grow as we scale — more hours and higher pay for strong performers



How to Apply

Send a short message with:

 1. Your experience with LinkedIn Sales Navigator — how have you used it? Be specific

 2. Any experience with lead scraping, cold
 tools, or CRM systems

 3. An example of a lead gen or data task you’ve completed (even a brief description is fine)

 4. Your availability — when can you start?

 5. Confirm you can work 8:00 AM — 12:00 PM UK time

We’ll send a paid test task ($10) to shortlisted applicants so we can see your actual work before committing.

title: Web Developer
description:
PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR RESUME (PDF) AND PORTFOLIO WHEN APPLYING.



Position Overview

We are seeking a skilled Web Developer with strong WordPress expertise to join our team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for building, maintaining, and optimizing WordPress websites that are both visually appealing and functionally robust.



Key Responsibilities

A. WordPress Development

Develop and maintain custom WordPress themes and plugins

Build responsive, mobile-first websites that work seamlessly across all devices

Customize existing themes and plugins to meet specific project requirements

Ensure website performance, security, and scalability

Troubleshoot and debug WordPress issues efficiently

Implement custom functionality using PHP, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript



B. Website Management

Perform regular website updates and maintenance

Optimize website speed and performance

Ensure cross-browser compatibility

Implement website backups and security measures

Manage WordPress core, theme, and plugin updates

Integrate third-party tools and APIs as needed



C. Collaboration & Quality Assurance

Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Conduct thorough website testing and quality assurance

Collaborate with designers, content creators, and project stakeholders

Manage version control using Git

Stay updated with the latest WordPress and web development trends



Required Qualifications

3 + years of experience in WordPress development

Strong proficiency in PHP, HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript

Experience with WordPress theme and plugin development

Knowledge of responsive design and mobile optimization

Familiarity with page builders (Elementor, WPBakery, Gutenberg, etc.)

Experience with MySQL databases

Understanding of web hosting environments and cPanel/WHM

Portfolio demonstrating previous WordPress projects



Preferred Qualifications

Experience with modern JavaScript frameworks (React, Vue.js)

Knowledge of website accessibility standards (WCAG)

Familiarity with REST APIs and integrations

Experience with e-commerce platforms (WooCommerce)

Understanding of website security best practices

Experience with CSS preprocessors (SASS, LESS)



Technical Skills

WordPress (custom themes, plugins, Gutenberg blocks)

PHP, MySQL

HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript/jQuery

Git version control

Cross-browser compatibility testing

Performance optimization

Responsive web design



Soft Skills

Strong problem-solving abilities

Excellent attention to detail

Ability to work independently and as part of a team

Good communication skills

Time management and ability to meet deadlines

Willingness to learn and adapt to new technologies



Work Setup:

-Work hours: 9:00 AM to 5:30 PM Pacific Standard Time (with 30-minute lunch break)

-Long-term growth opportunity with a prestigious U.S. luxury real estate brand

-No time tracker, but required to be responsive during working hours
