title: Appointment Setter / Outreach Specialist (Part-Time, Scale to Full-Time)
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE:

We're a digital marketing agency that helps service-based businesses in the US (medspas, home services, fitness, legal, etc.) generate leads and book appointments through paid ads, funnels, and AI-powered automation.



We're looking for an Appointment Setter / Outreach Specialist who can help us fill our sales pipeline. Your job is simple — reach out to business owners in our target niches, start conversations, and book qualified calls on our calendar.



This is NOT cold calling. You'll be doing outreach through
,
/Instagram DMs, and LinkedIn. You'll follow proven scripts and sequences that we provide. Your success is measured by conversations started and appointments booked — not by closing deals. We handle the sales calls.



This starts as a part-time role with a clear path to full-time as we scale.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

-Send 30-50 personalized outreach messages per day across
,
/Instagram DMs, and LinkedIn

-Follow up with prospects who've shown interest but haven't booked yet

-Build and maintain lead lists using Google Maps,
 Ad Library, directories, and other tools

-Qualify prospects based on criteria we provide before booking them

-Book qualified appointments directly on our calendar

-Track all outreach activity and results in our CRM (GoHighLevel)

-Report daily numbers — messages sent, replies received, appointments booked

-Suggest improvements to scripts and sequences based on what you're seeing in real conversations



REQUIREMENTS:

-At least 1 year of experience in outreach, appointment setting, lead generation, or a similar role

-Excellent written English — your messages need to sound natural, not robotic or spammy

-Experience with
/Instagram DM outreach and
 outreach

-Comfortable using LinkedIn for professional outreach

-Organized and self-driven — you'll be working independently and managing your own daily targets

-Familiar with CRMs or willing to learn GoHighLevel quickly

-Reliable internet connection and responsive during agreed working hours

-Understands the difference between being persistent and being pushy



NICE TO HAVE (Not Required, But a Big Plus):

-Experience setting appointments for a marketing agency or B2B service

-Familiarity with GoHighLevel or similar CRMs (HubSpot, Close, etc.)

-Background in or understanding of digital marketing services

-Experience with list-building tools (Apollo, Instantly, Hunter, etc.)

-Previous outreach to US-based small business owners



COMPENSATION:

-Starts as part-time with a clear path to full-time based on performance

-Base salary is open and negotiable based on your experience

-Performance bonuses for appointments that convert to signed clients are on the table

-Long-term role — we're building a team, not looking for a quick fill



HOW TO APPLY:

I-mportant: To make sure you actually read this post, please start your application with the word "Pipeline" — applications that don't include this will be skipped.



In your application, include:

-A brief intro about yourself and your experience in outreach or appointment setting

-Examples of outreach messages you've sent before (DM,
, or LinkedIn — even screenshots work)

-The niches or industries you've done outreach for in the past

-Your expected monthly salary (in USD)

-Your availability to start and how many hours per day you can commit

title: Job Title: Outbound Outreach Specialist – B2B SaaS Waitlist (FlowCFO)
description:
About Us



FlowCFO is an AI-powered cash flow and spending tool built for small business owners and startup finance teams. We’re launching soon and need to build our waitlist before our MVP goes live. We’re a fast-moving startup with a small remote team.



The Role

We’re looking for a proactive, detail-oriented outreach specialist to run outbound campaigns across LinkedIn,
, and online communities to drive signups to our waitlist. This is not a copy-paste spamming job — we need someone who can write naturally, personalize messages, and think about what will actually make someone want to sign up.

What You’ll Do

	?	Send 120 personalized LinkedIn connection requests and DMs per day to targeted prospects (small business owners, startup founders, finance leads)

	?	Build prospect lists using free tools like 
 or LinkedIn search filters

	?	Send cold
 sequences to relevant contacts

	?	Post genuinely helpful content and waitlist links in relevant Reddit,
, and LinkedIn groups

	?	Track all outreach daily in a simple Google Sheet (contacts reached, responses, signups)

	?	Report to you weekly with numbers and what’s working

What We’re Looking For

	?	Previous experience with LinkedIn outreach, cold
, or lead generation — this is required, not a nice-to-have

	?	Strong written English — your messages need to sound human and professional, not templated

	?	Self-starter who can work independently without micromanagement

	?	Familiarity with tools like 
, 
, or similar is a plus

	?	Experience in B2B, SaaS, or fintech outreach is a strong plus



Performance Expectation

The goal is 500 waitlist signups. We’ll track this together and expect consistent daily activity with weekly reporting.



Hours

Full-time (40 hrs/week) or part-time (20 hrs/week) considered. Must overlap at least 4 hours with US EST or CST business hours for LinkedIn/email timing.



Pay

$700–$900/month full-time depending on experience, paid weekly via Wise or similar. Performance bonus: $1 per confirmed waitlist signup above 100 — so there’s real upside for strong performers.



To Apply



Send a short Loom video (2-3 minutes max) introducing yourself and explaining one outreach campaign you’ve run before — what you did, what the goal was, and what results you got. Applications without a Loom will not be reviewed.

title: Customer Service / Account Executive
description:
SBFM are a soft facilities management company operating within the UK. We deliver bespoke cleaning services to our clients and manage up to 70 contracts nationwide.



As an Account Executive you will be pivotal to supporting with the delivery of effective account management and administration, ensuring that our contracts are managed in line with agreed KPIs.



The hours for this position will align with our UK office opening times - core hours would be between 6am-6pm UK time but there may be some requirement to flex outside of these hours. The role also requires weekend work on a rota basis.



Duties and Responsibilities:



- Manage (daily) the time and attendance system, ensuring all of our cleaners records are accurate and maintained

- Contract retention - working as part of a management team ensuring high standards of service, customer satisfaction as per agreed client KPIs

- Driving and enforcing the use of the clocking-in system with our cleaners operating in the field.

- Building and maintaining positive site-level client relationships

- Provision of information to cleaners relating to their role (clocking in details, cleaning spec. etc.)

- Cover clean management, utilizing existing workforce where possible

- Shift allocation/loading up and recording, including monitoring holiday entitlement/absence reporting etc.

- Monitoring clocking compliance and driving use of T&A system in accordance with SBFM policy

- Recruitment to fill vacancies

- Ensuring health & safety legislation is followed at all times.

- Escalate concerns to Contract Manager as necessary.

- Respond to ad hoc requests from Operations Director/Office Manager

- Completing stock check and follow agreed process for ordering

- Order all stock for sites within agreed budgets (via approved suppliers with no deviation without Director approval).

- Completion of monthly RAG calls

- Reporting repairs (on Smartsheet)

- Collecting onboarding data from new starters and issue site SIN and individual PIN codes

- Creating POs and completing relevant spreadsheet

- Ensuring site stock/equipment levels are maintained.

- Packing and posting of postal items

- Support with the delivery of mobilisation tasks, including (but not limited to): consultations, recruitment, stock orders, T&A set up, uniforms and site packs etc.



Skills and Experience

Essential

•	Strong English language.

•	Experience working in a role involving high call volumes or outbound calling.

•	Strong attention to detail and ability to accurately record information in multiple systems.

•	Ability to follow structured processes and apply policies consistently.

•	Confident and professional telephone manner.

•	Strong organisational and time management skills.

•	Ability to remain calm and professional when dealing with challenging conversations.

•	Good working knowledge of Microsoft Office and workforce management systems.

Desirable

•	Experience in facilities management, workforce scheduling, or operational support.

•	Experience dealing with absence management or HR-related processes.

•	Experience working with large, geographically dispersed workforces.

title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant (Social Media + CRM + Admin Support)
description:
We are a growing U.S.-based real estate company in Atlanta, Georgia, United States looking for a long-term Virtual Assistant to help manage social media, marketing, CRM systems, and administrative tasks.



This position is ideal for someone who is organized, tech-savvy, creative, and interested in working in the real estate industry long-term.



We are looking for someone reliable who wants stable work, skill development, and long-term growth with our company.



Work Schedule: Monday – Friday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM EST (U.S. Eastern Time)



You must be able to work during these hours consistently.



Salary: Starting Pay: 

* $5 USD per hour (first 30 days)

*  After the first 30 days: $6 USD per hour

*  Future raises every 6 months.



We are looking for someone who wants long-term employment and growth.



Main Responsibilities: You will assist with the following marketing, social media, CRM management, and business administration tasks.



Social Media Management:

*  Schedule and post daily social media content

* Create real estate graphics using Canva

*  Create and Edit short-form videos using CapCut

* Create AI videos using HeyGen and Elevenlabs

*  Create TikTok property tour videos and Instagram Reels

* Monitor and respond to social media comments and messages

* Post updates about listings, open houses, and real estate tips

*  Research trending content ideas

*  Manage YouTube channel uploads

* Create short clips using Opus.pro

*  Help grow social media followers and engagement

*  Help run social media ad campaigns



Content Creation:

* Write blog posts and real estate articles

*  Assist with newsletter creation

*  Create marketing graphics

*  Prepare weekly
 newsletters

*  Assist with content for training materials and online courses



CRM & Real Estate Support:

*  Manage and maintain our real estate CRM

* Update contact records and ensure data accuracy

* Maintain Lofty CRM (we will train you how to use it)

* Create contact lists and databases

* Track marketing performance reports

* Help prepare business performance reports



Administrative Tasks:

*  Conduct online research

*  Create and maintain Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs)

*  Organize digital files and marketing assets

*  Assist with client onboarding

*  Help with recruiting campaigns

*  Prepare weekly progress reports

* Help build and organize our internal knowledge hub



Tools We Use:



Experience with all these tools not required, but is highly desired:

*  Canva

*  CapCut

*  CRM systems 

*  WordPress

* ChatGPT

*  Hootsuite or other scheduling tools

* Constant Contact

*  YouTube tools (VidIQ helpful)

* Google Docs / Google Drive



Required Skills



We strongly prefer applicants who have:



* Real estate industry experience

*  Experience managing a CRM system

* Strong Canva design skills

*  Experience editing videos in CapCut

*  Excellent English communication

*  Strong organization skills

* Ability to follow instructions carefully

* Ability to work independently



Technical Requirements



You must have:

*  A reliable computer

*  Stable high-speed internet

*  A quiet workspace

*  Ability to work full-time during U.S. business hours



What We Are Looking For



We want someone who is:

* Reliable

* Detail-oriented

* Organized

* Creative

* Tech-savvy

*  Interested in long-term work



If you perform well, this role can grow into a long-term marketing manager role within our company.



How to Apply:



When applying, please include:

*  Your resume

*  Links to social media pages you have managed

*  Examples of Canva graphics you created

*  Examples of videos you edited in CapCut

*  A list of which of our tools you have used in the past

*  Please record a short 2–3 minute video introducing yourself and answering these questions:

1. Your experience working with real estate companies

2. Your experience using Canva and CapCut

3. Why you want this job

4. Which city in the Philippines you are located

*  Also include the phrase: “Lifestyle” in the first line of your application so we know you read the full job post.

Applications without this phrase will not be considered.



Bonus Points



You will stand out if you have experience with:

*   Real estate marketing

*  Instagram and YouTube channel management

*  AI video tools like HeyGen or Synthesia

*  Experience with Capcut

* Experience with Canva



If you are hardworking, organized, and excited about working in the real estate industry, we would love to hear from you.



Apply today!

title: Business Development - Executive Assistant
description:
Job Schedule: M-F 9AM-6PM EST (10PM to 7AM Manila Time)

Salary: $6 - $7/hr.



Job Responsibilities:



Administrative Support for Territory Management: Provide critical administrative support to the sales team, facilitating efficient territory management and systematic tracking of sales metrics.

Strategic Planning Coordination: Assist the VP of Sales & Marketing in organizing and preparing high-level materials for internal strategic planning sessions and executive presentations.

Business Planning Oversight: Collaborate with the sales team to develop, maintain, and oversee reports and documentation that track progress on business plans within designated territories.

Training Program Scheduling: Coordinate and schedule targeted training initiatives to foster internal team development and ensure alignment with strategic organizational goals.

Lead Management and Market Intelligence: Manage lead data entry, maintain comprehensive lead lists, and conduct foundational research to support the identification of potential growth opportunities.

Internal Communications Liaison: Serve as a central point of contact for inquiries from the sales team, VP of Operations, and President, ensuring clear communication and seamless coordination of follow-up actions.

Competitive Market Analysis: Conduct focused research to gather and analyze competitive intelligence and market trends, providing actionable insights to inform sales strategy.

Event Coordination: Virtually coordinate and manage logistics for internal participation in industry events (tradeshows), streamlining schedules for the sales team, VP, and President to optimize event engagement and visibility.



Job Requirements:



Bachelor’s degree in business administration, Marketing, or related field.

title: Architectural Design Support VA (SketchUp & AutoCAD) | $6/hour
description:
I’m looking for an Architectural Design Support VA to assist with project-based drafting and 3D modelling work.



This role requires strong practical skills in SketchUp and AutoCAD, with the ability to work independently after briefings and short check-ins. The work involves translating design ideas into clean models and drawings that help move projects forward efficiently.



Details:



– $6/hour (20 hours per week)

– Part-time

– Flexible schedule

– Remote



What You’ll Do



– Build, edit, and refine SketchUp models based on project briefs and markups

– Produce and update AutoCAD drawings (plans, elevations, sections, and technical outputs)

– Translate design concepts into workable models and drawings

– Maintain a clean model structure and organised project files

– Suggest ideas or design options where appropriate

– Keep drawing versions and outputs organised for review and handoff



Good Fit If You



– Are highly proficient in SketchUp (primary modelling tool)

– Have strong AutoCAD drafting experience

– Produce clean, organised models and drawings

– Pay strong attention to detail and file structure

– Work independently after clear instructions

– Communicate clearly in English when discussing tasks or progress

– Are comfortable collaborating remotely with occasional check-ins



Nice to have: experience with Adobe tools (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) or rendering software.



To Apply

title: UX/UI Designer (Figma Expert) | $1,300–$1,500/month
description:

The work involves improving both internal tools (such as CRM, document systems, operations/logistics platforms, and call systems) and customer-facing web journeys. The goal is to simplify complex workflows into clear, intuitive user experiences and designs that developers can implement cleanly.



Details:



– £6–£7 per hour

– Full-time

– Monday to Friday

– 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM UK time

– Remote



What You’ll Do

– Identify friction points and usability issues across internal and customer-facing platforms

– Design user flows, wireframes, and interaction patterns for complex dashboards and workflows

– Create high-fidelity UI designs and clickable prototypes in Figma

– Build reusable Figma components and maintain consistent design systems

– Work with the product owner to prioritise UX improvements

– Collaborate with developers to ensure designs are implemented accurately



Good Fit If You



– Have expert-level Figma skills (components, auto-layout, design systems, prototyping)

– Have experience designing dashboards and operational platforms, not just marketing websites

– Think in user journeys and workflows, not just screens

– Can simplify complex systems into intuitive designs

To Apply

title: FULLTIME Amazon Admin & Sourcing Virtual Assistant!
description:
About Our Company:

We are a successful, $2million Amazon business doing Online Arbitrage and Wholesale with a strong presence in the US market, and we're looking to grow even bigger. We've built our success on a commitment to our team, and we believe in providing a secure, long-term working environment. In this economy, we understand the value of stability, and we want you to have peace of mind knowing you have a reliable and permanent position with us.



The Opportunity:

DO NOT APPLY IF YOU HAVE NO EXPERIENCE. This is a Full-time position for a motivated, self-starter to be a key part of our operations. While the role starts at $1000 a month, we are looking for someone that has EXPERIENCE and who wants to grow with us. As our business expands, your responsibilities and compensation will grow along with it. The sky is the limit for our growth, and we are looking for an ambitious individual who is ready to take on more and build a career, not just have a job.



Key Responsibilities:



1.) Sourcing and Product Research:



Proactively find profitable products for our online arbitrage business using our established criteria and your own initiative.



Research trends and sales to identify new opportunities. Must have experience with Wholesale and Online Arbitrage.



2.) Administrative Tasks:



Handle data entry, ensuring all product and sourcing information is accurate and organized.



Manage and track orders, ensuring timely and correct delivery of inventory.



Maintain detailed records and reports in Google Sheets.



Check for missing inventory: Run the "Reconcile" report for all FBA shipments that were recently closed.



Create a case with Seller Support for any units that Amazon received but have not been added to your inventory.



Track reimbursements: Go to your "Reimbursements" dashboard to ensure all pending cases are being processed. Follow up on any cases that are past the expected resolution time.



How to Apply:

To be considered for this position, please send your resume and a brief cover letter. Additionally, please create a 30-second to 1-minute video introduction of yourself, upload it, and include the link in your reply. Also, please use the following subject line: [INSERT Your Favorite Book]



3.) General Backend Support:



Provide support for various Amazon Seller Central administrative tasks as needed.



Assist with other administrative duties as required to support our business operations.





We Are Looking For Someone Who Is:



A Self-Starter: You don't wait to be told what to do. You take initiative and are resourceful.



Ambitious and Has a Growth Mindset: You want to learn and take on more responsibility, seeing this role as a stepping stone to a bigger career.



Detail-Oriented: You have an eye for detail and ensure all data is accurate.



Trustworthy: You are reliable and honest.



Strong Communicator: You can communicate clearly and effectively in English + Fast Computer



Must be able to work USA Timezone!



Compensation & Benefits:

-Salary: A stable full-time base salary of $1000 per month.

— Opportunity to earn $1100 USD / mo after 6 months if performance milestones are met

— Opportunity to earn $1200 USD / mo after 12 months is performance milestones are met



-Security: This is a long-term position, providing you with job security you can rely on.



-Growth: Significant room to grow in both responsibility and salary as we grow the business. Career advancement (promotions)



— We also offer quarterly and annual performance-based bonuses

— We honor the tradition of 13th pay

— Stable Career and career advancement (promotions)

title: World's Greatest VA for the World's Greatest Salsa School
description:
We are Toronto Dance Salsa, Canada’s largest Salsa dance school. Our vision is to solve the world’s greatest problem: lonliness. For over 10 years, we’ve been building a community where people feel they belong. We believe in creating a tribe you choose, not just the family you’re born into. Do you want to help make this vision real? If you’re eagre to do purposeful work and grow both professionally and personally, you may have found your new HOME. This isn’t just a job, it’s an opportunity to learn how to make an impact. In your application, please put “I am your next awesome Virtual Assistant!” in the subject line. The job responsibilities include administrative and techincal support, answering
s from students and making them feel welcomed, managing logistics and staying organized, and being proactive in improving role efficiency and suggesting business improvements. The ideal candidate is detail oriented, has excellent English skills, technical proficiency, customer support experience, and reliable equipment. Please also include the link to your resume, your hourly salary expectations, your ideal work schedule, and in the first line of your message list any spelling or grammatical errors you found in this job post. We have to change one of our weekly classes, so please calculate the new Sunday schedule for a 6 week course by moving the start date later by 3 weeks. Current 2024 schedule: June 9 to July 21, with no class on June 30. Rules: we do not run classes on Ontario statutory holidays, and if a holiday lands on a Friday or Monday, we take that whole weekend off. In your application, include the full list of the 6 new Sunday class dates in order, and please watch this Loom video: 
 
 job is full time (40 hours per week) with the opportunity to transition into a long term role, would start immediately, and is ongoing. We would start with a small project first, and we’d pay you for your ideas and research. Be part of a team that’s changing people’s lives. Thank you for considering joining our mission to solve lonliness. We look forward to possibly having you feel like you belong at our school as well. Please submit your job application only via OnlineJobs.ph. Do not send your application message. Irish #Belong

title: Professional Livestream Sales Host - Shopee Mall - OBS & Multi-Cam (WFH)
description:
Job Description:

We are a global footwear brand and a verified Shopee Mall seller. We are looking for a high-energy, tech-savvy Livestream Sales Host in the Philippines for a long-term, flexible partnership. 



This is a Work-From-Home (WFH) position. You will be responsible for hosting live sessions on our Shopee official store, focusing on the comfort and technology of our functional footwear.



Key Responsibilities:

- Host 2-5 live sessions per week (2 hours per session).

- Operate OBS independently: Switch between camera angles (Face cam vs. Close-up shoe/walking cam) to show product details and fit.

- Drive sales through engaging storytelling and professional product demonstration.

- Explain functional features to viewers.



Compensation Structure (Performance-Based):

- Trial Period: Paid trial sessions will be conducted before confirming long-term cooperation.

- Base Pay: $8-$15 per session (Paid bi-weekly or monthly).

- Performance Commission: Tiered commission structure based on sales targets achieved.

- Earning Potential: Top hosts can earn $50 - $100+ per session during peak traffic or mega campaigns.



Requirements:

1. Experience: Proven track record in E-commerce livestreaming (Shopee, TikTok, or Lazada). Experience in footwear or functional products is a huge plus.

2. Technical Setup (Must-Have):

    - A PC/Laptop capable of running OBS smoothly.

    - Multi-Camera Setup: At least two HD cameras (one for your face, one for floor-level shoe demos).

    - High-speed Fiber Internet with a backup plan.

    - Professional lighting and a clean, dedicated streaming space.

3. Communication: Fluent in English and Tagalog. Ability to sell with enthusiasm and authority.



How to Apply:

Please send your application with:

1. Video Demo: Send a 1-minute clip of you selling any pair of shoes. Show us how you handle the transition from talking to showing the shoes on your feet.

2. Setup Photo: A photo of your OBS interface and dual-camera setup.

3. Speedtest: A screenshot of your current internet speed.

4. CV & Portfolio: Clips of your past livestreams.

title: Executive Virtual Assistant
description:
Executive Virtual Assistant



Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 4:30 PM Pacific Time, with a 30-minute break

Salary: $1100 per month



Job Overview: 

We are seeking a highly organized, proactive Executive Virtual Assistant to provide comprehensive support to a senior industry leader across both a consulting practice and a creative music career. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced, dynamic environment and enjoys balancing strategic business support with creative coordination.



The Executive Virtual Assistant will act as a trusted right hand, managing day-to-day operations, scheduling, communications, and project coordination. This position offers a unique opportunity to gain exposure to multifamily operations, PropTech, and consulting work, while also supporting initiatives within the music industry. The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, resourceful, and comfortable handling multiple priorities with discretion and professionalism.





Consulting & Business Operations Responsibilities: 



* Social Media & Content Management: 

Manage LinkedIn content calendar following established weekly posting strategy

Schedule and publish content across platforms using Dripify and other automation tools

Monitor engagement and flag opportunities for relationship building



* Podcast Scheduling & Coordination: 

Schedule and coordinate guest appearances for PropTech Pulse (multifamily PropTech) and Purpose Built (personal transformation) podcasts

Manage guest outreach, confirmations, and pre-interview logistics

Coordinate recording schedules and send calendar invitations

Prepare guest briefing materials and episode outlines

Track episode pipeline and maintain production calendar

Coordinate podcast promotion across social channels for all shows



* Speaking & Workshop Development: 

Research and apply to speaking opportunities at industry conferences (NMHC, NAA, Apartmentalize, regional events)

Track submission deadlines, requirements, and follow-up communications

Promote and book workshops, managing logistics and attendee communications

Coordinate The Diplomat's Table quarterly executive events



* CRM & Client Nurturing: 

Maintain CRM database with accurate contact information and engagement history

Execute nurturing sequences for prospects across six LinkedIn outreach lanes

Schedule discovery calls via Calendly Professional

Prepare briefing documents for client meetings



* Administrative & Financial: 

Manage calendar and scheduling using Microsoft Outlook

Prepare and send monthly client invoices

Track accounts receivable and follow up on outstanding payments

Compile monthly business reports and KPI tracking

Handle
 correspondence and prioritize inbox



* Website & Digital Platform Management: 

Coordinate website design and development projects with designers/developers

Manage website content updates, blog posts, and landing pages

Set up and maintain virtual training platform (course uploads, user management, content organization)

Manage ecommerce platform for workshops, courses, and digital products

Monitor platform performance, troubleshoot issues, and coordinate technical support

Track enrollment, sales metrics, and customer inquiries



* Music Career Responsibilities: 

Schedule and coordinate guest appearances for House Call music podcast

Manage guest outreach, confirmations, and recording logistics for House Call

Manage social media presence and content calendar for music brand

Research and submit tracks to record labels and A&R contacts

Submit songs to playlist curators (Spotify, Apple Music, etc.)

Coordinate release promotion campaigns for new tracks

Track streaming metrics and engagement across platforms

Research marketing opportunities and music industry events





Required Qualifications:

7+ years experience as an Executive Assistant, Virtual Assistant, or in a marketing/communications support role

Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Public Relations, or related field preferred

Exceptional organizational skills with strong attention to detail

Proficiency with LinkedIn, social media scheduling tools, and CRM platforms

Experience with website content management systems (WordPress, Squarespace, or similar)

Familiarity with online course platforms (Thinkific, Teachable, Kajabi) and/or ecommerce tools

Strong written and verbal communication skills with professional polish

Demonstrated ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously

Self-starter who anticipates needs, takes initiative, and operates with minimal supervision

Experience coordinating podcasts, media appearances, or content production





Preferred Qualifications:

Experience supporting executives in professional services, consulting, or thought leadership roles

Familiarity with real estate, PropTech, or B2B industries

Background in music industry marketing, artist management, or entertainment

Experience with invoicing, basic bookkeeping, or accounts receivable

Knowledge of conference speaking circuits and event promotion





Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: Content Production Coordinator & Creative Ops Project Manager
description:
# Content Production Coordinator & Creative Ops Project Manager — Newsletter, Social Content & Creative

**CORE TOOLS:** Notion, Trello, Google Workspace,
, WhatsApp, Claude, Slack 



---



## WHO WE ARE



You'll be supporting day-to-day production operations across two companies run by the same creative leadership team.



1// The first is a **fintech and financial media company** producing a biweekly newsletter, short-form social video, and editorial content. We run a documented 14-day production cycle with defined phases and gates. Within 3 months, we're scaling to weekly — then launching a second newsletter — while running 30 days of social content calendar.



2// second is a **Brooklyn-based creative studio** doing creative services like branding, websites, photo/video production, equipment rentals, and content licensing. we need to prepare  production docs like SOWs, production briefs, photo galleries.



Supporting this we have international contractor team in place: a Philippines-based VA managing newsletter production and social content coordination, a Philippines-based brand designer, a Hong Kong-based retoucher- our team communicates via
 and 
. We pay contractors via Wise.



**You are the layer that keeps all of them on track.** Briefs. Assignments. Deadlines.  



---



## THE ROLE



This is a part-time, async-first role. Hours flex between 10–15/week depending on where we are in the production cycle 



This is not too much of a "do the work" role. This is a **brief, coordinate, QA, and unblock** to get to successful outcomes role. 



The important thing is to know and set up the right systems so you know at any given 
nt: where every deliverable is in the pipeline, who owns the next action, what success looks like at that step, and whether it's on track or what is the blocker as well as whats the easiest way to resolve it - now and in the future. 



---



## WHAT YOU WILL DO



**Know the Clients. Projects and the Team**



You will coordinate a small international contractor team. to serve our firm and our clients.  You need to understand what each person does, what a brief needs to looks like for them, what turnaround to expect, and how to QA their output





**Own / Maintain the Production Process Board**



- Maintain clean Notion tickets, pages for every active newsletter cycle — all 5 phases, all 5 gates, every owner, every deadline

- When we move to two simultaneous newsletter cycles, you ensure they don't collide, every contributor knows what they're working on and when



**Run the Cycle**



- Monday kickoff: confirm topic is locked, outline is drafted, Gates 1 and 1B are cleared

- Brief each contributor for their phase as it opens — don't wait for them to ask

- Chase drafts, design assets, and revisions on schedule

- Gate-check every deliverable: does this match the brief? Is it ready to move forward?

- Own the Wednesday QA: links tested, mobile preview confirmed, test send done, publish scheduled



**Social Content Pipeline**



- Coordinate the 30-day social content calendar — brief ? draft ? revision ? approved ? scheduled ? published

- Manage video clip coordination between the VA and retoucher: file handoff, feedback relay, export approvals

- Upload finalized assets to the content library with correct naming and organization



**Brief Writing**



- Write clear, specific briefs for each contributor at each stage — the right brief means fewer revision rounds and fewer back-and-
 on
/WhatsApp

- Capture feedback from leadership and translate it into actionable direction for the team (e.g. "color grade reference attached — bring warmth up, reduce grey on subject")



**Notion Ownership & Optimization**



- Our Notion is a work in progress — functional but messy. Auditing, reorganizing, and optimizing it is a core part of this role

- Tweak and build templates that actually match how we work, not how Notion thinks we should work

- Troubleshoot broken databases, misconfigured views, and workflows that have drifted from their original intent

- Use Notion AI where it speeds things up; know its limits and when to work around them



**AI-Assisted Workflows**



- You are comfortable prompting Claude and ChatGPT to assist with drafting briefs, SOPs, status summaries, and first-pass copy — not as a crutch, but as a genuine accelerant

- You know how to write a prompt that gets a useful output, and how to edit AI output into something that actually sounds right

- You help the team work smarter by identifying where AI fits into the pipeline and where human judgment is non-negotiable



**Systems & SOPs**



- As we scale, document every new process so it's repeatable without you holding it in your head

- Flag workflow gaps and propose fixes before they become emergencies



---



## THE 3-MONTH RAMP



**Month 1:** Learn the existing 14-day cycle inside out. Own the board. Audit and begin cleaning up Notion. Know every contributor's workflow. Zero missed gates.



**Month 2:** Support the transition to weekly cadence — two cycles running simultaneously. Prove the system holds under pressure.



**Month 3:** Help stand up a second newsletter from a production ops standpoint — new board, new cycle, new contributor briefs. You help build it.



---



## WHO YOU ARE



- You have coordinated a small creative or production team before — you know what it means to brief a designer vs. brief an editor vs. brief a retoucher, and you know the difference

- You communicate with precision via
 and 
 — your messages are short, clear, and always have a next action attached

- You know the difference between a good deliverable and one that just needs to ship — and you know when to flag leadership vs. when to solve it yourself

- Notion is not intimidating to you — you have reorganized a messy workspace before and you know how to build a database that people actually use

- You use Claude and/or ChatGPT regularly and know how to prompt well — not just "write me a brief" but actually getting useful, on-brand output

- You are comfortable with fintech and financial media content — you don't need to be an expert, but you can read a newsletter about markets and know whether the right link is in the right place

- Strong written English — briefs, SOPs, and status updates are core to this role

- Proactive by nature: "Gate 3 is at risk, here's why, here's my proposed fix" is a message you send before anyone asks



**Bonus:**

- Experience coordinating with a distributed international team across time zones and platforms

- Experience with Beehiiv, social video workflows, or short-form content pipelines

- Familiarity with Wise or international contractor payment coordination

- Experience with 
c or similar content/asset libraries



---



## TO APPLY



Send a message with:



1. A specific example of a time you coordinated a small team to a deadline — who did what, how you tracked it, what broke and how you handled it

2. Your experience with Notion specifically — have you ever cleaned up or rebuilt a workspace? Tell us what it looked like before and after

3. How you use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) in your current workflow — be specific

4. Your available hours and EST timezone overlap

title: Guest Relations & Operations Virtual Assistant Short-Term Rental Management | Melbourne, Australia
description:

We’re a Melbourne, Australia–based short-term rental management company looking for a reliable, detail-oriented, and fast-thinking Guest Relations & Operations Virtual Assistant to support our growing portfolio of properties.



This is a full-time, long-term role focused on daily operations and guest communication across multiple booking platforms. You’ll be the main point of contact between guests, cleaners, maintenance teams, and property owners, so strong communication and organization skills are essential.



This is not a gig or part-time role. We’re looking for someone who can dedicate their full attention to this position while on shift. Because we provide fast, responsive service, you must be able to reply to messages within 5 minutes during your shift and have no other jobs or side commitments during working hours.



Work Schedule:

8:00 AM – 4:00 P
lbourne time, or

4:00 PM – 12:00 A
lbourne time



Please apply only if you are flexible and able to work either shift.



This role is best suited to someone who’s comfortable working in a fast-paced, high-pressure environment and can follow systems and instructions closely.



What You’ll Be Doing:

- Reply to guest messages, booking inquiries, and issues via Airbnb, 
, and Hospitable

, and other channels

- Communicate clearly, professionally, and on time at all times



Requirements:

- Solid experience using Airbnb, 
, Hospitable, PriceLabs, Asana, Trello, KeyNest, TT Lock, RingCentral, and Bl

- Strong attention to detail and good time management

- Comfortable working under pressure with strict response-time expectations

- Own laptop and phone with stable, high-speed internet

- Willing to install required apps and tools

- No other jobs, freelance work, or gigs during working hours

- Backup power or secondary internet is a plus



Work Setup:

- 48 hours per week

- Work hours follow Melbourne, Australia time

- No time-tracking or monitoring software; we value trust and accountability



How to Apply

Applications without a resume link and salary range will not be considered.

title: Motion Graphic Expert
description:
Project-Based / Freelance

Potential for ongoing work if the first project goes well.



OVERVIEW

I’m looking for a highly capable Motion Graphics Designer to help me build the core visual asset system for a YouTube brand.



This is not a role for someone who only drops in flashy templates.



I need someone who understands how to build a clean, premium, editorial motion graphics package that feels custom, modern, and highly usable inside a real editing workflow.



The visual direction is inspired by the style often seen in high-end YouTube documentary / explainer channels — polished, minimal, intentional, information-dense, and built with strong taste and consistency.



The goal is to create a reusable motion graphics system that I can use across future videos in Premiere Pro, with assets built in After Effects and exported as MOGRTs where appropriate.



What I Need Built



I am looking for help creating the core asset library for my editing workflow.



This will likely include:

 • Full-screen title cards

 • Section headers

 • Lower thirds

 • Name / title IDs

 • Source tags / citation tags

 • Callout labels

 • Pointer graphics

 • Highlight boxes

 • Info cards / fact cards

 • Sidebar panels

 • Numbered list builds

 • Comparison layouts

 • Big stat graphics

 • Timeline graphics

 • Screen-recording annotation graphics

 • A consistent transitions / animation style for these assets



The goal is not just to make isolated graphics.

The goal is to build a cohesive system with consistent:

 • typography

 • spacing

 • padding

 • line weights

 • corner radius

 • color usage

 • motion timing

 • easing

 • layout behavior



Software Requirements



You must be comfortable working in:

 • Adobe After Effects

 • Adobe Premiere Pro

 • Essential Graphics / MOGRT workflow



Bonus if you also understand:

 • editorial design

 • broadcast-inspired design systems

 • YouTube retention-focused editing

 • motion systems built for repeat use, not just one-off animation



What “Good” Looks Like



I am not looking for:

 • overdesigned graphics

 • overly flashy animation

 • generic corporate templates

 • loud transitions

 • cheesy YouTube effects

 • motion for motion’s sake



I am looking for:

 • clean editorial motion design

 • premium typography

 • tasteful animation

 • strong visual hierarchy

 • consistency across assets

 • motion that feels smooth and intentional

 • assets that are practical and fast to use in Premiere



Deliverables



The project will likely include:

 • an agreed-upon visual direction for the package

 • a small motion graphics system / style guide

 • After Effects project files

 • organized source files

 • exported MOGRTs for Premiere Pro

 • clearly labeled assets

 • editable controls where useful

 • clean folder organization



Ideal Candidate



You are a strong fit if you:

 • have real taste in modern motion design

 • understand the difference between “template-looking” and “designed”

 • can create a system, not just random assets

 • know how to make graphics flexible for editors

 • are detail-oriented with spacing, timing, typography, and layout

 • can follow references while still making smart design decisions

 • communicate clearly and hit deadlines



To Apply



Please send:

 1. A short intro about your experience

 2. Your portfolio or samples of motion graphics work

 3. Examples of work that feel clean, editorial, premium, or documentary/explainer style

 4. Confirmation that you can work in After Effects + Premiere Pro MOGRT workflow

 5. Your pricing structure for project-based work

 6. Your estimated turnaround time for a project like this

 7. The word “Kallaway” at the top of your application so I know you read this carefully



Important



Please do not apply if your work mainly looks like:

 • gaming edits

 • flashy promo reels

 • heavy glitch effects





I am specifically looking for someone who can help custom build a refined visual language for long-form YouTube content.



Potential for Ongoing Work



If the first project goes well, there is strong potential for additional work creating:

 • new graphics modules

 • one-off custom graphics for future videos

 • refinements to the system

 • ongoing motion support for long-form YouTube content
